My, Polacy, domagamy siГ„Вҷ ekshumacji ofiar rzezi woГ…ВӮyГ…В„skiej, dopГғВіki Г…Вӣwiadkowie tej tragedii jeszcze Г…ВјyjГ„В…. Nie o zemstГ„Вҷ, lecz o pamiГ„ВҷГ„ВҮ i prawdГ„Вҷ woГ…ВӮajГ„В… ofiary.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ OndГ…Вҷej DostГғВЎl (NI). ГўВҖВ“ Pane pГ…ВҷedsedajГғВӯcГғВӯ, vГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВӯ kolegovГғВ©, konflikt na UkrajinГ„Вӣ nemГғВЎ vojenskГғВ© Г…ВҷeГ…ВЎenГғВӯ, ale pouze diplomatickГғВ©. Dva roky vГғВЎlky po selhГғВЎnГғВӯ istanbulskГғВҪch jednГғВЎnГғВӯ nepГ…Вҷinesly nic neГ…Вҫ statisГғВӯce mrtvГғВҪch a bilionovГғВ© Г…ВЎkody. DalГ…ВЎГғВӯ vojenskГғВЎ podpora, vГ„ВҚetnГ„Вӣ nynГғВӯ zvaГ…ВҫovanГғВ©ho pouГ…ВҫitГғВӯ dalekonosnГғВҪch stГ…Вҷel, vytvГғВЎГ…ВҷГғВӯ hrozbu eskalace a pГ…ВҷГғВӯmГғВ© ГғВәГ„ВҚasti stГғВЎtГ…ВҜ EvropskГғВ© unie na vГғВЎlce. K tomu nГғВЎm obГ„ВҚanГғВ© nedali mandГғВЎt. NaГ…ВЎe delegace StaГ„ВҚilo! byla zvolena na zГғВЎkladГ„Вӣ jasnГ„Вӣ promГғВӯrovГғВ©ho programu a tГғВ©Г…Вҫ v dalГ…ВЎГғВӯch nedГғВЎvnГғВҪch volbГғВЎch uspГ„Вӣly strany s jasnГғВҪm postojem proti vГғВЎlce. Ani statisГғВӯce UkrajincГ…ВҜ nynГғВӯ v EvropskГғВ© unii nejevГғВӯ zГғВЎjem vrГғВЎtit se a bojovat na frontГ„Вӣ. Naopak dalГ…ВЎГғВӯ se snaГ…ВҫГғВӯ z Ukrajiny uprchnout pГ…Вҷed verbГғВӯГ…Вҷi.

VГғВЎleГ„ВҚnГғВЎ eskalace je tГғВӯm nejhorГ…ВЎГғВӯm ze Г…ВЎpatnГғВҪch Г…ВҷeГ…ВЎenГғВӯ, kterГғВЎ nynГғВӯ zbГғВҪvajГғВӯ. TГғВӯm nejlepГ…ВЎГғВӯm je jednГғВЎnГғВӯ o mГғВӯru, obnova ekonomickГғВ© spoluprГғВЎce ve vГғВҪchodnГғВӯ EvropГ„Вӣ, protoГ…Вҫe jenom to mГ…ВҜГ…Вҫe pГ…ВҷinГғВ©st prosperitu nutnou mimo jinГғВ© k obnovГ„Вӣ Ukrajiny. Proto bychom mГ„Вӣli podporovat, ne kritizovat maГ„ВҸarskГғВ© pГ…ВҷedsednictvГғВӯ a premiГғВ©ra OrbГғВЎna, kterГғВҪ je schopen jednat jak v KyjevГ„Вӣ, tak v MoskvГ„Вӣ, jak ve Washingtonu, tak Pekingu. Cestou vpГ…Вҷed je diplomacie vedoucГғВӯ k mГғВӯru, ne dodГғВЎvky zbranГғВӯ a ne vГғВЎleГ„ВҚnГғВЎ eskalace. To je nГғВЎzor naГ…ВЎich voliГ„ВҚГ…ВҜ.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Sandra Kalniete (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ GodГ„ВҒtais sГ„В“des vadГ„В«tГ„ВҒj! GodГ„ВҒtie kolГ„В“Г„ВЈi!

Katru dienu no tГ„ВҒliem Krievijas poligoniem gaisГ„ВҒ ceГ„Вјas iznГ„В«cinГ„ВҒtГ„ВҒji un droni. Kremlis tos raida uz Ukrainu, lai tur grautu enerГ„ВЈijas infrastruktГ…В«ru un nogalinГ„ВҒtu iedzГ„В«votГ„ВҒjus. MГ„В“s zinГ„ВҒm, ka ukraiГ…ВҶus gaida otrГ„ВҒ ziema bez siltuma un gaismas. TaГ„ВҚu mГ„В“s nedarГ„ВҒm pietiekami, lai novГ„В“rstu dronu un raГ„В·eГ…ВЎu uzlidojumus. UkraiГ…ВҶi ir spiesti cГ„В«nГ„В«ties ar uz muguras sasietu roku, jo viГ…ВҶiem vГ„В“l arvien nav atГ„Вјauts izmantot sabiedroto piegГ„ВҒdГ„ВҒtos tГ„ВҒlГ„ВҒ rГ„ВҒdiusa Г…ВЎГ„ВҒviГ…ВҶus, lai iznГ„В«cinГ„ВҒtu lidlaukus un bumbvedГ„В“jus, kamГ„В“r tie atrodas uz zemes KrievijГ„ВҒ.

Mani tracina tas, ka sabiedroto valstu vadГ„В«tГ„ВҒji savu aizliegumu pamato ar bailГ„В“m no eskalГ„ВҒcijas. Putinam tieГ…ВЎГ„ВҒm jГ„ВҒpriecГ„ВҒjas, ka viГ…ВҶa draudГ„В«gie blefi jau kuro reizi atrod dzirdГ„В«gas ausis VaГ…ВЎingtonГ„ВҒ un citur. Vai tieГ…ВЎГ„ВҒm no Г…ВЎГ„В«s tribГ„В«nes atkal un atkal ir jГ„ВҒskaidro, ka, vilcinoties dot atГ„Вјauju iznГ„В«cinГ„ВҒt militГ„ВҒros objektus KrievijГ„ВҒ, mГ„В“s spГ„В“lГ„В“jam Putina spГ„В“li. TikmГ„В“r Krievijas militГ„ВҒrГ„ВҒ industrija strГ„ВҒdГ„ВҒ 24 stundas bez pГ„ВҒrtraukuma un nodarbina miljonus.

MГ…В«su vilcinГ„ВҒГ…ВЎanГ„ВҒs nav uzvaras stratГ„В“Г„ВЈija. Uzvaras stratГ„В“Г„ВЈija ir rГ„В«koties apГ…ВҶГ„В“mГ„В«gi un drosmГ„В«gi. TГ„ВҒ, kГ„ВҒ to dara varonГ„В«gГ„ВҒ ukraiГ…ВҶu tauta.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Tonino Picula (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ President, dear colleagues, in the last two and a half years, the European Union supported Ukraine substantially more than many would have predicted.

However, our to-do list is still very long. The start of the new legislative mandate is an opportunity to live up to the existing commitments, but we must continue to improve the efficiency of our sanctions and our military and economic support. There cannot be any fatigue in delivering our support when the immediate threat is still present. Trade with Russia should be avoided while the aggression is ongoing. Better burden-sharing between the Member States is also needed. Due to the issue of restrictions on the use of Western weapon systems against military targets on Russian territory, Ukrainian operations are subject to international law provisions and, as such, should be enabled.

Ukraine must be given a fair chance in this war to fight for their country and our security.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Jaroslava PokornГғВЎ JermanovГғВЎ (PfE). ГўВҖВ“ Pane pГ…ВҷedsedajГғВӯcГғВӯ, vГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВ© kolegynГ„Вӣ, vГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВӯ kolegovГғВ©, Г„ВҢeskГғВЎ republika, vГ„ВҚetnГ„Вӣ hnutГғВӯ ANO, jehoГ…Вҫ jsem Г„ВҚlenkou, stojГғВӯ na stranГ„Вӣ Ukrajiny a vГ…Вҫdy podporovala pomoc napadenГғВ© zemi. NemГ…ВҜГ…Вҫeme ale souhlasit s tГғВӯm, aby nГ„Вӣkdo z Bruselu naГ…Вҷizoval pomoc. EvropskГғВЎ unie je poГ…ВҷГғВЎd jeГ…ВЎtГ„Вӣ sloГ…ВҫenГғВЎ ze suverГғВ©nnГғВӯch stГғВЎtГ…ВҜ, kterГғВ© majГғВӯ prГғВЎvo o pomoci jinГғВҪm zemГғВӯm rozhodovat podle svГғВҪch moГ…ВҫnostГғВӯ. KaГ…ВҫdГғВЎ z Г„ВҚlenskГғВҪch zemГғВӯ mГғВЎ svГғВ© problГғВ©my, specifika a mГ…ВҜГ…Вҫe pomГғВЎhat rГ…ВҜznГғВҪm zpГ…ВҜsobem. Г„ВҢeskГғВЎ republika patГ…ВҷГғВӯ k tГ„Вӣm nejaktivnГ„ВӣjГ…ВЎГғВӯm, ale z principu nГғВЎm objem pomoci nemГ…ВҜГ…Вҫe nikdo naГ…Вҷizovat tak, jak se o to snaГ…ВҫГғВӯ usnesenГғВӯ pГ…ВҷijatГғВ© tГғВӯmto Parlamentem v Г„ВҚervenci. StejnГ„Вӣ tak nemohu souhlasit s tГғВӯm, aby EvropskГғВҪ parlament vyzГғВҪval k tomu, aby zemГ„Вӣ povolily pouГ…ВҫГғВӯvat zbranГ„Вӣ pГ…ВҜvodnГ„Вӣ poГ…ВҷГғВӯzenГғВ© na obranu Ukrajiny k ГғВәtokГ…ВҜm na Rusko. TakovГғВ© rozhodnutГғВӯ mГ…ВҜГ…Вҫe pГ…Вҷijmout NATO nebo jednotlivГғВ© zemГ„Вӣ. A my to respektujme! Chci takГғВ© zdГ…ВҜraznit, Г…Вҫe naprosto odmГғВӯtГғВЎm jakГғВ©koliv nГғВЎlepkovГғВЎnГғВӯ a oznaГ„ВҚovГғВЎnГғВӯ skupiny PatriotГ…ВҜ pro Evropu za proruskou frakci. NГғВЎlepkovГғВЎnГғВӯ za jinГғВҪ nГғВЎzor kohokoliv je nepГ…ВҷГғВӯpustnГғВ©. Naopak diskuse by mГ„Вӣla zohledГ…ВҲovat rГ…ВҜznГғВ© pohledy a Г…ВҫГғВЎdnГғВҪ z nich by nemГ„Вӣl...

(pГ…ВҷedsedajГғВӯcГғВӯ Г…ВҷeГ„ВҚnici pГ…ВҷeruГ…ВЎil)

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Rihards Kols (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ President, we call for the prosecution of war criminals like Putin, Shoigu, Gerasimov, yet some among us suggest peace talks with these very criminals. How did we lose our moral compass? We have a strategic compass, but morally we are paralysed. While Ukraine fights for its survival, we talk of negotiations with those responsible for bombing schools, hospitals and civilians. Just look at the facts. Russia has launched over 7ГӮВ 000 missile strikes since the start of the invasion. How can we even consider sitting down with those responsible for these atrocities?

Europe has power to act, but we are crippled by indecision and lack of political will. And while we hesitate, we hold back Ukraine with restrictions on the very weapons they need to defend themselves. This isn't just a weakness; it's a moral failure. If we truly stand with Ukraine, we must lift all the restrictions on weapons use and give the tools to strike back effectively. It is time for Europe to stop wavering. We don't need more plans or excuses; we need the political will to act, to stand with Ukraine and to hold Russia accountable. Let's release the weapons, but also let's release the accession talks with Ukraine.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Hilde Vautmans (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ Voorzitter, sinds 24ГӮВ februari 2022 zijn de schendingen van het humanitair recht door Rusland in OekraГғВҜne ontelbaar geworden, met aanvallen op ziekenhuizen, duizenden doden, executies en folteringen. Wat we echter dreigen te vergeten, is dat deze oorlog al ruim twee jaar als een donkere wolk boven onze economie hangt. Er is sprake van een immense dreiging en onzekerheid met betrekking tot de gas- en energieprijzen en steeds meer Europese banen komen in het gedrang. Deze zaken zijn niet met elkaar te vergelijken, maar we moeten evenwel stoppen met ons ГўВҖВңstop-and-go-beleidГўВҖВқ ten aanzien van OekraГғВҜne, waarbij we eerst gas geven en vervolgens remmen. Laten we onze voet van het rempedaal halen.

We moeten OekraГғВҜne onverwijld toestaan Europese wapens op Russisch grondgebied in te zetten. BelgiГғВ«, Denemarken en Nederland hebben eindelijk de gevraagde F-16's geleverd en zouden nu zeggen dat ze niet gebruikt mogen worden. Dit is geen manier van doen.

Ten slotte moeten de volgende Europese Commissie en de Raad alles in het werk stellen om een echte Europese defensie-unie tot stand brengen.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Reinier Van Lanschot (Verts/ALE). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ President, today, exactly 80 years ago, my grandfather ran outside and looked up at the sky. He saw hundreds of men descending with parachutes: the start of Operation Market Garden. In this huge effort by the Allied forces to free the Netherlands, thousands of soldiers lost their lives to bring democracy, freedom and peace.

A fight for the same causes is now being fought on our continent. But no one is asking us today to send soldiers. The Ukrainians are simply asking us to untie their hands and allow them to strike the military targets that Russia uses to terrorise Ukrainian civilians. This war is one nation trying to conquer another. So you don't create lasting peace by forcing the defender to surrender. You create it by stopping the aggressor.

In April, I travelled to Kyiv to meet Volt Ukraine. A young Ukrainian man told me, 'Please give us the means to defend ourselves. Trust me: there's nobody who wants to end this war faster than us.'

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Danilo Della Valle (The Left). ГўВҖВ“ Signor Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, in questo dibattito emerge chiaramente il triste copione della narrativa costruita per giustificare l'escalation militare in Ucraina.

Il mondo non ГғВЁ diviso, come venite a raccontarci, tra forze del bene e forze del male. Il mondo ГғВЁ diviso tra chi, inviando armi, pensa di risolvere tutti i problemi e chi invece guarda la realtГғВ  e parla la lingua della veritГғВ  ai cittadini europei, eliminando ogni retorica dalla propaganda bellicista, che utilizza concetti come vittoria finale o distruzione del nemico.

Guardate, questa narrativa omette di dire che la strada della vittoria militare sul campo non puГғВІ non passare per un non coinvolgimento diretto dei nostri eserciti in questo conflitto. ГғВҲ davvero questo quello che volete?

La guerra in Ucraina verrГғВ  ricordata come il punto piГғВ№ basso della capacitГғВ  dell'Unione europea di tutelare i propri interessi geostrategici e di tutelare il benessere dei propri cittadini. In quest'Aula si giustifica l'invio delle armi a oltranza come il prezzo da pagare per la libertГғВ  e la democrazia, ma in realtГғВ  libertГғВ  e democrazia sono le prime vittime della vostra folle strategia di guerra.ГӮВ Dimostrate di essere orfani della dottrina Bush, che peraltro ГғВЁ stata giГғВ  sconfitta dalla storia.

Adesso io mi chiedo: nella risoluzione che verrГғВ  votata giovedГғВ¬, arriverete anche a incoraggiare l'uso dei missili in territorio russo? Domani a che punto arriverete, alle armi nucleari? Adesso ГғВЁ il momento di dire basta.

Noi del Movimento Cinque Stelle continueremo a opporci a questa folle deriva bellicista e continueremo a lavorare affinchГғВ© la pace in Ucraina possa essere portata attraverso l'unico modo possibile, ossia la diplomazia.

(L'oratore accetta di rispondere a una domanda "cartellino blu")

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 

PRESIDENZA: PINA PICIERNO
Vicepresidente

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Rihards Kols (ECR), blue-card question. ГўВҖВ“ Well, it's very simple to define who is Russianist or who is Putinist. It's just to answer a very simple question. Who owns Crimea?

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Danilo Della Valle (The Left), risposta a una domanda "cartellino blu". ГўВҖВ“ Chiaramente la Crimea ГғВЁ territorio ucraino, sicuramente, ma c'ГғВЁ tutta una storia chiaramente dietro. Ma ГғВЁ chiaro che la Crimea ГғВЁ territorio ucraino.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Milan UhrГғВӯk (ESN). ГўВҖВ“ VГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВЎ pani predsedajГғВәca, eГ…ВЎte ani nebola zvolenГғВЎ novГғВЎ eurokomisia a hneГ„ВҸ prvГғВҪ bod, Г„ВҚo tu mГғВЎme na rokovanГғВӯ, je viac peГ…ВҲazГғВӯ a viac zbranГғВӯ pre Ukrajinu. Nie pre EurГғВіpanov, ale pre Ukrajinu.

A kolegovia, ja sa vГғВЎs chcem tuto spГғВҪtaГ…ВҘ, Г…Вҫe: dokedy chcete v tej eskalГғВЎcii pokraГ„ВҚovaГ…ВҘ? PretoГ…Вҫe zaГ„ВҚalo to humanitГғВЎrnou pomocou, v poriadku. Ale potom priГ…ВЎli na rad nГғВЎboje, munГғВӯcia, rakety, tanky. Potom priГ…ВЎli stГғВӯhaГ„ВҚky F-16. Teraz prichГғВЎdzajГғВә rakety s dlhГғВҪm doletom, ktorГғВ© dostrelia aГ…Вҫ do Ruskej federГғВЎcie. KoГ„Вҫko zbranГғВӯ? KoГ„Вҫko peГ…ВҲazГғВӯ? KoГ„Вҫko mГ…В•tvych eГ…ВЎte musГғВӯ v tejto vojne padnГғВәГ…ВҘ nato, aby skonГ„ВҚila?

PreГ„ВҚo sa tak straГ…ВЎne bojГғВӯte rozprГғВЎvaГ…ВҘ o mieri? VeГ„ВҸ o mieri uГ…Вҫ otvorene hovorГғВӯ aj budГғВәci americkГғВҪ prezident Trump, ktorГғВ©ho sa americkГғВӯ, takzvanГғВӯ demokrati, opakovane pokГғВәГ…ВЎajГғВә zavraГ…ВҫdiГ…ВҘ.

My nechceme zanechaГ…ВҘ naГ…ВЎim deГ…ВҘom, naГ…ВЎim vnukom, budГғВәcnosГ…ВҘ plnГғВә zbranГғВӯ a vojny, ale naopak budГғВәcnosГ…ВҘ plnГғВә mieru a pohody.

A prГғВЎve preto jednoducho nemГғВҙГ…Вҫeme takГғВәto agresГғВӯvnu militantnГғВә a vojnovГғВә politiku naГ„ВҸalej podporovaГ…ВҘ.

(ReГ„ВҚnГғВӯk sГғВәhlasil, Г…Вҫe odpovie na viacerГғВ© otГғВЎzky poloГ…ВҫenГғВ© zdvihnutГғВӯm modrej karty)

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Paulius Saudargas (PPE), blue-card question. ГўВҖВ“ Once again, as your colleagues, you are convincing us that sending arms to Ukraine, supporting Ukraine, is a wrong pathway towards peace. But tell it to Mr Winston Churchill. Tell it to the millions who died in the Second World War protecting, defending and fighting back the aggressor. The only way to have peace is to fight back the aggressor.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Jaak Madison (ECR), blue-card question. ГўВҖВ“ Dear Milan, I will speak in English so it's easier for both of us.

First of all, of course nobody ГўВҖВ“ on both sides ГўВҖВ“ wants to live in times of war. It's definitely sure. But of course, to end the war there are different scenarios ГўВҖВ“ like how to find peace finally. And if we are all looking for peace, are trying to find peace, what is your view or your solution to find peace finally?

Is it like some parts of Ukraine should be part of Russia? If this will happen, that they will be part of Russia, how do you predict the future steps of Russia. Are they still aggressive? Are they aggressive against Eastern Europe, against Baltic states?

What do you think about NATO? Is NATO guilty of this war now, today, in Ukraine. What is your solution for peace? Because we are looking for peace, right? So what is your view of peace, finally?

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Milan UhrГғВӯk (ESN), odpoveГ„ВҸ na otГғВЎzku poloГ…ВҫenГғВә zdvihnutГғВӯm modrej karty. ГўВҖВ“ NiekoГ„ВҫkokrГғВЎt tu zaznelo, Г…Вҫe jedinГғВҪm spГғВҙsobom ako ukonГ„ВҚiГ…ВҘ tГғВә vojnu sГғВә, samozrejme, mierovГғВ© rokovania. A prГғВЎve to my chceme podporiГ…ВҘ, aby sa zaГ„ВҚali mierovГғВ© rokovania medzi zГғВәГ„ВҚastnenГғВҪmi stranami, medzi Ruskou federГғВЎciou a Ukrajinou, ktorГғВЎ bola Ruskou federГғВЎciou napadnutГғВЎ v rГғВЎmci tzv. Г…ВЎpeciГғВЎlnej operГғВЎcie.

PretoГ…Вҫe inГғВҪ spГғВҙsob, ako to ukonГ„ВҚiГ…ВҘ, jednoducho neexistuje. Ja si myslГғВӯm, Г…Вҫe RuskГғВЎ federГғВЎcia nebude ГғВәtoГ„ВҚiГ…ВҘ naГ„ВҸalej na zГғВЎpadnГғВ© Г…ВЎtГғВЎty. Po prvГғВ©, na to neexistuje ani nijakГғВҪ objektГғВӯvny dГғВҙvod. Po druhГғВ© tu mГғВЎme SeveroatlantickГғВә alianciu a tak Г„ВҸalej.

Ale jednoducho ten scenГғВЎr, ktorГғВҪ tu bol doposiaГ„Вҫ poslednГғВ© dva roky, neustГғВЎle posielanie zbranГғВӯ ГғВәplne evidentne nikam nevedie. A preto je to podГ„Вҫa mГ…ВҲa slepГғВЎ uliГ„ВҚka. Viacej odpovedaГ…ВҘ nestГғВӯham.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Michael von der Schulenburg (NI). ГўВҖВ“ Frau PrГғВӨsidentin! Nach mehr als zweieinhalb Jahren des wohl brutalsten Krieges der Nachkriegsgeschichte auf europГғВӨischem Boden, der bereits hunderttausenden Menschen das Leben gekostet und weitere hunderttausende zu KrГғВјppeln gemacht hat, fГғВӨllt diesem Parlament nichts anderes ein, als eine Art KriegsentschlieГғВҹung zu verabschieden. Diese EntschlieГғВҹung trГғВӨgt das Risiko, zu einem Freibrief fГғВјr einen totalen Krieg zu werden, der sich auf Europa ausweiten und uns alle zerstГғВ¶ren kann. Der Ukraine wГғВјrden wir damit sicherlich nicht helfen.

Mit dieser Kriegshaltung steht die EuropГғВӨische Union zunehmend allein da. Die Vereinigten Staaten haben begonnen, sich aus diesem Krieg zurГғВјckzuziehen, und die BRICS-Staaten setzen ein Zeichen, indem sie ihr nГғВӨchstes Gipfeltreffen in Russland abhalten werden. Auch die Mehrheit unserer BГғВјrger lehnt inzwischen die WeiterfГғВјhrung dieses Krieges ab. Anstatt nun eine brandgefГғВӨhrliche ProvokationsГўВҖВ‘ und Kriegsspirale zu finanzieren, sollten wir uns der alles entscheidenden Aufgabe zuwenden, den Frieden in der Ukraine und in Europa durch Verhandlungen zu retten.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Riho Terras (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ MadamГӮВ President, today we are discussing the support that Ukraine needs from the European Union ГўВҖВ“ the support that is meant to keep Ukraine on par in this war of attrition against a much larger enemy. Let us be very clear: Russia is waging this war not only against Ukraine. Putin is at war with the West, according to his own words. He wants to rearrange the whole European security architecture. The people of Ukraine have heroically kept Russia from advancing further for more than 900 days now. This fight has come at a very high price that we in the West have not had to pay yet.

What Ukraine needs from us is adequate financial and military support. We have failed to deliver just that. We have not been able to deliver the minimum 0.25ГӮВ % from our GDP, and that is a shame. Ukraine needs long-range capability to take the fight to the Russian territory.

I am sure that the plan for Ukrainian victory that will be presented next week relies heavily on our support. So let us help Ukraine to make this plan successful. Slava Ukraini!

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Presidente. ГўВҖВ“ Non accordo una domanda cartellino blu all'on. ГғВ–zlem Demirel, poichГғВ© ne ha giГғВ  posta una.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Tobias Cremer (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ MadamГӮВ President, dear colleagues, this is my first speech on this floor and I am proud to use these first words here to say loudly and clearly that Europe stands with Ukraine, however long it takes.

We stand with it in its fight for freedom over tyranny, for democracy over dictatorship and for its fight for peace over Putin's war.

But we are doing this not out of altruism. We are doing this because we know very well that it is our security and our freedom that is at stake here, and that we only can guarantee if Putin understands that he cannot win this war and that he will not win this war.

That is why we must support Ukraine with all our strength, with humanitarian aid, with diplomacy, also with the delivery of weapons. For its struggle for peace, but not the peace of the graveyard, not the peace of the dictator, but for peace that deserves its name. For peace in freedom, for peace with self-determination for the Ukrainians and with security for Europe.

(The speaker agreed to take a blue-card question)

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Damian Boeselager (Verts/ALE), blue-card question. ГўВҖВ“ Thank you for your intervention. I have two quick questions. The first one is, what do you say to these people, like the BГғВјndnis Sahra Wagenknecht, 'we have to retract all the arms, and then suddenly, peace will fall from heavens'? And the second question is, do you think that we should allow Ukraine to attack targets on Russian soil if they're strategically dangerous for Ukraine?

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Tobias Cremer (S&D), blue-card answer. ГўВҖВ“ Thank you. Yes, thank you very much. The first question, very briefly: I'm a diplomat by training, and I can tell you that diplomacy only works if you have strength. Diplomacy without strength is submission, is capitulation. So I think it's very clear that if we want peace, we have to support Ukraine to achieve peace, and that only works if we put Ukraine into a strong position. And to your second question, which is currently debated, I think it is very clear, in terms of international law, that it is possible. So it is for the countries that have delivered these weapons to decide whether they do that. It makes military sense and it is definitely possible in humanitarian law.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Jaak Madison (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ MadamГӮВ President, dear colleagues, I think we have been having this kind of debates in the last three years or so many times and the real fact is, of course, that it will not change a lot.

But when I'm hearing about the statements about peace, of course we all want to have peace, but the problem with the peace is that it always depends in which terms: the Russian terms or Ukrainian terms for the peace? When I'm looking on the news that the Germans and Americans are still afraid to give the permission to Ukrainians to attack also the military objects and the Russian soil, then we have a problem. The problem is that we are still afraid of the Russian threat and the message that then they will escalate the war. But what will be the escalation? Will it be the escalation of the war that the Baltics will be occupied, or half the Europe? Because they have a nuclear power, of course, but the nuclear power is also part of the military aspect for the British, for the French, for the Americans. The problem in the last three years has been that we are always afraid of the escalation. We need a peace, but we need peace in our terms, not Russian terms. Otherwise, we are just running for the next war in very, very near time.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Dan Barna (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ DoamnГ„Вғ preГҲВҷedintГ„Вғ, stimaГҲВӣi colegi, un lucru trebuie spus clar ГҲВҷi rГ„Вғspicat ГғВ®n contextul rГ„Вғzboiului din Ucraina: lupta ucrainenilor ГғВ®mpotriva unui dictator sГғВўngeros este ГғВ®n egalГ„Вғ mГ„ВғsurГ„Вғ ГҲВҷi lupta pentru libertatea Europei. Putin nu se va opri ГҲВҷi vecinii Rusiei din Europa de Est ГҲВҷtim asta foarte bine, pentru cГ„Вғ istoria are acest prost obicei cГ„Вғ se repetГ„Вғ. Acum, ГғВ®n Ucraina, soldaГҲВӣi curajoГҲВҷi apГ„ВғrГ„Вғ libertatea unui continent, dreptul de a decide pentru propriul viitor ГҲВҷi ГғВ®ntregul mod de viaГҲВӣГ„Вғ european, aГҲВҷa cum ГғВ®l cunoaГҲВҷtem. Solidaritatea cu Ucraina ГҲВҷi sprijinul militar, financiar ГҲВҷi umanitar reprezintГ„Вғ atГғВўt o responsabilitate de supravieГҲВӣuire, cГғВўt ГҲВҷi o datorie moralГ„Вғ ГҲВҷi nimeni ГҲВҷi nimic nu are voie sГ„Вғ submineze acest demers. DacГ„Вғ vorbim de solidaritate, spun foarte clar, guvernul lui Viktor OrbГғВЎn, deГҲВӣinГ„Вғtorul preГҲВҷedinГҲВӣiei rotative, saboteazГ„Вғ eforturile comune ale Europei ГҲВҷi este o ruГҲВҷine acest lucru. Viktor OrbГғВЎn, prin blocajele sale, este complicele lui Vladimir Putin ГҲВҷi asta trebuie sГ„Вғ ГғВ®nceteze.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Hannah Neumann (Verts/ALE). ГўВҖВ“ MadamГӮВ President, dear colleagues, we need to support Ukraine as long as it takes, but also as much as it takes so that this war doesn't drag on forever.

I was in Kyiv last week, and it was the words of a Ukrainian woman soldier that impressed me most. 'Time is different for us,' she said. 'Every hour that you debate sending weapons more of our friends die. Every day your sanctions are not fully implemented, Russia can build more missiles to kill us.'

I feel with every family losing a loved one, Ukrainian as well as Russians, yet the brutal truth is: if Putin stops fighting, this war is over. If Ukrainians stop fighting, Ukraine ends, and Putin won't stop there.

And it is Putin who refuses negotiations as of now. Russia's allies, such as Iran, do not put restrictions on how to use their missiles, and the only restrictions we should put on Ukraine on using missiles are those of international law, finally allowing them to attack missiles in Russia aiming at Ukrainians. Weapons, humanitarian aid, preparation for negotiations, supporting Ukrainian refugees. All of this needs to go hand in hand. As much as it takes.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Li Andersson (The Left). ГўВҖВ“ Arvoisa puhemies, Ukrainan tuessa on kyse siitГғВӨ, miten me reagoimme Putinin kaltaisten autoritaaristen johtajien ja VenГғВӨjГғВӨn kaltaisten suurvaltojen imperialistisiin valloituspyrkimyksiin ja kansainvГғВӨlisen oikeuden rГғВӨikeisiin loukkauksiin.

Tiukempien VenГғВӨjГғВӨГғВӨn kohdistuvien sanktioiden lisГғВӨksi meidГғВӨn tulee jatkaa Ukrainan tukemista niin taloudellisesti kuin aseellisesti. Aseavun lopettaminen ei suinkaan toisi rauhaa, vaan sen seurauksena VenГғВӨjГғВӨ valloittaisi Ukrainan. Se toisi siis meidГғВӨt kauemmaksi oikeudenmukaisesta rauhasta.

Oikeudenmukainen ja kestГғВӨvГғВӨ rauha Ukrainaan saadaan vain tukemalla ukrainalaisia niin taloudellisesti kuin aseellisesti heidГғВӨn puolustustaistelussaan sekГғВӨ saattamalla aikanaan myГғВ¶s sotarikoksiin syyllistyneet rikosoikeudelliseen vastuuseen.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Davor Ivo Stier (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ PoГ…ВЎtovana predsjedavajuГ„ВҮa, kolegice i kolege, agresivna politika Putinovog reГ…Вҫima ostaje najveГ„ВҮa prijetnja europskoj sigurnosti i zato je potrebno i na ovoj plenarnoj sjednici kontinuiranu potporu Ukrajinu iskazati u njezinoj borbi za slobodu.

Europa je do sada doprinijela s viГ…ВЎe od 100 milijardi EUR u financijskoj, humanitarnoj i vojnoj pomoГ„ВҮi Ukrajini, ali budimo svjesni da sada dajemo vojnu pomoГ„ВҮ Ukrajini za obranu od agresije a mogli smo joj prije, 2022., viГ…ВЎe pomoГ„ВҮi kako bi odvratila Putina od samog pokretanja rata. Vrijeme ne moГ…Вҫemo pomaknuti unatrag, ali moГ…Вҫemo danas Ukrajini dati ono Г…ВЎto je potrebno za obranu, za promjenu ratne dinamike i za otvaranje puta do pravednog i odrГ…Вҫivog mira.

Zato ovom rezolucijom traГ…Вҫimo od strane svih partnera Ukrajine trenutno ukidanje svih ograniГ„ВҚenja u pogledu koriГ…ВЎtenja oruГ…Вҫja za obranu Ukrajine, gaГ„В‘ajuГ„ВҮi i one legitimne vojne ciljeve na teritoriju agresora a sve u skladu s poveljom UN-a. U rezoluciji takoГ„В‘er obnavljamo naГ…ВЎu punu potporu teritorijalnoj cjelovitosti Ukrajine i to je potrebno ponoviti jer ovih dana ponovno sluГ…ВЎamo o idejama za mirovne pregovore kojima bi se Ukrajina trebala odreГ„ВҮi okupiranog teritorija. Razgovor o predaji ukrajinskog teritorija posluГ…Вҫio bi samo kao svojevrsna nagrada agresoru te bi se mogao smatrati samo pozivom za napade u buduГ„ВҮnosti.

I zato ovom rezolucijom joГ…ВЎ jednom Г…ВЎaljemo jasnu poruku da stojimo uz Ukrajinu, koliko god bude potrebno u njezinoj borbi za slobodu.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Javi LГғВіpez (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ SeГғВұora presidenta, el inicio de este mandato europeo nos sirve para recordar y reafirmar nuestro compromiso con Ucrania.

Recordar la guerra de agresiГғВіn que se estГғВЎ viviendo a las puertas de Europa con una gigantesca catГғВЎstrofe humanitaria y el desafГғВӯo sin precedentes que eso estГғВЎ significando para la seguridad y estabilidad europeas.

Y, para ello, reafirmar nuestro compromiso con la asistencia militar con Ucrania, que tiene que ir de la mano del refuerzo de las capacidades en materia de defensa y de seguridad de Europa. No porque escojamos entre asistencia militar y paz, sino porque sabemos que la asistencia militar es la precondiciГғВіn para la paz, una paz justa y duradera en Ucrania.

Y todo eso con una Europa unida que haga frente y use el instrumento financiero del Fondo Europeo de Apoyo a la Paz que hoy estГғВЎn bloqueando HungrГғВӯa y OrbГғВЎn, que continГғВәe con el proceso de adhesiГғВіn y que dГғВ© apoyo a los paГғВӯses que estГғВЎn acogiendo hoy a millones de refugiados ucranianos en suelo europeo.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ MichaГ…ВӮ Dworczyk (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Szanowna Pani PrzewodniczГ„В…ca! Szanowni PaГ…В„stwo! KoleГ…Вјanki i Koledzy! Dzisiejsza debata toczy siГ„Вҷ w dniu szczegГғВіlnym. Mianowicie w 85. rocznicГ„Вҷ ataku SowietГғВіw na RzeczpospolitГ„В… PolskГ„В…. Rosjanie zaatakowali, Г…ВӮamiГ„В…c traktat pokojowy, Г…ВӮamiГ„В…c traktat o nieagresji.

Dlaczego o tym przypominam? Dlatego, Г…Вјe mam wraГ…Вјenie, sГ…ВӮuchajГ„В…c dzisiejszej debaty na tej sali, Г…Вјe niektГғВіrzy albo nie wiedzГ„В…, albo zapomnieli, Г…Вјe Rosja byГ…ВӮa, jest i bГ„Вҷdzie paГ…В„stwem barbarzyГ…В„skim, wiaroГ…ВӮomnym, agresywnym, ktГғВіre rozumie wyГ…ВӮГ„В…cznie jГ„Вҷzyk siГ…ВӮy. Dlatego nasze dziaГ…ВӮania muszГ„В… byГ„ВҮ bardziej odwaГ…Вјne i konsekwentne niГ…Вј do tej pory.

Mija juГ…Вј 2,5 roku od rozpoczГ„Вҷcia przez RosjГ„Вҷ wojny przeciw Ukrainie, w czasie ktГғВіrej dziesiГ„В…tki tysiГ„Вҷcy ludzi straciГ…ВӮo Г…Вјycie, a miliony zostaГ…ВӮy zmuszone do opuszczenia domГғВіw. I choГ„ВҮ Unia Europejska nieustannie wyraГ…Вјa swojГ„В… solidarnoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ, to wciГ„В…Г…Вј jest bardzo duГ…Вјo firm, ktГғВіre eksportujГ„В… z Г…ВӮatwoГ…ВӣciГ„В… na teren Rosji materiaГ…ВӮy, na ktГғВіre naГ…ВӮoГ…Вјone sГ„В… sankcje.

Musimy zatrzymaГ„ВҮ ten skandaliczny proces. NiezbГ„Вҷdna jest wiГ„Вҷksza kontrola eksportu i identyfikacja szlakГғВіw przemytu omijajГ„В…cych wprowadzone na RosjГ„Вҷ sankcje, a nastГ„Вҷpnie ich bezwzglГ„Вҷdne wyeliminowanie. Potrzeba przy tym wspГғВіГ…ВӮpracy sГ…ВӮuГ…Вјb europejskich. NajwyГ…Вјszy czas skoГ…В„czyГ„ВҮ robienie krwawych interesГғВіw z RosjГ„В…. RzГ„В…dy krajГғВіw, ktГғВіrych firmy uczestniczГ„В… w tym procederze, muszГ„В… podjГ„В…Г„ВҮ realne dziaГ…ВӮania.

(MГғВіwca zgodziГ…ВӮ siГ„Вҷ na pytanie zasygnalizowane przez podniesienie niebieskiej kartki)

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Г„ВҪuboГ…ВЎ Blaha (NI), otГғВЎzka poloГ…ВҫenГғВЎ zdvihnutГғВӯm modrej karty. ГўВҖВ“ PГғВЎn kolega, hovorГғВӯte o Rusku ako o barbarskej krajine. Chcem sa spГғВҪtaГ…ВҘ, Г„ВҚi to nepovaГ…Вҫujte za prejav rasizmu, takto hodnotiГ…ВҘ celГғВҪ ruskГғВҪ nГғВЎrod?

A najmГғВӨ keГ„ВҸ hovorГғВӯte o paralele s druhou svetovou vojnou. Naposledy zГғВЎpadnГғВ© zbrane boli na ruskom ГғВәzemГғВӯ zo strany faГ…ВЎistov, nemeckГғВҪch faГ…ВЎistov a Г„ВҸalГ…ВЎГғВӯch zГғВЎpadnГғВҪch faГ…ВЎistov.

TГғВәto tradГғВӯciu chcete znova obhajovaГ…ВҘ? Ja mГғВЎm veГ„ВҫkГғВ© obavy, Г…Вҫe v tejto miestnosti je prГғВӯliГ…ВЎ veГ„Вҫa vojnovГғВҪch Г…ВЎtvГғВЎГ„ВҚov a prГғВӯliГ…ВЎ mГғВЎlo mierovГғВҪch Г„ВҫudГғВӯ.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ MichaГ…ВӮ Dworczyk (ECR), odpowiedГ…Вә na pytanie zadane przez podniesienie niebieskiej kartki. ГўВҖВ“ To, jak okreГ…Вӣlam RosjГ„Вҷ, jej wiaroГ…ВӮomnoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ i jej barbarzyГ…В„stwo, nie bierze siГ„Вҷ z rasizmu ani z Г…Вјadnych moich osobistych sympatii czy antypatii. Wystarczy przypomnieГ„ВҮ historiГ„Вҷ relacji polskoГўВҖВ“rosyjskich na przestrzeni ostatnich kilkuset lat, Г…Вјeby zrozumieГ„ВҮ, Г…Вјe to jedyne okreГ…Вӣlenie, a i tak bardzo Г…ВӮagodne w stosunku do Rosji i Rosjan.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Lucia Yar (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ VГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВЎ pani predsedajГғВәca, komisГғВЎr. V tejto chvГғВӯli potrebujeme posilniГ…ВҘ naГ…ВЎu podporu Ukrajine. A to finanГ„ВҚne aj vojensky. Ak brzdГғВӯme Ukrajinu v pouГ…ВҫГғВӯvanГғВӯ zbranГғВӯ a munГғВӯcie, zvyГ…ВЎujeme riziko Г„ВҸalГ…ВЎГғВӯch ГғВәtokov na ukrajinskГғВҪch civilistov. Ukrajina bojuje proti nГғВЎГ…ВЎmu spoloГ„ВҚnГғВ©mu nepriateГ„Вҫovi. A tГғВҪm je Vladimir Putin a jeho reГ…Вҫim. Aby to bolo jasnГғВ©.

Napriek tomu klesГғВЎ jej podpora v niektorГғВҪch Г…ВЎtГғВЎtoch vrГғВЎtane toho mГғВҙjho, Slovenska. Deje sa to preto, Г…Вҫe aj u nГғВЎs Rusko stГғВЎle podnikГғВЎ najrozliГ„ВҚnejГ…ВЎie vplyvovГғВ© a hybridnГғВ© operГғВЎcie, o Г„ВҚom musГғВӯ EurГғВіpska komisia eГ…ВЎte intenzГғВӯvnejГ…ВЎie a strategickejГ…ВЎie komunikovaГ…ВҘ.

Ale dГғВҙvodom je aj to, Г…Вҫe niektorГғВӯ politici sa netaja sympatiami k Rusku. UГ…Вҫ sme to dnes poГ„ВҚuli. Dokonca sГғВә voГ„ВҚi Putinovi poddajnГғВӯ.

No desaГ…ВҘtisГғВӯce SlovГғВЎkov a Sloveniek naprГғВӯklad sa nechcelo zmieriГ…ВҘ s tГғВҪm, Г…Вҫe ich vlГғВЎda odmieta pomГғВҙcГ…ВҘ vojnou zmietanГғВ©ho susedovi. A v priebehu niekoГ„ВҫkГғВҪch dnГғВӯ vyzbierali viac ako Г…ВЎtyri miliГғВіny eur na munГғВӯciu pre Ukrajinu. Nasledujme tento prГғВӯklad. Je to prГғВӯklad solidarity a rozhodnosti. A tГғВЎ je najvГғВӨГ„ВҚГ…ВЎou zbraГ…ВҲou. NaГ…ВЎou. Nie je Г„ВҚas na politikГғВЎrГ„ВҚenie, kolegovia a kolegyne. Je Г„ВҚas konaГ…ВҘ.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Ignazio Roberto Marino (Verts/ALE). ГўВҖВ“ Signora Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, non c'ГғВЁ dubbio su chi sia l'aggressore e chi l'aggredito, quindi ГғВЁ giusto il sostegno all'Ucraina.

Ma continuare a parlare solo di bombe, missili e cannoni non puГғВІ portare al cessate il fuoco. Serve immediatamente l'avvio di un negoziato di pace: se non avverrГғВ , sarГғВ  un disastro.

Chi guida l'Europa sta giocando alla roulette russa, come nel film Il cacciatore. Tra 48 giorni gli USA avranno un nuovo presidente. Cosa sta facendo l'Europa, oltre a sperare che non sia Trump? La speranza non ГғВЁ la migliore strategia.

Trump lo ha detto chiaramente al mondo sette giorni fa: se eletto, non aspetterГғВ  neanche l'insediamento. Il 6ГӮВ novembre chiamerГғВ  il suo amico Putin ГўВҖВ“ cosГғВ¬ l'ha definito, "amico" ГўВҖВ“ e la guerra, dice, finirГғВ  in una settimana.

L'Ucraina ГғВЁ in Europa e l'Europa dovrebbe essere l'attore principale per una soluzione di pace. Se in questi 48 giorni la Presidente e l'alto rappresentante non avvieranno un negoziato, condanneranno l'Ucraina a perdere i propri territori, condanneranno l'Ucraina a perdere molte piГғВ№ vite e condanneranno l'Europa a essere insignificante nel mondo.

Un inizio davvero fallimentare nel nuovo mandato di Ursula von der Leyen.

(L'oratore accetta di rispondere a una domanda "cartellino blu")

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ MaГ…ВӮgorzata Gosiewska (ECR), pytanie zadane przez podniesienie niebieskiej kartki. ГўВҖВ“ Panie PoГ…Вӣle! Negocjacje. Dyplomacja. Rozmowy. CiГ„В…gle to sГ…ВӮyszymy. Z kim pan chce rozmawiaГ„ВҮ? Z Putinem? Z mordercГ„В…? To wГ…ВӮaГ…Вӣnie takie postawy doprowadziГ…ВӮy do tej wojny. Porozumienia miГ…В„skie. PamiГ„Вҷta pan, kto siedziaГ…ВӮ przy stole przy porozumieniach miГ…В„skich? Zaproszono terrorystГғВіw z Doniecka i Г…ВҒugaГ…В„ska. A teraz chcecie zapraszaГ„ВҮ do stoГ…ВӮu najwiГ„Вҷkszego terrorystГ„Вҷ Г…Вӣwiata WГ…ВӮadimira Putina. Po co? Po to, by daГ„ВҮ mu czas, by przygotowaГ…ВӮ siГ„Вҷ do kolejnej agresji? By zaatakowaГ…ВӮ LitwГ„Вҷ, Г…ВҒotwГ„Вҷ, EstoniГ„Вҷ czy wreszcie mГғВіj kraj, PolskГ„Вҷ?

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Ignazio Roberto Marino (Verts/ALE), risposta a una domanda "cartellino blu". ГўВҖВ“ Non ho sentito la prima parte, ma ho capito il senso e la mia risposta ГғВЁ chiara.

Vede, onorevole, io credo ci siano solo due possibili soluzioni. Una ГғВЁ che tutto il mondo entri in guerra contro Putin, e questo significa che quest'Aula scomparirГғВ . L'altra ГғВЁ quella di come si sono risolti in milioni di anni i conflitti nell'umanitГғВ . Basta studiare la storia: ricorda un conflitto che non si sia poi risolto con un negoziato di pace? Io no.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ ГҺВ“ГҺВ№ГҸВҺГҸВҒГҺВіГҺВҝГҸВӮ ГҺВ“ГҺВөГҸВүГҸВҒГҺВіГҺВҜГҺВҝГҸВ… (The Left). ГўВҖВ“ ГҺВҡГҸВ…ГҸВҒГҺВҜГҺВұ ГҺВ ГҸВҒГҸВҢГҺВөГҺВҙГҸВҒГҺВө, ГҺВәГҸВҚГҸВҒГҺВ№ГҺВө ГҺВ•ГҸВҖГҺВҜГҸВ„ГҸВҒГҺВҝГҸВҖГҺВө, ГҺВұГҸВӮ ГҺВјГҺВ№ГҺВ»ГҺВ®ГҸВғГҺВҝГҸВ…ГҺВјГҺВө ГҺВөГҺВ№ГҺВ»ГҺВ№ГҺВәГҸВҒГҺВ№ГҺВҪГҺВ¬. ГҺВЈГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВҹГҸВ…ГҺВәГҸВҒГҺВұГҺВҪГҺВҜГҺВұ ГҺВҙГҺВөГҺВҪ ГҸВҖГҺВҝГҺВ»ГҺВөГҺВјГҺВ¬ ГҺВјГҸВҢГҺВҪГҺВҝГҺВҪ ГҺВҝ Zelenskyy ГҺВөГҺВҪГҺВұГҺВҪГҸВ„ГҺВҜГҺВҝГҺВҪ ГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҸВ… Putin. ГҺВЈГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВҹГҸВ…ГҺВәГҸВҒГҺВұГҺВҪГҺВҜГҺВұ ГҸВҖГҺВҝГҺВ»ГҺВөГҺВјГҺВ¬ ГҸВ„ГҺВҝ ГҺВқГҺВ‘ГҺВӨГҺВҹ ГҺВјГҺВұГҺВ¶ГҺВҜ ГҺВјГҺВө ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВ•ГҸВ…ГҸВҒГҸВүГҸВҖГҺВұГҸВҠГҺВәГҺВ® ГҺВҲГҺВҪГҸВүГҸВғГҺВ· ГҺВәГҺВұГҸВ„ГҺВ¬ ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҸВӮ ГҺВЎГҸВүГҸВғГҺВҜГҺВұГҸВӮ. ГҺВҡГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҺВјГҺВ· ГҺВјГҺВұГҸВӮ ГҸВҖГҺВөГҺВҜГҸВ„ГҺВө ГҸВҢГҸВ„ГҺВ№ ГҺВөГҺВҜГҺВјГҺВұГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВө ГҸВ…ГҸВҖГҺВӯГҸВҒ ГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҸВ… Putin ГҸВ„ГҸВҺГҸВҒГҺВұ ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҺВҪГҺВұ ГҺВҫГҺВөГҺВјГҸВҖГҺВөГҸВҒГҺВҙГҺВӯГҸВҲГҺВөГҸВ„ГҺВө, ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұГҸВ„ГҺВҜ ГҺВҙГҺВөГҺВҪ ГҺВөГҺВҜГҺВјГҺВұГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВө. ГҺВ‘ГҸВ…ГҸВ„ГҺВ® ГҺВөГҺВҜГҺВҪГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҺВ· ГҺВұГҺВ»ГҺВ®ГҺВёГҺВөГҺВ№ГҺВұ. ГҺВ•ГҺВјГҺВөГҺВҜГҸВӮ ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВөГҺВ№ГҸВҒГҺВ®ГҺВҪГҺВ· ГҸВ…ГҸВҖГҺВөГҸВҒГҺВұГҸВғГҸВҖГҺВ№ГҺВ¶ГҸВҢГҺВјГҺВұГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВө.

ГҺВҳГҺВұ ГҸВҖГҸВҒГҺВӯГҸВҖГҺВөГҺВ№ ГҸВҢГҺВјГҸВүГҸВӮ ГҺВҪГҺВұ ГҸВҖГҺВөГҺВҜГҸВ„ГҺВө ГҺВәГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҺВөГҸВғГҺВөГҺВҜГҸВӮ ГҸВ„ГҺВ· ГҺВҙГҺВ№ГҺВәГҺВ® ГҸВғГҺВұГҸВӮ ГҺВұГҺВ»ГҺВ®ГҺВёГҺВөГҺВ№ГҺВұ. ГҺВҢГҸВ„ГҺВ№ ГҺВҙГҺВөГҺВҪ ГҺВҪГҺВҝГҺВ№ГҺВ¬ГҺВ¶ГҺВөГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВө ГҺВәГҺВұГҺВёГҸВҢГҺВ»ГҺВҝГҸВ… ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҸВ…ГҸВӮ ГҸВҮГҺВ№ГҺВ»ГҺВ№ГҺВ¬ГҺВҙГҺВөГҸВӮ ГҺВҪГҺВӯГҺВҝГҸВ…ГҸВӮ ГҺВҹГҸВ…ГҺВәГҸВҒГҺВұГҺВҪГҺВҝГҸВҚГҸВӮ ГҺВәГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҺВЎГҸВҺГҸВғГҺВҝГҸВ…ГҸВӮ ГҸВҖГҺВҝГҸВ… ГҺВұГҺВ»ГҺВӯГҺВёГҺВҝГҺВҪГҸВ„ГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҺВұГҸВҖГҸВҢ ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҸВҖГҺВҝГҺВ»ГҺВөГҺВјГҺВ№ГҺВәГҺВ® ГҺВәГҸВҒГҺВөГҺВұГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҺВјГҺВ·ГҸВҮГҺВұГҺВҪГҺВ® ГҸВғГҺВө ГҺВӯГҺВҪГҺВұГҺВҪ ГҸВҖГҸВҢГҺВ»ГҺВөГҺВјГҺВҝ ГҺВҝ ГҺВҝГҸВҖГҺВҝГҺВҜГҺВҝГҸВӮ ГҺВіГҺВҜГҺВҪГҺВөГҸВ„ГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҸВ„ГҺВұ ГҺВҝГҸВҒГҸВ…ГҺВәГҸВ„ГҺВ¬ ГҺВәГҺВұГҸВҚГҸВғГҺВ№ГҺВјГҺВұ, ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВөГҺВҪГҺВӯГҸВҒГҺВіГҺВөГҺВ№ГҺВұ, ГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҸВ…ГҸВӮ ГҺВұГҺВіГҸВүГҺВіГҺВҝГҸВҚГҸВӮ ГҺВәГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВөГҺВҫГҸВ…ГҸВҖГҺВ·ГҸВҒГҺВӯГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҸВғГҺВ· ГҸВ„ГҸВүГҺВҪ ГҺВ№ГҺВјГҸВҖГҺВөГҸВҒГҺВ№ГҺВұГҺВ»ГҺВ№ГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВ№ГҺВәГҸВҺГҺВҪ ГҺВіГҺВөГҸВүГҸВҖГҺВҝГҺВ»ГҺВ№ГҸВ„ГҺВ№ГҺВәГҸВҺГҺВҪ ГҺВұГҺВҪГҸВ„ГҺВұГҺВіГҸВүГҺВҪГҺВ№ГҸВғГҺВјГҸВҺГҺВҪ. ГҺВүГҺВҙГҺВ· ГҺВјГҺВұГҸВӮ ГҸВҖГҸВҒГҺВҝГҺВөГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҺВ№ГҺВјГҺВ¬ГҺВ¶ГҺВөГҸВ„ГҺВө ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҸВҖГҸВҢГҺВ»ГҺВөГҺВјГҺВҝ. ГҺВӨГҺВҝ ГҺВөГҺВҜГҸВҖГҺВө ГҺВҝ DraghiГӮВ· 500 ГҺВҙГҺВ№ГҸВғГҺВөГҺВәГҺВұГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҺВјГҺВјГҸВҚГҸВҒГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҺВөГҸВ…ГҸВҒГҸВҺ ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВұГҺВјГҸВ…ГҺВҪГҸВ„ГҺВ№ГҺВәГҺВ® ГҺВІГҺВ№ГҺВҝГҺВјГҺВ·ГҸВҮГҺВұГҺВҪГҺВҜГҺВұ ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҸВ„ГҺВұ ГҺВөГҸВҖГҸВҢГҺВјГҺВөГҺВҪГҺВұ ГҺВҙГҺВӯГҺВәГҺВұ ГҸВҮГҸВҒГҸВҢГҺВҪГҺВ№ГҺВұ. ГҺВ”ГҺВ·ГҺВ»ГҺВұГҺВҙГҺВ® ГҺВҙГҺВ·ГҺВјГҸВҢГҸВғГҺВ№ГҺВҝ ГҸВҮГҸВҒГҺВ®ГҺВјГҺВұ ГҺВіГҺВ№ГҺВұ ГҺВҪГҺВұ ГҺВәГҺВөГҸВҒГҺВҙГҺВҝГҸВғГҺВәГҺВҝГҸВҖГҺВҝГҸВҚГҺВҪ ГҺВҝГҺВ№ ГҸВҖГҺВҝГҺВ»ГҺВөГҺВјГҺВ№ГҺВәГҺВӯГҸВӮ ГҺВІГҺВ№ГҺВҝГҺВјГҺВ·ГҸВҮГҺВұГҺВҪГҺВҜГҺВөГҸВӮ. ГҺВҲГҸВ„ГҸВғГҺВ№ ГҺВёГҺВұ ГҺВҙГҺВ№ГҺВұГҺВ»ГҸВҚГҸВғГҺВөГҸВ„ГҺВө ГҸВ„ГҺВҝ ГҺВәГҸВҒГҺВ¬ГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҸВӮ ГҸВҖГҸВҒГҸВҢГҺВҪГҺВҝГҺВ№ГҺВұГҸВӮ, ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҸВ…ГҺВіГҺВөГҺВҜГҺВұ ГҺВәГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҸВҖГҺВұГҺВ№ГҺВҙГҺВөГҺВҜГҺВұ ГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВ•ГҸВ…ГҸВҒГҸВҺГҸВҖГҺВ·. ГҺВҡГҺВұГҺВ№ ГўВҖВ”ГҺВ»ГҺВӯГҸВүГўВҖВ” ГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВұГҺВјГҺВұГҸВ„ГҺВ®ГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВө ГҺВөГҸВҖГҺВ№ГҸВ„ГҺВӯГҺВ»ГҺВҝГҸВ…ГҸВӮ ГҺВҪГҺВұ ГҸВғГҸВ„ГҺВӯГҺВ»ГҺВҪГҺВөГҸВ„ГҺВө ГҸВҢГҸВҖГҺВ»ГҺВұ. ГҺВ— ГҺВҹГҸВ…ГҺВәГҸВҒГҺВұГҺВҪГҺВҜГҺВұ ГҺВәГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҺВ· ГҺВ•ГҸВ…ГҸВҒГҸВҺГҸВҖГҺВ· ГҸВҮГҸВҒГҺВөГҺВ№ГҺВ¬ГҺВ¶ГҺВҝГҺВҪГҸВ„ГҺВұГҺВ№ ГҸВ„ГҺВ·ГҺВҪ ГҺВөГҺВ№ГҸВҒГҺВ®ГҺВҪГҺВ·, ГҸВҢГҸВҮГҺВ№ ГҸВ„ГҺВҝГҺВҪ ГҸВҖГҸВҢГҺВ»ГҺВөГҺВјГҺВҝ.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ OndГ…Вҷej KolГғВЎГ…Вҷ (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ MadamГӮВ President, ladies and gentlemen, dear colleagues, I'm very grateful for all the help we've been delivering to Ukraine since February 2022. I've been to Ukraine three times myself since that time, to Khmelnytskyi, to Kyiv, to Kharkiv. I've seen the amount of destruction. I've seen the fates of the people. And it's horrible, in one word.

However, although we are sending large amounts of help, we tend to draw red lines to ourselves, and we tend to play by Vladimir Putin's rules, and that is something we need to stop. We need to stop drawing these red lines to ourselves and stop pretending that talking about peace is something forbidden. We must lift absurd restrictions that we've imposed on ourselves and the Ukrainians as well. We must let the Ukrainians shoot with whatever they need, whenever they need and wherever they need. They need our weapons for defence, not for parades.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Thijs Reuten (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ Dear colleagues, dear Commissioner, we know what we have to do, but we're not doing it. And that's strange, because this is about defending Ukraine and about our own security and values.

When Ukraine asked for tanks, we knew we had to give them. We were going to give them, but we waited. We discussed. And with the ATACMS, the same.

And today we know, we must, we will allow Ukraine to strike back against the positions in Russia from where it's being attacked. But we decide to discuss a bit longer.

We know what we have to do, but we are not doing it. Too many Member State governments are too busy with national political power games instead of trying to build and enhance the support ГўВҖВ“ first to make sure Ukraine will be free in its entirety, and second because it's in our own interest. Our security and the vision of Europe for over 70ГӮВ years is at risk.

Let Ukraine strike back, and force the sanctions and go after Russia's allies. Give Ukraine what it needs to win. Slava Ukraini!

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Arkadiusz Mularczyk (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Pani PrzewodniczГ„В…ca! Panie Komisarzu! KoleГ…Вјanki i Koledzy.! Dzisiejszy dzieГ…В„ jest dniem szczegГғВіlnym dla Polski i PolakГғВіw. 17 wrzeГ…Вӣnia 1939 roku, 85 lat temu, ZwiГ„В…zek Sowiecki napadГ…ВӮ na RzeczpospolitГ„В…. DoszГ…ВӮo do rozbioru Rzeczpospolitej, ponad 300 tysiГ„Вҷcy PolakГғВіw, w tym takГ…Вјe moja rodzina zostaГ…ВӮa deportowana na SyberiГ„Вҷ. Zostali tam juГ…Вј na wieki. Setki tysiГ„Вҷcy PolakГғВіw zostaГ…ВӮo uwiГ„Вҷzionych, wielu trafiГ…ВӮo do niewoli. DoszГ…ВӮo teГ…Вј do zbrodni katyГ…В„skiej, gdzie ponad 20 tysiГ„Вҷcy polskich oficerГғВіw zostaГ…ВӮo zamordowanych.

Dlatego teГ…Вј Polska jest tak wraГ…Вјliwa na to, co dzieje siГ„Вҷ na Ukrainie, dlatego Г…Вјe pamiГ„Вҷtamy to, co zrobiГ…ВӮ ZwiГ„В…zek Sowiecki i dzisiaj robi Putin na Ukrainie. Dlatego nie moГ…Вјemy pozwoliГ„ВҮ, Г…Вјeby Ukraina zostaГ…ВӮa sama, tak jak Polska zostaГ…ВӮa sama w 1939 roku. Musimy wspieraГ„ВҮ UkrainГ„Вҷ. Dlatego teГ…Вј Polska wspieraГ…ВӮa od samego poczГ„В…tku UkrainГ„Вҷ w sensie wojskowym, humanitarnym, przyjГ„ВҷliГ…Вӣmy miliony ukraiГ…В„skich uchodГ…ВәcГғВіw.

Dlatego teГ…Вј, drodzy PaГ…В„stwo, dzisiaj, gdy mГғВіwimy o rozmowach pokojowych, musimy pamiГ„ВҷtaГ„ВҮ, Г…Вјe Rosja musi oddaГ„ВҮ zajГ„Вҷte terytorium Ukrainy, 20% zajГ„Вҷtego terytorium Ukrainy. Zbrodniarze wojenni muszГ„В… zostaГ„ВҮ ukarani. Putin musi stanГ„В…Г„ВҮ przed sГ„В…dem miГ„Вҷdzynarodowym, a wszyscy, ktГғВіrzy dopuГ…Вӣcili siГ„Вҷ zbrodni, powinni ponieГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ karГ„Вҷ.

I na koniec, drodzy PaГ…В„stwo, Rosja musi zapГ…ВӮaciГ„ВҮ reparacje wojenne Ukrainie.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ MichaГ…ВӮ Kobosko (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ Szanowna Pani PrzewodniczГ„В…ca! Szanowni Koledzy! DziГ…Вӣ myГ…Вӣlami jesteГ…Вӣmy z ofiarami tragicznej powodzi, ktГғВіra nawiedziГ…ВӮa PolskГ„Вҷ i EuropГ„Вҷ Г…ВҡrodkowГ„В…. MyГ…Вӣlimy o tym, jak pomГғВіc ofiarom powodzi. BГ„Вҷdziemy jutro tutaj o tym debatowaГ„ВҮ. Ale dziГ…Вӣ teГ…Вј, jak zaznaczyГ…ВӮ mГғВіj kolega, nie sposГғВіb nie wspomnieГ„ВҮ o przypadajГ„В…cej wГ…ВӮaГ…Вӣnie dzisiaj 85. rocznicy napaГ…Вӣci sowieckiej Rosji na PolskГ„Вҷ.

17 wrzeГ…Вӣnia 1939 roku Polacy stanГ„Вҷli w obliczu brutalnej agresji sowieckiej, ktГғВіra przyniosГ…ВӮa Г…ВӣmierГ„ВҮ i cierpienie setek tysiГ„Вҷcy ludzi. Teraz widzimy, Г…Вјe agresywna i mocarstwowa polityka Rosji, nastГ„Вҷpczyni ZwiГ„В…zku Sowieckiego, trwa i musimy siГ„Вҷ jej przeciwstawiГ„ВҮ jako caГ…ВӮa Europa. Tylko wtedy mamy szansГ„Вҷ jГ„В… zatrzymaГ„ВҮ.

Koledzy! Ukraina stoi na linii frontu nie tylko w obronie swojej ziemi, ale takГ…Вјe w obronie wartoГ…Вӣci, ktГғВіre sГ„В… fundamentem naszej wspГғВіlnej cywilizacji, demokracji, praw czГ…ВӮowieka i prawa miГ„Вҷdzynarodowego. Europa i caГ…ВӮy Г…Вӣwiat nie mogГ„В… pozostawiГ„ВҮ jej samej. KaГ…Вјda inwestycja w obronnoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ Ukrainy jest kluczowa dla naszego wspГғВіlnego kontynentu. DziaГ…ВӮajmy razem. DziaГ…ВӮajmy teraz, natychmiast, dla wspГғВіlnego bezpieczeГ…В„stwa.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ MarkГғВ©ta GregorovГғВЎ (Verts/ALE). ГўВҖВ“ PanГғВӯ pГ…ВҷedsedajГғВӯcГғВӯ, vГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВ© kolegynГ„Вӣ, vГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВӯ kolegovГғВ©, jsem opravdu rГғВЎda, Г…Вҫe se nГғВЎГ…ВЎ kolega Andrius Kubilius z Litvy stal komisaГ…Вҷem pro obranu, a to proto, Г…Вҫe ostatnГғВӯ zemГ„Вӣ, co se tГғВҪГ„ВҚe naГ…ВЎГғВӯ spoleГ„ВҚnГғВ© obrany, k tomu rozhodnГ„Вӣ nikdy nepГ…Вҷistupovaly tak zodpovГ„ВӣdnГ„Вӣ. NГ„Вӣmecko sice stabilnГ„Вӣ smlouvГғВЎ o kaГ…ВҫdГғВ©m jednom systГғВ©mu protivzduГ…ВЎnГғВ© obrany, zato nesmlouvavГ„Вӣ snГғВӯГ…ВҫГғВӯ UkrajinГ„Вӣ finanГ„ВҚnГғВӯ podporu. Francie i dalГ…ВЎГғВӯ zemГ„Вӣ vГғВЎhajГғВӯ, jestli nezaГ„ВҚГғВӯt koneГ„ВҚnГ„Вӣ ctГғВӯt mezinГғВЎrodnГғВӯ prГғВЎvo a umoГ…Вҫnit UkrajinГ„Вӣ pouГ…ВҫГғВӯvat zbranГ„Вӣ i na vojenskГғВ© cГғВӯle na ruskГғВ©m ГғВәzemГғВӯ. Ty pГ…ВҷekroГ„ВҚenГғВ© Г„ВҚervenГғВ© linie u Kursku nГғВЎs ale pГ…Вҷece tolik bolely ГўВҖВ“ coГ…Вҫ je sarkasmus. Г„ВҢesko a Г„ВҚГғВЎst vГғВҪchodnГғВӯ Evropy zase odebГғВӯrГғВЎ stГғВЎle vГ„ВӣtГ…ВЎinu ropy z Ruska a ГғВәspГ„ВӣГ…ВЎnГ„Вӣ tak posГғВӯlГғВЎ Rusku vГғВӯce penГ„Вӣz, neГ…Вҫ posГғВӯlГғВЎ UkrajinГ„Вӣ. No a vГ…ВЎechny zemГ„Вӣ majГғВӯ problГғВ©m s vymГғВЎhГғВЎnГғВӯm sankcГғВӯ a vГғВҪjimky firmГғВЎm se rozГ…ВЎiГ…ВҷujГғВӯ, ne sniГ…ВҫujГғВӯ. JГғВЎ doufГғВЎm, Г…Вҫe Andrius Kubilius bude naГ…ВЎi spoleГ„ВҚnou obranu vГғВ©st navzdory tomuto a navzdory tГ„Вӣmto stГғВЎtГ…ВҜm a neinspiruje se zbabГ„ВӣlГғВҪm politiky a Г…Вҫe i nГғВЎs zde bude dost tГ„Вӣch, kteГ…ВҷГғВӯ v sobГ„Вӣ najdou odvahu bojovat i teГ„ВҸ.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Francisco JosГғВ© MillГғВЎn Mon (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ SeГғВұora presidenta, reitero lo que he venido diciendo en los ГғВәltimos dosГӮВ aГғВұos en esta casa: tenemos que incrementar nuestra ayuda militar a Ucrania en su respuesta legГғВӯtima frente a la agresiГғВіn rusa.

Estamos en una guerra en la que existe una gran diferencia entre Ucrania y Rusia en lo que se refiere a medios humanos y a recursos materiales. AdemГғВЎs, el rГғВ©gimen de Putin no conoce lГғВӯmites ni restricciones: golpea todo el territorio de Ucrania de forma indiscriminada, ataca infraestructuras de energГғВӯa, fГғВЎbricas ucranianas, incluso centros de salud, sin importarle los daГғВұos a la poblaciГғВіn civil. Por el contrario, Ucrania utiliza medios limitados y ataca objetivos militares con reglas muy restrictivas que le impiden, por ejemplo, alcanzar objetivos militares legГғВӯtimos en territorio ruso, como bases aГғВ©reas y bases de lanzamiento de misiles.

ConfГғВӯo en que este desequilibrio se pueda corregir, como solicitГғВЎbamos ya en la ResoluciГғВіn aprobada por una amplia mayorГғВӯa, el pasado mes de julio.

SeГғВұorГғВӯas, pese a la audaz intervenciГғВіn en Kursk, la situaciГғВіn en el DombГғВЎs del EjГғВ©rcito ucraniano es muy precaria y las tropas rusas prosiguen su avance. La UniГғВіn Europea y los Estados miembros tienen que seguir ayudando militarmente a Ucrania; en particular, tenemos que acelerar la producciГғВіn de municiones. Parafraseando al alto representante, el seГғВұor Borrell, se trata de mГғВЎs municiГғВіn y de mГғВЎs rapidez.

Por ГғВәltimo, la evasiГғВіn de las sanciones continГғВәa siendo un asunto preocupante. Tenemos que reforzar nuestros medios para vigilar el cumplimiento de las sanciones en los propios Estados miembros y seguir ejerciendo presiГғВіn sobre los terceros Estados para que dejen de ayudar a Rusia a eludir las sanciones.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Evin Incir (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ MadamГӮВ President, colleagues, despite previous dialogue efforts, Putin continues to systematically violate international law and the sovereignty and territorial integrity of Ukraine, which has every right to defend itself.

We must support Ukraine as much and as quickly as possible. Just last Sunday, I returned from Kyiv and the message from Kyiv was clear: EU Member States and other actors should lift or ease weapon restrictions and provide long-range systems to help Ukraine defend itself against aggression and brutal attacks on the civilian population.

It is absolutely unreasonable that Ukraine is not allowed to fully defend itself from aggression. Missile and drone attacks are being launched from neighbouring locations on the Russian side of the border. The consequences of these serious attacks is the death of Ukrainian civilians, including women and children. The sound of air raid sirens has become a daily reality in Ukraine, as I experienced first-hand during a night with over 70 drone attacks.

Finally, I would also like to welcome President Zelenskyy's upcoming roadmap to end this war.

Colleagues, let's continue supporting Ukraine. Let's continue supporting international law.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Sebastian Tynkkynen (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Madam President, since the last time we discussed supporting Ukraine here in July, no major EU developments for ensuring UkraineГўВҖВҷs victory have taken place.ГӮВ It is quite bizarre that however later today we will be debating a plan that seeks to spend hundreds of billions of euros every year for things like decarbonisation.

Actually, this is great news. It shows that if the European countries so choose, they already have the resources needed to help Ukraine to defeat Russia.

In addition, not everything is about money. Last week, as a group of MEPs, we sent a letter to High Representative Borrell to increase pressure for allowing Ukraine to hit targets on Russian soil with Western weapons.ГӮВ Restricting UkraineГўВҖВҷs ability to hit strategically important targets is like forcing them to fight with one hand tied behind their backs.

Russia is not pulling its punches. So we should not be telling Ukraine to do so either.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Marcin KierwiГ…В„ski (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Pani PrzewodniczГ„В…ca! Ukraina od ponad 900 dni stawia bohaterski opГғВіr barbarzyГ…В„skiej agresji rosyjskiej. DziГ…Вӣ pytanie nie powinno brzmieГ„ВҮ: czy dalej wspieraГ„ВҮ UkrainГ„Вҷ? Tylko pytanie powinno brzmieГ„ВҮ: jak mocniej wspieraГ„ВҮ UkrainГ„Вҷ? Dalsze wsparcie Ukrainy to inwestycja w nasze wspГғВіlne bezpieczeГ…В„stwo. I przede wszystkim to moralny obowiГ„В…zek kaГ…Вјdego przyzwoitego czГ…ВӮowieka.

DziГ…Вӣ Ukraina jest ostatniГ„В… barykadГ„В…, ktГғВіra stoi na drodze rosyjskiego imperializmu, i musimy zrobiГ„ВҮ wszystko, aby ta barykada trwaГ…ВӮa i aby ta barykada zatrzymaГ…ВӮa pochГғВіd tego imperializmu. DziГ…Вӣ nie ma nawet cienia przesady w powiedzeniu tego, Г…Вјe Ukraina walczy o nasze wspГғВіlne wartoГ…Вӣci, Г…Вјe Ukraina walczy o cywilizowany Г…Вӣwiat, Г…Вјe Ukraina walczy o EuropГ„Вҷ, o zjednoczonГ„В… EuropГ„Вҷ. GdybyГ…Вӣmy nie wspierali Ukrainy, to byГ…ВӮby wielki bГ…ВӮГ„В…d, wielki bГ…ВӮГ„В…d, za ktГғВіry w przyszГ…ВӮoГ…Вӣci zapГ…ВӮacilibyГ…Вӣmy krwiГ„В… PolakГғВіw, LitwinГғВіw, NiemcГғВіw i FrancuzГғВіw.

Wsparcie Ukrainy to takГ…Вјe moralny obowiГ„В…zek, bo kaГ…Вјdy przyzwoity czГ…ВӮowiek musi powiedzieГ„ВҮ ГўВҖВһnieГўВҖВқ, jeГ…Вјeli bombardowane sГ„В… szpitale onkologiczne dla maГ…ВӮych dzieci, bo kaГ…Вјdy przyzwoity czГ…ВӮowiek musi powiedzieГ„ВҮ ГўВҖВһnieГўВҖВқ, gdy mordowane sГ„В… kobiety i dzieci. DziГ…Вӣ musimy stanГ„В…Г„ВҮ po stronie ofiar. DziГ…Вӣ musimy stanГ„В…Г„ВҮ po stronie przyjaciГғВіГ…ВӮ. DziГ…Вӣ musimy stanГ„В…Г„ВҮ po stronie przyszГ…ВӮego czГ…ВӮonka zjednoczonej Europy. Dlatego Ukraina potrzebuje naszego wsparcia. DziГ…Вӣ musimy powiedzieГ„ВҮ bardzo twardo: wiГ„Вҷcej wsparcia dla Ukrainy.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Vasile DГғВ®ncu (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ Domnule preГҲВҷedinte, domnule vicepreГҲВҷedinte, domnule comisar, este un lucru bun continuitatea, faptul cГ„Вғ ГҲВҷi vechiul Parlament, ГҲВҷi noul Parlament European, ГҲВҷi vechea Comisie, ГҲВҷi noua Comisie vor susГҲВӣine Ucraina. Poate cГ„Вғ am pierdut ГғВ®ntr-adevГ„Вғr la competitivitate, aГҲВҷa cum ne spune raportul Draghi, dar nu avem voie sГ„Вғ ne pierdem valorile ГҲВҷi pentru modelul social european, solidaritatea este cea mai importantГ„Вғ valoare. RomГғВўnia a fost ГҲВҷi rГ„ВғmГғВўne unul din cei mai importanГҲВӣi contribuitori la sprijinirea Ucrainei sau, cum spunea domnul Gahler, ca sГ„Вғ folosesc o expresie a dГғВўnsului, am livrat mai mult decГғВўt am declarat.

Dar nu numai de arme are nevoie Ucraina. Ucraina are nevoie ГҲВҷi de energie electricГ„Вғ. Vine iarna ГҲВҷi ruГҲВҷii vor bombarda cu precГ„Вғdere infrastructura electricГ„Вғ. Domnule comisar, a crescut ГғВ®n Europa de Est de trei ori preГҲВӣul energiei, pentru cГ„Вғ nu funcГҲВӣioneazГ„Вғ foarte bine piaГҲВӣa unificatГ„Вғ de energie electricГ„Вғ. Sudul ГҲВҷi estul Europei sunt rupte de vestul Europei. De aceea, pentru a sprijini ГҲВҷi Moldova, ГҲВҷi Ucraina ГғВ®n aceastГ„Вғ iarnГ„Вғ este nevoie de a sprijini RomГғВўnia, Bulgaria ГҲВҷi Grecia, care au depus sau vor depune o iniГҲВӣiativГ„Вғ la Comisia EuropeanГ„Вғ ГғВ®n ceea ce priveГҲВҷte compensarea preГҲВӣului la energie electricГ„Вғ.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Alice Teodorescu MГғВҘwe (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Fru talman! Om vi skulle leka med tanken att vi, tack vare Ukrainas uthГғВҘlliga fГғВ¶rsvar av sitt land och dГғВӨrmed av Europa, ГғВӨnnu befinner oss i 1938 ГғВҘrs scenario, vad behГғВ¶ver vi och vГғВҘra allierade gГғВ¶ra fГғВ¶r att hindra att vi fГғВ¶rflyttas till 1939? Har vi verkligen insett konsekvensen fГғВ¶r det ukrainska folket, fГғВ¶r varje litet land i den ryska bjГғВ¶rnens nГғВӨrhet, fГғВ¶r den sГғВӨkerhetsordning som gГғВӨllt sedan andra vГғВӨrldskriget, om Ukraina inte ges mГғВ¶jlighet att vinna kriget?

I dagarna blev det kГғВӨnt att Putin fГғВ¶r tredje gГғВҘngen ГғВ¶nskar expandera armГғВ©n med ytterligare 180 000 personer. Vi gГғВҘr mot ГғВӨnnu en vinter i ett krig som vi alla sГғВӨger oss vilja att Ukraina ska vinna, samtidigt som en del lГғВӨnder med sina restriktioner i praktiken tvingar ukrainarna att kГғВӨmpa med ena armen bakbunden. Jag tror inte att alla, inte ens i denna fГғВ¶rsamling, verkligen insett att det pris som ukrainarna betalar fГғВ¶r att ГғВҘterfГғВҘ sin frihet och sГғВӨkerhet ocksГғВҘ kan komma att behГғВ¶va betalas av oss. Hur fГғВ¶rberedda ГғВӨr vi pГғВҘ det egentligen?

Vi behГғВ¶ver var och en och pГғВҘ alla nivГғВҘer frГғВҘga oss om Ryssland fortsГғВӨtter sitt krig in i Europa, vГғВӨl medvetna om att vi aldrig kommer att anvГғВӨnda Natos fulla styrka fГғВ¶rst, vilket i sig ГғВӨr en signal som knappast verkar avskrГғВӨckande. Vad behГғВ¶ver vi under kommande fem ГғВҘr ha byggt upp fГғВ¶r att fГғВҘ kapacitet fГғВ¶r att kunna bemГғВ¶ta en sГғВҘdan aggression?

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Niels Fuglsang (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ MadamГӮВ President, dear colleagues, dear Commissioner, for over two years, our courageous Ukrainian brothers and sisters have been fighting an existential war against a tyrant, Russia.

No doubt that we are doing the right thing in the European Union by supporting our brothers and sisters, and we need to do whatever we can. But despite the good intentions, we are not doing nearly enough. Our approach must fundamentally change.

We need to shift our perspective from talking about how Ukraine should not lose the war to actually talking about how Ukraine can win the war. We must recognise that academic debates and theoretical discussions are doing little to aid the thousands of Ukrainians who are fighting and dying for their country. We need to scale up our support and, frankly, some Member States also need to increase the military spending and help to Ukraine.

Furthermore, I urge Member States and NATO allies to shift to make sure that the restrictions do not apply to Ukraine when we talk about how they can use our weapons. How can we expect Ukraine to defend itself from missiles launched from positions they are forbidden to strike back at? Let's do this. Let's give a full scale support to Ukraine.

Slava Ukraini!

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Mika Aaltola (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Madam President, dear colleagues, it is wishful thinking that limiting Ukraine's options and targeting sites in Russia might open a road for peace. Even today, there seems to be a feeling that if Russia is treated measuredly and carefully, its extremism would die down, akin to 1930s appeasement thinking.

It is tempting to bury one's head in the sand and forget that ultimately Russia is waging a war against the EU and NATO. Putin will launch his next war once Ukraine is dealt with. It is not a question of 'if'; it is a question of 'when'. Preparations for this should have taken place yesterday. This is the existential question for our Europe.

Ukrainians, with the most knowledge, should wage their war as they see fit, with our full support and unrestrained use of weapons provided to them. This is important. Putin's Russian roulette with nuclear threats should not stop us fromГӮВ charting a firm course.ГӮВ By giving in to Putin, we would only encourage him to continue using nuclear threats and weaken our deterrence.

I urge us all to lift the restrictions on Ukraine's use of Western-supplied weapons. This is the course for a peaceful Europe ГўВҖВ“ peace for all of us.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Vilija BlinkeviГ„ВҚiГ…В«tГ„В— (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ Gerbiama Pirmininke, komisare, kolegos, Europos saugumas priklauso nuo to, ar sugebГ„В—sime padГ„В—ti Ukrainai iГ…ВЎsaugoti jos laisvГ„Вҷ ir suverenitetГ„В…. Netrukus bus trys nuoГ…Вҫmaus karo metai ir panaГ…ВЎu, jog Putinas trauktis neketina. TodГ„В—l mes privalome bГ…В«ti solidarГ…В«s su Ukraina ir jos Г…ВҫmonГ„В—mis. Mano Г…ВЎalis, Lietuva, geriau nei bet kas Г…Вҫino laisvГ„В—s kainГ„В… ir tikrГ„В…jГ„ВҜ Putino Rusijos veidГ„В…. Mes nuo pat pradГ…ВҫiГ…Ві buvome vieningi ir solidarГ…В«s teikdami visokeriopГ„В… paramГ„В… Ukrainai ir jos Г…ВҫmonГ„В—ms, nes tik veikdami kartu mes esame stiprГ…В«s. TodГ„В—l ir toliau turime bГ…В«ti vieningi visoje Europos SГ„В…jungoje teikdami paramГ„В… Ukrainai. Gerbiami kolegos, Lietuva ir kitos Baltijos Г…ВЎalys ГўВҖВ“ Latvija, Estija ГўВҖВ“ Г…Вҫino, kokia trapi yra laisvГ„В— ir kokia didelГ„В— yra jos kaina. TodГ„В—l tai yra mГ…В«sГ…Ві visГ…Ві pareiga susitelkti ir padГ„В—ti Ukrainai pasiekti pergalГ„Вҷ, nes laisva Ukraina yra ir saugi Europa.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Wouter Beke (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Voorzitter, vorige week ontmoette ik Andri Siromacha, een voormalig OekraГғВҜens soldaat van 23ГӮВ jaar. Andri is zijn rechterarm en rechterbeen kwijtgeraakt en heeft zijn ruggengraat gebroken. Hij zal voor de rest van zijn leven in een rolstoel zitten. Op de vraag wat zijn ultieme droom was, antwoordde hij: "Ooit president worden van een vrij OekraГғВҜne".

Gisteren hoorden we in het nieuws dat Vladimir Poetin zijn leger met nog eens 180ГӮВ 000 extra troepen wil vergroten. We moeten OekraГғВҜne daarom zowel op financieel als op militair gebied blijven ondersteunen. Een cruciaal onderdeel van deze steun is de voorgestelde G7-lening van vijftigГӮВ miljard Amerikaanse dollar, die eind dit jaar rond moet zijn. We moeten als Europa aan ГғВ©ГғВ©n lijn trekken en snel handelen. Alleen zo kunnen we samen met de G7 vastberadenheid tonen in de strijd tegen de Russische agressie en laten zien dat we onverminderd achter OekraГғВҜne staan.

Sinds het begin van de oorlog zijn aanzienlijke stappen gezet, bijvoorbeeld in de vorm van steunpakketten en de onlangs overeengekomen faciliteit voor OekraГғВҜne. Deze pakketten moeten we blijven aanvullen. Niettemin moet meer actie worden ondernomen.ГӮВ Militaire steun is immers even essentieel. Deze steun kunnen we echter enkel blijven verlenen als we onze eigen defensiecapaciteit en -industrie weten te versterken. Door te investeren in onze eigen industrie kunnen we OekraГғВҜne blijven voorzien van het nodige materieel en tegelijkertijd ook onze eigen veiligheid garanderen.

Kortom, financiГғВ«le en militaire steun gaan hand in hand. Mijnheer OrbГғВЎn, met een verenigde, snelle aanpak kunnen we beide versterken.

OekraГғВҜne rekent op ons. Laten we het OekraГғВҜense volk niet in de steek laten. We mogen Andri Siromacha en de zovele anderen niet in de steek laten.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Г…ВҒukasz Kohut (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Pani PrzewodniczГ„В…ca! Drodzy Koledzy! To jest naprawdГ„Вҷ bardzo proste. JeГ…Вјeli nie chcemy wojny, w ktГғВіrej bГ„ВҷdГ„В… ginГ„В…Г„ВҮ polscy, niemieccy czy hiszpaГ…В„scy obywatele, Rosja musi przegraГ„ВҮ wojnГ„Вҷ w Ukrainie, a Ukraina musi przetrwaГ„ВҮ i przejГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ swojГ„В… drogГ„Вҷ do europeizacji i docelowo do Unii Europejskiej. KaГ…Вјdy eurocent wydany na pomoc Ukrainie to inwestycja nie tylko w przyszГ…ВӮoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ tego kraju, ale takГ…Вјe w pokГғВіj naszej czГ„ВҷГ…Вӣci Г…Вӣwiata.

Mija 2,5 roku wojny i walki narodu, ktГғВіry, wedГ…ВӮug Putina, miaГ…ВӮ nie istnieГ„ВҮ. A Ukraina nadal stoi i walczy. Uderza w polskim czoГ…ВӮgu, strzela amerykaГ…В„skimi rakietami i czeskimi pociskami, broni siГ„Вҷ niemieckimi wyrzutniami.

Ale my mamy problem z koordynacjГ„В…. Dlatego musimy przyГ…ВӣpieszyГ„ВҮ utworzenie unii obronnej. Bo nie moГ…Вјe byГ„ВҮ tak, Г…Вјe wielki i dumny kontynent jak Europa drГ…Вјy co cztery lata o to, kto bГ„Вҷdzie zasiadaГ…ВӮ na fotelu prezydenta USA. Potrzebujemy wspГғВіlnej polityki obronnej.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Ana Miguel Pedro (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Senhora Presidente, alГғВ©m das nossas fronteiras, uma naГғВ§ГғВЈo luta pela sua sobrevivГғВӘncia.

Quando uma naГғВ§ГғВЈo ГғВ© invadida por um regime que procura reescrever as fronteiras pela forГғВ§a, trata-se de um ataque direto a tudo o que construГғВӯmos na Europa desde o fim da Segunda Guerra Mundial.

Apoiar a UcrГғВўnia ГғВ© reafirmar o nosso compromisso inabalГғВЎvel com a liberdade. ГғВү declarar, de forma clara e firme, que a agressГғВЈo e a tirania nГғВЈo tГғВӘm lugar na Europa. ГғВү defender que o que estГғВЎ em jogo nГғВЈo ГғВ© apenas o futuro de uma naГғВ§ГғВЈo, mas a integridade de um sistema global baseado em regras e direitos.

Chegou o momento de repensarmos as restriГғВ§ГғВөes sobre o uso de armas de longo alcance na defesa da UcrГғВўnia. A proibiГғВ§ГғВЈo prolongada de atingir territГғВіrio russo concede ГғВ  RГғВәssia uma licenГғВ§a para matar civis e destruir infraestruturas com impunidade.

Devemos estar preparados para apoiar a UcrГғВўnia pelo tempo que for necessГғВЎrio, porque a nossa democracia nГғВЈo pode ser esmagada sob o peso dos tanques e a nossa liberdade nГғВЈo pode ser silenciada por mГғВӯsseis.

Apoiar a UcrГғВўnia ГғВ© uma obrigaГғВ§ГғВЈo moral, estratГғВ©gica e histГғВіrica. ГғВү uma questГғВЈo de justiГғВ§a que define quem somos e aquilo em que acreditamos. Que mostremos ao mundo que, perante a tirania, a Europa nГғВЈo recua.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ SeГғВЎn Kelly (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ A UachtarГғВЎin, as President von der Leyen has emphasised, our goal must be to secure a peace that restores Ukraine's sovereignty and territorial integrity. I wholeheartedly welcome Taoiseach Simon Harris's recent bilateral meeting with President Zelenskyy and his reaffirmation of Ireland's support for Ukraine's journey towards EU membership. This summer marked a historic milestone as Ukraine formally began its EU accession process, reflecting the Ukrainian people's aspiration for justice and a European future.

I am also proud of Ireland's new agreement on support and cooperation with Ukraine. This agreement underscores that the values we share with Ukraine are fundamental to our own. As the Taoiseach has affirmed, we will stand by the brave people of Ukraine for as long as necessary.

So far, the EU itself has provided over EURГӮВ 118ГӮВ billion in aid to Ukraine. However, our energy policy should have prioritised EU energy independence long before Russia's annexation of Crimea in 2014. The best time to have set this independence target was 2014. The second best time is now. Ukraine must be an integral part of this renewed commitment to energy security and independence.

And finally, the Wall Street Journal today reported that there were a million people either killed or wounded in the war so far. One man ГўВҖВ“ Putin ГўВҖВ“ is responsible for those million casualties. We must stand with Ukraine as long as it takes. Slava Ukraini!

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Bogdan Andrzej Zdrojewski (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Pani PrzewodniczГ„В…ca! Nie jesteГ…Вӣmy w punkcie zero. Mamy innГ„В… sytuacjГ„Вҷ niГ…Вј wtedy, kiedy obserwowaliГ…Вӣmy aneksjГ„Вҷ Krymu. LekcjГ„Вҷ w jakimГ…Вӣ sensie odrobiliГ…Вӣmy. Wtedy przypomnГ„Вҷ reakcji prawie nie byГ…ВӮo. Nie byГ…ВӮo przede wszystkim adekwatnych.

DziГ…Вӣ nowo wybrany Parlament Europejski rozpoczyna od rezolucji, od rezolucji wsparcia dla Ukrainy i to wsparcia wielowГ„В…tkowego. Natomiast to, czego brakuje, to przede wszystkim szybkoГ…Вӣci, sprawnoГ…Вӣci, wielkoГ…Вӣci, ale takГ…Вјe zgodnoГ…Вӣci w pewnych reakcjach. Po czГ„ВҷГ…Вӣci podzielam opiniГ„Вҷ Stoltenberga, aby kraje podejmowaГ…ВӮy, bo majГ„В… takГ„В… moГ…ВјliwoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ, decyzje indywidualne. Po czГ„ВҷГ…Вӣci, dlatego Г…Вјe uwaГ…Вјam, Г…Вјe taka akceptacja, dlatego, Г…Вјeby byГ…ВӮo szybciej, adekwatniej, lepiej, wiГ„Вҷcej powinna byГ„ВҮ wspГғВіlnГ„В… decyzjГ„В…, decyzjГ„В… zbiorowГ„В…. Jest to o tyle waГ…Вјne, Г…Вјe bezpieczeГ…В„stwo zwiГ„В…zane z naszГ„В… wschodniГ„В… granicГ„В… dotyka w skutku, potencjalnie, praktycznie poГ…ВӮowГ„Вҷ paГ…В„stw Unii Europejskiej. PodkreГ…Вӣlam, Г…Вјe dzisiaj potrzeba szybciej, lepiej, wiГ„Вҷcej, adekwatniej, abyГ…Вӣmy krГғВіtko mГғВіwiГ„В…c nie pГ…ВӮacili cenГ„Вҷ za opieszaГ…ВӮoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Ingeborg Ter Laak (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Voorzitter, wie vrede wil, moet zich voorbereiden op oorlog:ГӮВ si vis pacem, para bellum.ГӮВ Als wij daadwerkelijk voor vrede in Europa staan, moeten we samen achter OekraГғВҜne blijven staan en verenigd zijn in onze steun aan het land en in onze toezeggingen en verplichtingen om OekraГғВҜne in staat te stellen zijn soevereiniteit te verdedigen.

Europa draagt financieel bij en stuurt wapens. Dit lijkt Rusland echter onvoldoende af te schrikken. We moeten het verbod op het gebruik van wapens op Russisch grondgebied daarom gezamenlijk opheffen.

Alleen als wij verenigd zijn, kan OekraГғВҜne zichzelf effectief verdedigen enГӮВ kunnen we Rusland laten zien dat het niets in OekraГғВҜne te zoeken heeft. Alleen zo zal er vrede ontstaan.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Inese Vaidere (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ CienГ„В«tГ„ВҒ sГ„В“des vadГ„В«tГ„ВҒja! DГ„ВҒrgie kolГ„В“Г„ВЈi! KopГ…ВЎ Krievijas kara UkrainГ„ВҒ bojГ„ВҒ gГ„ВҒjuГ…ВЎi simtiem tГ…В«kstoГ…ВЎi cilvГ„В“ku, tai skaitГ„ВҒ ГўВҖВ“ desmit tГ…В«kstoГ…ВЎi civiliedzГ„В«votГ„ВҒju. Krievi bombardГ„В“ skolas, slimnГ„В«cas, uzvedas kГ„ВҒ viduslaikos. Kam vГ„В“l ir jГ„ВҒnotiek, lai ukraiГ…ВҶi drГ„В«kstГ„В“tu uzbrukt objektiem KrievijГ„ВҒ, no kuriem Г…ВЎГ„В«s raГ„В·etes atlido? Nupat militГ„ВҒrie droni jau ielido Baltijas un citГ„ВҒs pierobeГ…Вҫas valstГ„В«s.

Ko darГ„В«t? PirmkГ„ВҒrt, nekavГ„В“joties jГ„ВҒatГ„Вјauj Ukrainai lietot tГ„ВҒlГ„ВҒs darbГ„В«bas ieroГ„ВҚus, uzbrГ…В«kot militГ„ВҒrajiem objektiem KrievijГ„ВҒ. JГ„ВҒpaГ„ВҒtrina militГ„ВҒrГ„ВҒs piegГ„ВҒdes, jo Krievija atzГ„В«st tikai spГ„В“ku. Un tie bГ…В«s nozГ„В«mГ„В«gi soГ„Вјi, lai Ukraina karГ„ВҒ uzvarГ„В“tu. OtrkГ„ВҒrt, jГ„ВҒpГ„ВҒrtrauc kara finansГ„В“Г…ВЎana. Par kara postГ„В«jumiem vispirms ir jГ„ВҒmaksГ„ВҒ paГ…ВЎai Krievijai. TГ„ВҒpГ„В“c ir jГ„ВҒizmanto ne tikai procenti no Krievijas iesaldГ„В“tajiem aktГ„В«viem un UngГ„ВҒrijai ir jГ„ВҒbeidz uzvesties kГ„ВҒ Krievijas atbalstГ„В«tГ„ВҒjai, bet Ukrainas labГ„ВҒ ir jГ„ВҒizmanto paГ…ВЎi iesaldГ„В“tie Krievijas aktГ„В«vi.

MГ„В“s Г…ВЎeit ГўВҖВ“ Eiropas ParlamentГ„ВҒ ГўВҖВ“ jau kara sГ„ВҒkumГ„ВҒ aicinГ„ВҒjГ„ВҒm uz pilnГ„В«gu Krievijas enerГ„ВЈijas resursu embargo. Tas ir absurds, ka vairГ„ВҒkas Eiropas SavienГ„В«bas valstis joprojГ„ВҒm ar enerГ„ВЈijas avotu importu finansГ„В“ Г…ВЎo karu. Ir jГ„ВҒpanГ„ВҒk arГ„В«, ka visas G7 valstis sniedz nopietnu militГ„ВҒru atbalstu un katra valsts palГ„В«dz Ukrainai ГўВҖВ“ katra demokrГ„ВҒtiska valsts. JГ„ВҒievieГ…ВЎ vГ„В“l stingrГ„ВҒkas sankcijas pret Krieviju un Baltkrieviju, kГ„ВҒ arГ„В« pret tГ„ВҒm valstГ„В«m, kuras Krievijai palГ„В«dz sankcijas apiet un palГ„В«dz tai militГ„ВҒri un finansiГ„ВҒli.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ HГғВ©lder Sousa Silva (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Senhora Presidente, Senhor ComissГғВЎrio, Caros Colegas, Caros ucranianos, foi deste hemiciclo que, desde fevereiro de 2022, tГғВӘm partido as maiores e eu direi mais convictas palavras de apoio da UniГғВЈo Europeia ГғВ  UcrГғВўnia.

Hoje, aqui, em nome da delegaГғВ§ГғВЈo portuguesa, pretendo reiterar e atГғВ© reforГғВ§ar a solidariedade que foi assumida. A defesa da UcrГғВўnia ГғВ© a defesa dos valores e dos princГғВӯpios europeus e ГғВ© uma responsabilidade, acima de tudo, de todos nГғВіs.

No inГғВӯcio de um novo mandato, quando estamos a definir a estratГғВ©gia para os prГғВіximos cinco anos, ГғВ© nossa obrigaГғВ§ГғВЈo continuar a usar este plenГғВЎrio para dar confianГғВ§a, mas, acima de tudo, para apoiar verdadeiramente aqueles que defendem no terreno, com sacrifГғВӯcio da prГғВіpria vida, os valores que aqui incorporamos.

A vitГғВіria da UcrГғВўnia, alГғВ©m da vitГғВіria mais do que justa do povo ucraniano, serГғВЎ a vitГғВіria da Europa e dos valores democrГғВЎticos que defendemos. Viva a UcrГғВўnia!

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Isabel Wiseler-Lima (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Madame la PrГғВ©sidente, nous ne le rГғВ©pГғВ©terons jamais assez: cette guerre brutale et illГғВ©gale a ГғВ©tГғВ© initiГғВ©e par la Russie sur le territoire ukrainien. Le jour oГғВ№ l'agresseur russe se retire d'Ukraine, cette guerre finit. L'aide que nous apportons ГғВ  l'Ukraine est une aide pour lui permettre de ne pas ГғВӘtre rayГғВ©e de la carte. L'Ukraine a le droit ГўВҖВ“ chez eux, ils disent le devoir ГўВҖВ“ de se dГғВ©fendre. Il s'agit de permettre au peuple ukrainien de rester libre et de dГғВ©cider lui-mГғВӘme de son avenir.

Cette aide, nous n'avons cessГғВ© de l'accroГғВ®tre, mais ГғВ  trop petite dose, avec des dГғВ©lais qui auraient pu ГғВӘtre ГғВ©vitГғВ©s. Dans nos pays, on hГғВ©site ГғВ  donner l'autorisation d'utiliser les armes occidentales pour frapper en territoire russe les bases militaires d'oГғВ№ partent les missiles. Mais en Ukraine, ces mГғВӘmes missiles russes atteignent les infrastructures vitales et tuent. Les Ukrainiens, eux, enterrent leurs morts.

L'Union europГғВ©enne s'est montrГғВ©e dГғВ©terminГғВ©e et a su rГғВ©agir avec unitГғВ©. Mais nous devons absolument continuer sur la durГғВ©e aussi longtemps que nГғВ©cessaire: as long as it takes doit rester le mot d'ordre. Nous devons ГғВӘtre reconnaissants ГғВ  l'Ukraine, car malgrГғВ© les destructions massives de ses infrastructures, malgrГғВ© le coГғВ»t humain de cette guerre, le peuple ukrainien continue ГғВ  dГғВ©fendre son pays et ses valeurs. Faisons de notre cГғВҙtГғВ© tout ce qui est en notre pouvoir pour l'aider.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 

Procedura "catch-the-eye"

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ JoГғВЈo Oliveira (The Left). ГўВҖВ“ Senhora Presidente, respeito pelo direito internacional, autodeterminaГғВ§ГғВЈo dos povos, inviolabilidade das fronteiras, integridade territorial, resoluГғВ§ГғВЈo pacГғВӯfica de conflitos entre os Estados, renГғВәncia ao uso da violГғВӘncia. DevГғВӯamos estar a discutir neste Parlamento uma soluГғВ§ГғВЈo de paz e seguranГғВ§a coletiva para a UcrГғВўnia e para toda a Europa com base nestes princГғВӯpios.

Em vez disso, estamos mais uma vez a discutir as 1001 formas de continuar a escalada da guerra e a de gastar o dinheiro e as vidas dos povos a alimentar o negГғВіcio bilionГғВЎrio do armamento e da morte. Quando os nossos filhos e netos nos julgarem pelo mundo que lhes deixГғВЎmos, nГғВЈo poderГғВЈo dizer que todos apoiГғВЎmos a guerra ou a ela assistimos de braГғВ§os cruzados. Alguns de nГғВіs continuarГғВЈo a resistir com firmeza e a levantar a voz contra a barbГғВЎrie da guerra. Porque ГғВ© a paz o futuro dos povos.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ SunГ„ВҚana Glavak (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ PoГ…ВЎtovana predsjedavajuГ„ВҮa, kolegice i kolege, Ukrajina ima pravo na obranu.

Europa tu mora ostati snaГ…Вҫna i zaГ…ВЎtititi Ukrajinu od imperijalistiГ„ВҚkih ambicija Rusije. Nemojmo zaboraviti na Г„ВҚinjenicu da je okupacija zapoГ„ВҚela prije gotovo desetak godina, a brutalna agresija 2022. Od tada svjedoГ„ВҚimo krГ…ВЎenju ljudskih prava, gubitku ljudskih Г…Вҫivota, zatiranju ukrajinskog identiteta, progonu i ubojstvu djece. Г…В esto djece otprilike ubijeno je u ruskoj agresiji na Ukrajinu.

Г…В to se tiГ„ВҚe moje zemlje Hrvatske, osim konkretne financijske pomoГ„ВҮi u dvije godine od oko 300 milijuna eura, Ukrajini pruГ…Вҫamo humanitarnu, gospodarsku i politiГ„ВҚku potporu a proГ…ВЎloga tjedna prigodom posjeta Ukrajini premijer PlenkoviГ„ВҮ najavio je i potporu donacijom od 5 milijuna eura za obnovu energetske infrastrukture. U listopadu, u Dubrovniku u Hrvatskoj, odrГ…Вҫat Г„ВҮe se samit zemalja jugoistoГ„ВҚne Europe. Cilj: podrГ…ВЎka Ukrajini i njezinoj teritorijalnoj cjelovitosti.

Kolegice i kolege, budimo na pravoj strani povijesti, budimo uz Ukrajinu.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Vytenis Povilas Andriukaitis (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ Gerbiama Pirmininke, gerbiami kolegos. IГ…ВЎties, bandymas uГ…ВҫГ…ВЎaldyti konfliktГ„В… yra pragaiГ…ВЎtingas Europos SГ„В…jungai. Ir ta formulГ„В— ГўВҖВ“ remti tiek, kiek reikГ„В—s ГўВҖВ“ nepakankamai ambicinga. Reikia remti kuo efektyviau, kuo daugiau, kuo greiГ„ВҚiau ir kuo koordinuoГ„ВҚiau. Г…В tai kodГ„В—l visГ…Ві Europos SГ„В…jungos valstybiГ…Ві padidintas finansinГ„В—s paramos procentas bГ…В«tГ…Ві geras atsakas. Negalima leisti, kad vieni remia daugiau, kiti maГ…Вҫiau. Solidariai, vieningai ir stipriai! Kita vertus, akivaizdu, kad reikia paГ…Вҫaboti agresoriГ…Ві ir apginti sienГ…Ві nelieГ„ВҚiamumo principГ„В… ir teritorinio integralumo principГ„В…. Tam yra bГ…В«tinybГ„В— kompleksiГ…ВЎkai veikti, kad Zelenskio taikos planas bГ…В«tГ…Ві pilnai Г„ВҜgyvendintas. Neabejotina, kad reikia nuimti apribojimus Ukrainai tiekiamГ…Ві ginklГ…Ві panaudojimui. Ukraina privalo juos panaudoti taip, kaip jai labiausiai to reikia. Gi didesnГ„В—, greitesnГ„В—, efektyvesnГ„В— Ukrainos integracija Г„ВҜ Europos SГ„В…jungГ„В… yra tikslas. Europos SГ„В…jungos gynybos stiprinimas ir sukГ…В«rimas yra tikslas. Ir kuo efektyvesnГ„В—, platesnГ„В— tarptautinГ„В— diplomatija izoliuojant ir paГ…Вҫabojant agresoriГ…Ві irgi yra tikslas. Tik kompleksinГ„В—s, efektyvios ir stiprios priemonГ„В—s gali padГ„В—ti mums pasiekti didelГ„Вҷ pergalГ„Вҷ ir pasiekti taikГ„В… ir tuo paГ„ВҚiu Rusijoje Г„ВҜveikti Putino reГ…ВҫimГ„В….

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Maria Grapini (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ DoamnГ„Вғ preГҲВҷedintГ„Вғ, domnule comisar, stimaГҲВӣi colegi, condamn de la bun ГғВ®nceput, condamn rГ„Вғzboiul ГҲВҷi uciderea oamenilor nevinovaГҲВӣi. Mor ГҲВҷi romГғВўni acolo pentru cГ„Вғ o parte din Ucraina... ГғВ®n Ucraina, o parte din teritoriile istorice erau ale RomГғВўniei. Ce vreau ГғВ®nsГ„Вғ, domnule comisar, sГ„Вғ spun: am fost foarte atentГ„Вғ la comunicare. Eu cred cГ„Вғ trebuie sГ„Вғ ne schimbГ„Вғm modul de comunicare pentru a avea suportul cetГ„ВғГҲВӣenilor.

ГғВҺnГҲВҷiruirea unor sume de bani pe care le dГ„Вғm fГ„ВғrГ„Вғ a explica cetГ„ВғГҲВӣenilor de ce RomГғВўnia, ГҲВӣara mea, a ajutat Ucraina mai mult decГғВўt, poate, uneori, a ajutat propriii cetГ„ВғГҲВӣeni, pentru cГ„Вғ ГғВ®nГҲВӣelegem cГ„Вғ e nevoie sГ„Вғ ajutГ„Вғm ГўВҖВ“ problema este ce face Uniunea EuropeanГ„Вғ, ce presiune pune la ONU, la Statele Unite, la celelalte puteri mondiale pentru a determina Rusia sГ„Вғ opreascГ„Вғ aceastГ„Вғ agresiune ГҲВҷi uciderea ГғВ®n masГ„Вғ a oamenilor? Asta este important sГ„Вғ ГҲВҷtie cetГ„ВғГҲВӣenii, pentru cГ„Вғ altfel nu vom avea suportul cetГ„ВғГҲВӣenilor. Noi nu dГ„Вғm bani din propriile buzunare. Noi dГ„Вғm bani de la cetГ„ВғГҲВӣeni, de fapt, ГҲВҷi trebuie sГ„Вғ se opreascГ„Вғ acest hidos... cea mai hidoasГ„Вғ formГ„Вғ de manifestare este rГ„Вғzboiul.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Aurelijus Veryga (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Gerbiama Pirmininke, gerbiami kolegos, kaГ…Вҫkada ir Lietuva laukГ„В— pagalbos. PraГ„В—jusio Г…ВЎimtmeГ„ВҚio viduryje iГ…ВЎГ„В—jo kovoti Г„ВҜ miГ…ВЎkus ir, nesulaukusi pagalbos, nuskendo Г„ВҜ deГ…ВЎimtmeГ„ВҚius okupacijos, Г…ВҫudyniГ…Ві. Г…В iandien tos pagalbos laukia Ukraina ir visiems sakantiems, kad karas yra blogiausias sprendimas, aГ…ВЎ siГ…В«lyГ„ВҚiau tГ„В… pasakyti Putinui, kuris uГ…ВҫpuolГ„В— UkrainГ„В…. Ir jis, kad ir Г…ВЎiandien, tГ„В… karГ„В… gali paimti ir pabaigti. O mums visiems sprendГ…Вҫiant, ar reikia suteikti daugiau pagalbos Ukrainai, aГ…ВЎ manau, kad esminis yra klausimas, ar yra valia prieГ…ВЎintis. Ir ta valia prieГ…ВЎintis, akivaizdu, kad yra, nes tie, kurie planavo UkrainГ„В… uГ…Вҫimti per savaitГ„Вҷ, Г…ВЎiandien yra Г„ВҜsivГ„В—lГ„Вҷ Г„ВҜ ilgГ„В… karГ„В… ir ukrainieГ„ВҚiai kovoja uГ…Вҫ savo laisvГ„Вҷ ir nepriklausomybГ„Вҷ. Pagalba jiems yra mГ…В«sГ…Ві visГ…Ві pareiga.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Fernand Kartheiser (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Madame la PrГғВ©sidente, dans ce conflit l'Union europГғВ©enne n'a ГғВ  aucun moment essayГғВ© de dГғВ©finir une politique correspondant ГғВ  ses propres intГғВ©rГғВӘts gГғВ©ostratГғВ©giques. Au lieu de dГғВ©velopper une capacitГғВ© d'analyse et d'action autonome, elle a versГғВ© dans un suivisme absolu avec les ГғВүtats-Unis et le Royaume-Uni. Notre Union devra bientГғВҙt s'interroger sur ses propres responsabilitГғВ©s dans la genГғВЁse et la dГғВ©tГғВ©rioration continue du conflit ukrainien. La situation actuelle menace de plus en plus la paix mondiale. Les puissances occidentales doivent comprendre qu'elles ne peuvent en aucun cas lancer des attaques par missiles en profondeur en Russie.

Une solution nГғВ©gociГғВ©e directement entre les belligГғВ©rants devient de plus en plus pressante. ГғВҖ l'heure qu'il est, l'aide humanitaire et la diplomatie doivent remplacer les fournitures d'armes et le soutien financier. L'Union europГғВ©enne devra par la suite aider ГғВ  reconstruire l'Ukraine et lui offrir de nouvelles perspectives de dГғВ©veloppement. Notre Union, ses ГғВүtats membres, comme d'ailleurs aussi l'OTAN, devront respecter pleinement la neutralitГғВ© de l'Ukraine.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ KatarГғВӯna Roth NeveГ„ВҸalovГғВЎ (NI). ГўВҖВ“ VГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВЎ pani predsedajГғВәca, EurГғВіpska ГғВәnia je inГ…ВЎtitГғВәciou, ktorГғВЎ mГғВЎ podporovaГ…ВҘ mier a nie vojnu. A to budem opakovaГ…ВҘ v tejto snemovni celГғВҪ Г„ВҚas. My si tu mГғВҪlime dve veci. Vy tu niektorГғВӯ hovorГғВӯte, Г…Вҫe chcete mier a potom zГғВЎroveГ…ВҲ hovorГғВӯte, Г…Вҫe mier znamenГғВЎ porГғВЎГ…Вҫka Putina.

Lebo to sГғВә dve rozdielne veci. KeГ„ВҸ hovorГғВӯme o mieri, tak mier znamenГғВЎ diskusia, spoluprГғВЎca, respektГғВӯve nejakГғВ© rokovania, aby sme priniesli nejakГғВ© rieГ…ВЎenie na stГғВҙl.ГӮВ KeГ„ВҸ hovorГғВӯme o vojne, tak hovorГғВӯme o mГ…В•tvych. HovorГғВӯme o ГғВәtokoch, hovorГғВӯme o zbraniach.

Ja si myslГғВӯm, Г…Вҫe ГғВҡnia mГғВЎ hovoriГ…ВҘ o mierovej politike a Г…Вҫe by sme mali viac vyzГғВҪvaГ…ВҘ aj v tejto snemovni na to, aby sa urobili nejakГғВ© mierovГғВ© rokovania a aby sme podporili, uГ…Вҫ to je jedno, ktorГғВҪkoГ„Вҫvek mierovГғВҪ plГғВЎn, len aby sa tГғВЎto vojna skonГ„ВҚila a Г„Вҫudia nezomierali.

Viete, SlovenskГғВЎ republika je zaplavenГғВЎ Г„ВҫuГ„ВҸmi, ktorГғВӯ uГ…ВЎli z Ukrajiny. A mГ…ВҲa veГ„Вҫmi mrzГғВӯ, Г…Вҫe niektorГғВ© Г„ВҚlenskГғВ© Г…ВЎtГғВЎty vydГғВЎvajГғВә tГғВҪchto Г„ВҫudГғВӯ, aby iГ…ВЎli bojovaГ…ВҘ do vojny, v ktorej oni bojovaГ…ВҘ nechcГғВә. To je takisto poruГ…ВЎenie podГ„Вҫa mГ…ВҲa Г„ВҫudskГғВҪch prГғВЎv.ГӮВ A takisto by sme sa mali zamyslieГ…ВҘ, Г„ВҚi je to sprГғВЎvne.

Ukrajina je vlastne krajina, ktorГғВЎ bude zdevastovanГғВЎ vojnou. Vy tu vГ…ВЎetci hovorГғВӯte, Г…Вҫe budeme podporovaГ…ВҘ Ukrajinu do poslednej minГғВәty, do poslednГғВ©ho eura. Ale koГ„Вҫko? Г„ВҢo to znamenГғВЎ? MГғВЎme tu Draghiho sprГғВЎvu, ktorГғВЎ hovorГғВӯ o podpore EurГғВіpskej ГғВәnie konkurencieschopnosti. Ale zГғВЎroveГ…ВҲ rozprГғВЎvate, Г…Вҫe budete dГғВЎvaГ…ВҘ nekoneГ„ВҚnГғВ© mnoГ…Вҫstvo peГ…ВҲazГғВӯ na to, aby sa tam Г„Вҫudia zabГғВӯjali a aby sa tam Г„ВҸalej bojovalo.

Tak treba sa naozaj spamГғВӨtaГ…ВҘ, aby sme nepredali duГ…ВЎu diablovi len preto, aby sme akoГ…Вҫe si urobili nejakГғВә pomstu, po ktorej tu veГ„Вҫa z vГғВЎs tГғВәГ…Вҫi.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 

(Fine della procedura "catch the eye")

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Valdis Dombrovskis, Executive Vice-President of the Commission.
