ГўВҖВ“ MadamГӮВ President, I think today's debate illustrates the overwhelming consensus to continue the EU's support for Ukraine, even though I also noted voices which would happily move away from the rules-based international order and the country's rights in line with the EU Charter and engage in a world order where 'might is right'. History has taught us time and again that appeasement of the aggressor does not work. It only encourages more aggression.

The EU and its Member States have done a lot, but the needs remain huge. We must do more and faster. We need to be able to support Ukraine for as long as it takes, with everything necessary to stop Russian aggression in Ukraine. This is alsoГӮВ about the future of European security. Russia is already testing our Member States by implementing its hybrid war tactics, and you have an important role to play in stressing this message when talking to your constituencies.

This huge assistance is an investment in the EU's future. Ukraine has to be able to prevail against Russia, successfully defending its existence as a sovereign and independent European country, including its territorial integrity in its internationally recognised borders. We must support Ukraine on its way to EU membership, however difficult that work is, in particular during the ongoing war. This merit-based path is necessary to lay foundations not only for Ukraine's future prosperity, in line with the choice of its people, but also for the EU's continued global significance.

In this debate, you rightly pointed to issues that require further work. We have gradually moved since the onset of invasion from a solutions-based to more systemic assistance mechanisms. We will continue to work diligently to find solutions that are sustainable in the longer term, and address related complexities. We will continue our work with international partners to support Ukraine's fight for its sovereignty and territorial integrity, and its destiny to be part of the EU.

The EU has evolved through crisis and challenges, and I very much hope that we will again be up to this historical task and up to our responsibilities as Europeans.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Presidente. ГўВҖВ“ La discussione ГғВЁ chiusa.

La votazione si svolgerГғВ  giovedГғВ¬ 19 settembre 2024.

Dichiarazioni scritte (articolo 178)

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 		ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Daniel Buda (PPE), ГғВ®n scris. ГўВҖВ“ Acest raport subliniazГ„Вғ urgenГҲВӣa sprijinirii Ucrainei ГғВ®n faГҲВӣa agresiunii continue a Rusiei ГҲВҷi atrage atenГҲВӣia asupra multiplelor crize umanitare ГҲВҷi de securitate care afecteazГ„Вғ atГғВўt Ucraina, cГғВўt ГҲВҷi comunitatea internaГҲВӣionalГ„Вғ. Atacul cu rachete asupra unei nave cargo care transporta grГғВўu, destinat Egiptului, nu este doar un act de violenГҲВӣГ„Вғ ГғВ®mpotriva Ucrainei, ci ГҲВҷi un atac asupra securitГ„ВғГҲВӣii alimentare globale. ГҲВҡГ„Вғrile din regiunile vulnerabile, precum Egiptul, depind de exporturile de grГғВўne ucrainene, iar aceste acte destabilizeazГ„Вғ pieГҲВӣele internaГҲВӣionale de alimente ГҲВҷi agraveazГ„Вғ insecuritatea alimentarГ„Вғ la nivel mondial.

Mai mult, escaladarea atacurilor cu drone ГҲВҷi rachete care violeazГ„Вғ spaГҲВӣiul aerian al UE ГҲВҷi NATO reprezintГ„Вғ o ameninГҲВӣare directГ„Вғ la adresa securitГ„ВғГҲВӣii cetГ„ВғГҲВӣenilor din regiunile estice ale Europei. Acest lucru subliniazГ„Вғ importanГҲВӣa unitГ„ВғГҲВӣii ГҲВҷi solidaritГ„ВғГҲВӣii europene ГғВ®n faГҲВӣa acestei agresiuni, precum ГҲВҷi nevoia de a consolida sprijinul militar ГҲВҷi umanitar pentru Ucraina.

Un vot ГғВ®n favoarea acestui raport ГғВ®nsemnГ„Вғ susГҲВӣinerea valorilor europene de solidaritate, pace ГҲВҷi justiГҲВӣie, sprijinind Ucraina ГғВ®n faГҲВӣa unei agresiuni nemiloase ГҲВҷi contribuind la stabilitatea ГҲВҷi securitatea regiunii ГҲВҷi a lumii.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 		ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Erik KaliГ…ВҲГғВЎk (NI), pГғВӯsomne. ГўВҖВ“ Г„ВҺakujem pekne. ZachviГ„Вҫu to budГғВә tri roky, Г„ВҚo zaГ„ВҚal konflikt na Ukrajine a polovica tohto plГғВ©na tu tri roky opakuje tГғВә istГғВә vojenskГғВә propagandu, to istГғВ© moralizovanie a tie istГғВ© zaslepenГғВ© vГғВҪzvy, Г…Вҫe eГ…ВЎte pГғВЎr miliГғВЎrd a Ukrajina sa ubrГғВЎniГўВҖВҰ

Kolegovia, je Г„ВҚas sa zobudiГ…ВҘ z vaГ…ВЎich detskГғВҪch snov.

Ukrajina sa ubrГғВЎniГ…ВҘ nedokГғВЎГ…Вҫe a jej nekoneГ„ВҚnГғВҪm vyzbrojovanГғВӯm len eskalujete napГғВӨtie a predlГ…Вҫujete konflikt, ktorГғВҪ nemГғВЎ vojenskГғВ© rieГ…ВЎenie. Stovky miliГғВЎrd, desiatky sankciГғВӯ a akГғВҪ je vГғВҪsledok?

DesaГ…ВҘtisГғВӯce mojich rovesnГғВӯkov mГ…В•tvych, vГ…ВЎetky protiofenzГғВӯvy neГғВәspeГ…ВЎnГғВ© a podГ„Вҫa poslednГғВҪch slov ZelenskГғВ©ho - na kaГ…ВҫdГғВҪ nГғВЎboj Ukrajiny pripadГғВЎ 12 RuskГғВҪchГўВҖВҰ a vy si idete Г„ВҸalej svoje. Dokedy?! Naozaj aГ…Вҫ do poslednГғВ©ho Ukrajinca?

Ak by ste svoje faloГ…ВЎnГғВ© sГ„Вҫuby Ukrajine mysleli vГғВЎГ…Вҫne, tak by ste uГ…Вҫ dГғВЎvno volali po nasadenГғВӯ naГ…ВЎich nГғВЎrodnГғВҪch armГғВЎd, pretoГ…Вҫe inak niГ„ВҚ z toho, o Г„ВҚom tu hodiny reГ„ВҚnite, nedosiahnete. Osobne som existenГ„ВҚne proti takejto eskalГғВЎciГғВӯ konfliktu na Ukrajine, ale na rozdiel od vГғВЎГ…ВЎho zaslepenГғВ©ho moralizovania ten postoj aspoГ…ВҲ dГғВЎva zmysel.

To, Г„ВҚo tu uГ…Вҫ tretГғВӯ rok predvГғВЎdzate v skutoГ„ВҚnosti pomГғВЎha jedine zbrojГғВЎrskym komplexom. Nikomu inГғВ©mu, nie EurГғВіpanom, nie Ukrajincom, nie mieru.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 		ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Mariusz KamiГ…В„ski (ECR), na piГ…Вӣmie. ГўВҖВ“ Dzisiejsza debata o pomocy Ukrainie w powstrzymaniu rosyjskiej agresji odbywa siГ„Вҷ w dniu szczegГғВіlnym, bo 17 wrzeГ…Вӣnia. Polacy doskonale pamiГ„ВҷtajГ„В…, iГ…Вј jest to rocznica sowieckiej napaГ…Вӣci na PolskГ„Вҷ. PamiГ„ВҷГ„ВҮ ta jest jednak niezbГ„Вҷdna dla caГ…ВӮego regionu, gdyГ…Вј komunistyczna Moskwa i nazistowski Berlin nie zatrzymaГ…ВӮy siГ„Вҷ na Polsce. Los mego kraju w 1939 roku podzieliГ…ВӮy nastГ„Вҷpnie inne paГ…В„stwa.

DziГ…Вӣ z ust Putina sГ…ВӮyszymy te same imperialistyczne sГ…ВӮowa co w poprzednim stuleciu. JesteГ…Вӣmy Г…Вӣwiadkami sfaГ…ВӮszowanych referendГғВіw, przymusowej paszportyzacji, deportacji, zbrodni wojennych. Г…Вҡwiat potrzebowaГ…ВӮ mrugniГ„Вҷcia okiem, by RosjГ„Вҷ sowieckГ„В… doГ…ВӮГ„В…czyГ„ВҮ do grona aliantГғВіw. Bez ukarania jej za zbrodnie wojenne, za KatyГ…В„, CharkГғВіw, Miednoje... Wszyscy powinniГ…Вӣmy pamiГ„ВҷtaГ„ВҮ o lekcjach historii, takГ…Вјe tych trudnych. Bez tego nie zbudujemy lepszej przyszГ…ВӮoГ…Вӣci, nie podejmiemy mГ„В…drych i dalekosiГ„ВҷГ…Вјnych decyzji. JednГ„В… z nich jest prawda, iГ…Вј ofiary nie moГ…Вјna pozostawiГ„ВҮ bezbronnГ„В…, ograniczaГ„ВҮ jej samoobrony. DrugГ„В… jest ta, iГ…Вј zbrodnia nie moГ…Вјe pozostaГ„ВҮ bezkarna.

SГ…ВӮowa, ktГғВіre tutaj padГ…ВӮy, sГ„В… waГ…Вјne, ale waГ…Вјniejsze sГ„В… czyny. UkraiГ…В„scy Г…ВјoГ…ВӮnierze majГ„В… wolГ„Вҷ, ducha, umiejГ„ВҷtnoГ…Вӣci, by broniГ„ВҮ swojej ojczyzny. Brakuje jej nowoczesnego sprzГ„Вҷtu. Polska pomoc byГ…ВӮa decydujГ„В…ca w odparciu rosyjskiej agresji w pierwszych kluczowych tygodniach wojny. Niestety, w kontraГ…Вӣcie do mojego kraju, kunktatorstwo i hipokryzja innych waГ…Вјnych europejskich graczy, byГ…ВӮy i wciГ„В…Г…Вј sГ„В… jaskrawo widoczne.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 		ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Г„ВҪubica KarvaГ…ВЎovГғВЎ (Renew), pГғВӯsomne. ГўВҖВ“ Od 24. februГғВЎra 2022 je EurГғВіpsky parlament jednotnГғВҪ vo svojej podpore Ukrajiny. Je vГ…ВЎak dГғВҙleГ…ВҫitГғВ©, aby sme tento trend zachovali aj nasledujГғВәcich pГғВӨГ…ВҘ rokov. Preto vГғВӯtam silnГғВҪ signГғВЎl podpory, ktorГғВҪ touto rezolГғВәciou vysielame naГ…ВЎim partnerom na Ukrajine na zaГ„ВҚiatku tohto mandГғВЎtu.

Podpora Ukrajiny neexistuje vo vГғВЎkuu. Je naviazanГғВЎ na eurГғВіpsku a demokratickГғВә budГғВәcnosГ…ВҘ Ukrajiny, ktorГғВЎ vstГғВәpila do novej kapitoly svojho eurГғВіpskeho prГғВӯbehu v momente, keГ„ВҸ zaГ„ВҚala rokovaГ…ВҘ o pristГғВәpenГғВӯ k ГғВҡnii.

VojenskГғВЎ a finanГ„ВҚnГғВЎ podpora Ukrajiny je investГғВӯcia do budГғВәcnosti ГғВҡnie a do nasej vlastnej bezpeГ„ВҚnosti. Je to podpora pre nГғВЎГ…ВЎho suseda, nГғВЎГ…ВЎho partnera a budГғВәceho Г„ВҚlena a spojenca.

JednГғВҪm dychom vГ…ВЎak musГғВӯme hovoriГ…ВҘ aj o obnove Ukrajiny, ktorej ekonomika a infraГ…ВЎtruktГғВәra sГғВә zniГ„ВҚenГғВ© ruskou invГғВЎziou.

JedinГғВҪ spГғВҙsob, ako dosiahnuГ…ВҘ udrГ…ВҫateГ„ВҫnГғВҪ a dlhodobГғВҪ rozvoj Ukrajiny, je zabezpeГ„ВҚiГ…ВҘ, aby jej obnova iГ…ВЎla ruka v ruke s procesom pristГғВәpenia Ukrajiny k EГғВҡ.

Preto je aj v zГғВЎujme naГ…ВЎich medzinГғВЎrodnГғВҪch partnerov a spojencov, aby rekonГ…ВЎtrukcia bola v sГғВәlade s potrebami prГғВӯstupovГғВ©ho procesu. OtvГғВЎrajГғВә sa tГғВҪm aj moГ…Вҫnosti na rozvoj regiГғВіnov, ktorГғВ© susedia s Ukrajinou. Obnova Ukrajiny musГғВӯ preto byГ…ВҘ systematickГғВЎ, predvГғВӯdateГ„ВҫnГғВЎ a zodpovedne financovanГғВЎ. OГ„ВҚakГғВЎvam, Г…Вҫe EurГғВіpsky parlament bude podpornГғВҪm hlasom ako rekonГ…ВЎtrukcie, tak aj prГғВӯstupovГғВ©ho procesu Ukrajiny do EГғВҡ.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 		ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Urmas Paet (Renew), kirjalikult. ГўВҖВ“ ELi riigid peavad viivitamatult kaotama piirangud, mis ei luba Ukrainal kasutada lГғВӨГғВӨne relvasГғВјsteeme ГғВөigustatud sГғВөjaliste sihtmГғВӨrkide vastu Venemaal.

Piirangud ei lase Ukrainal end korralikult kaitsta ning jГғВӨtavad riigi elanikkonna ja taristu vГғВӨga haavatavaks.

Samuti peavad liikmesriigid tГғВӨitma 2023. aasta mГғВӨrtsis antud lubadust saata Ukrainale miljon mГғВјrsku ning kiirendama relvatarneid, eelkГғВөige ГғВөhukaitsesГғВјsteemide, laskemoona ja Tauruse rakettide saatmist Ukrainasse.

Lisaks tuleks ELil jГғВӨtkata ja laiendada Venemaa, Valgevene ning Venemaale sГғВөjalisi ja kahesuguse kasutusega kaupu tarnivate riikide ja ГғВјksuste vastaseid sanktsioone. Laiendada ja tugevdada tuleks eriti Iraani ja PГғВөhja-Korea vastaseid sanktsioone, vГғВөttes arvesse, et Iraan andis hiljuti Venemaale ballistilisi rakette ning mГғВөlemad riigid toetavad Venemaa Ukraina-vastast agressioonisГғВөda. Samuti tuleks sanktsioonide loetellu lisada rohkem Hiina ГғВјksusi ja isikuid. JГғВөulisemalt tuleks tegeleda ka sanktsioonidest kГғВөrvalehoidmise probleemiga.

EL ja selle liikmesriigid peavad aitama Ukrainal saavutada ja sГғВӨilitada vГғВөimalikult laia rahvusvahelise toetuse. SГғВөja mis tahes lahendus eeldab ka Venemaa vastutusele vГғВөtmist ning EL ja tema partnerid peavad tГғВ¶ГғВ¶tama vГғВӨlja kindla ГғВөiguskorra Venemaa kГғВјlmutatud varade konfiskeerimiseks.

ГӮВ 

3. Global measures towards social media platforms - Strengthening the role of DSA and protecting democracy and freedom in the online sphere (debate)
Video of the speeches
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Presidente. ГўВҖВ“ L'ordine del giorno reca la discussione sulla dichiarazione della Commissione su Misure globali nei confronti delle piattaforme di social media - Rafforzare il ruolo del regolamento sui servizi digitali e proteggere la democrazia e la libertГғВ  nell'ambiente online (2024/2806(RSP)).

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Margrethe Vestager, Executive Vice-President of the Commission. ГўВҖВ“ Madam President, thank you very much for inviting me to this debate on how to protect democracy and freedom in the online sphere with the Digital Services Act.

So let me start with the principles of the Digital Services Act. It's the overarching law for the responsibility of all online platforms towards our citizens, towards society overall. The Digital Services Act does not regulate online content, full stop. What it does regulate is the responsibility of platforms for the systems that they need to have in place to mitigate any negative impact of their activities. For example, they must allow users to easily notify illegal content, acts against illegal products and rogue traders, be transparent about their moderation activities, give their users a chance to complain whenever content is removed, and ensure the safety and the well-being of children when online.

The Digital Services Act contains strong safeguards to protect the freedom of expression of users, no general monitoring obligations to be imposed by Member states, and platforms remain exempted from direct liability. There are no arbitrary decisions by platforms. They must be clear on what is banned in their terms and conditions. And this also means that the Digital Services Act prevents the over removal of perfectly legitimate content.

Very large platforms, they have additional obligations they must assess and they must mitigate serious risks to our society. For instance, disinformation and information operations risk undermining our elections. But they are under no legal obligation to remove harmful content that is not illegal. Instead, they might need to design their recommender systems in ways that limit the viral spread of such content. And because of that, the Digital Services Act gives greater agency to citizens.

We are opening up the black box of algorithms on platforms. These used to decide on their own what content could be seen or not seen. And they were doing that without transparency and without redress possibilities. The DSA has changed that, restoring democratic accountability and oversight, thanks to this Parliament.

Since the entry into application of the rules for very large platforms, the Commission has focussed on five high priority areas.

First, the protection of minors. Following the opening of proceedings by the Commission, Tik Tok permanently withdrew from Europe it's new TikTok lite app. It's an app that with a reward program that was considered to be highly addictive. Cases were also opened against Facebook and Instagram because of suspicions that these platforms have a negative influence on the well-being of minors and stimulate addictive behaviour.

Second, the fight against illegal content. We have opened investigations against X, Facebook and Instagram, for instance, concerning the flagging mechanism for illegal content or their relationship with trusted flaggers.

Third, online advertising is banned when it comes to the profiling of minors or when sensitive data is concerned. As a result of our enforcement work LinkedIn has changed its systems. Fourth, we have taken measures to secure online marketplaces. We have designated no less than nine marketplaces, and we have already opened formal investigations against AliExpress. In addition, requests for information are being sent to both Timo and Shine.

Finally, regarding election integrity and civic discourse, the Commission issued guidelines in March this year on the mitigation of those risks. And we have held stress tests with platforms and authorities under the Code of Practice on Disinformation. No major anomalies were observed during the elections for this parliament. All democratic societies around this world, well, they are faced with the same risks Stemming from digital technologies. Based on our experience, this month's G20 declaration for the first time refers to content moderation and the responsibility of online platforms. Unesco's guidelines for the Governance of Digital Platforms, the UN principles for Information Integrity, or the OECD AI principles and recommendations, as I see it, they are directly inspired by the laws that this Parliament has passed.

So in conclusion, the Digital Services Act is an unprecedented regulatory framework based on the founding values of this very union. These are human dignity, freedom, democracy, equality, the rule of law and the respect of human rights. And contrary to deliberate misunderstandings of this piece of legislation, it does not regulate content. It does not restrict free speech. All of our enforcement work is based on the rule of law, following due process, and it has consistently been upheld by the Court of Justice.

Looking forward, the guidelines for the next Commission identify three priorities for future work: to intensify the enforcement of the Digital Services Act, including the support of the European Democracy Shield, protecting our elections and our democratic system. And of course, as an outgoing Commissioner, I hope that they will have the resources to do so. Also to tackle challenges with e-commerce platforms, to ensure that our customs and our market surveillance authorities can fully fulfil their duties.

And thirdly, to make the online world safer for children. We will carefully look into issues such as online addiction and cyber bullying. This Parliament has taken the most important and decisive step. Now it's time for enforcement. It's time for platforms to show that they respect and comply with this piece of amazing legislation. Thank you very much. I'm looking forward to hearing your views and answering your questions.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Andreas Schwab, im Namen der PPE-Fraktion. ГўВҖВ“ Frau PrГғВӨsidentin! Liebe Frau VizeprГғВӨsidentin der EuropГғВӨischen Kommission, es ist gut, dass Sie am Ende erwГғВӨhnt haben, dass wir im EuropГғВӨischen Parlament gemeinsam mit Frau Kollegin Schaldemose mit dem Gesetz ГғВјber digitale MГғВӨrkte und digitale Dienste die richtigen Weichenstellungen vorgenommen haben. Es ist gut, dass Sie sagen, dass es jetzt um die Umsetzung geht. Aber die Umsetzung, liebe Kolleginnen und Kollegen, die Umsetzung der Gesetze erfordert mehr Druck; wir mГғВјssen schneller werden. Wir haben letzte Woche bei einer AnhГғВ¶rung im EuropГғВӨischen Parlament in BrГғВјssel gelernt, dass die chinesische Plattform innerhalb von sechs Monaten genauso viele Kunden in Europa gewonnen hat wie eine europГғВӨische Plattform in den vergangenen sechs Jahren. Daran kann man sehr einfach deutlich machen, wie schnell die Entwicklung im digitalen Zeitalter ist und wie langsam unsere Reaktion darauf ist.

Deswegen, Frau Kommissarin, ist es richtig: Die Umsetzung muss jetzt schneller werden. Dazu ist die neue EuropГғВӨische Kommission dringend gefordert, auch mehr Mitarbeiter und mehr MГғВ¶glichkeiten zur VerfГғВјgung zu stellen, damit die Gefahren, auf die Sie hingewiesen haben, insbesondere im Bereich des Gesetzes ГғВјber digitale Dienste, in allen Bereichen erfolgreich bewГғВӨltigt werden kГғВ¶nnen. Ich bin mir sicher, dass die Kolleginnen und Kollegen jetzt eine ganze Reihe von Themen aufrufen werden. Der Schutz der Jugend ist schon angesprochen worden; der Schutz der Demokratie, der auch bei der Aufstellung der neuen EuropГғВӨischen Kommission eine groГғВҹe Rolle spielen wird, ist erwГғВӨhnt worden.

Ich mГғВ¶chte mich heute aber auf die Online-MarktplГғВӨtze konzentrieren, weil ich glaube, dass wir da im VerhГғВӨltnis zu dem, was wir in der Geschichte schon gesehen haben, am einfachsten deutlich machen kГғВ¶nnen, wo in Europa derzeit der Schuh drГғВјckt. Nehmen wir die groГғВҹe Plattform aus ChinaГӮВ ГўВҖВ“ Temu. Viele Produkte, die dort verkauft werden, kommen unter privilegierten Zoll- und Postbedingungen nach Europa. Sie stehen dann im Wettbewerb mit europГғВӨischen Produkten, die unter anderen Bedingungen hergestellt worden sind, und damit wird die Marktsituation verfГғВӨlscht. Deswegen wird es darauf ankommen, auch wie Herr Draghi in seinem Bericht geschrieben hat, dass die nationalen Zollverwaltungen und die EuropГғВӨische Kommission enger zusammenarbeiten, um sicherzustellen, dass europГғВӨisches Recht nicht nur auf dem Papier steht, sondern auch gilt.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 

PREГҲВҳEDINГҲВҡIA: NICOLAE Г…ВһTEFГ„ВӮNUГҲВҡГ„ВӮ
VicepreГҲВҷedinte

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ PreГ…Вҹedinte. ГўВҖВ“ Domnule preГҲВҷedinte, dragi colegi, avem o dezbatere foarte lungГ„Вғ. Este pentru prima oarГ„Вғ cГғВўnd prezidez. ГғВҺmi extind ГҲВҷi eu compasiunea pentru victimele inundaГҲВӣiilor din toatГ„Вғ Europa ГҲВҷi ГғВ®l prezint pe domnul Agius Saliba pentru 2 minute ГҲВҷi 30 din partea Grupului AlianГҲВӣei Progresiste a SocialiГҲВҷtilor ГҲВҷi DemocraГҲВӣilor din Parlamentul European.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Alex Agius Saliba, on behalf of the S&D Group. ГўВҖВ“ Mr President, social media is by far the most significantly and widely used form of mass media in our modern society. Undoubtedly, social media holds immense potential as a unifying force, fostering communities and bringing people together.

Despite this, it is often misused to spread fake news and propaganda, and to manipulate and target people towards a particular way of thinking, which is aimed at destabilising modern democratic processes and societies.

We increasingly see malicious motives and dishonest rhetoric from powerful, influential people, using social media's ability to circulate and disperse both information and also disinformation. The recent wave of violent riots in the UK after the spread of misinformation online, and Elon Musk's decision not to comply with Brazilian court orders leading to the blocking of X in the country are other examples of how tech giants are increasingly behaving with impunity before governments and before our courts.

It is not the first time that lies and hate spread on digital platforms are sparking and fuelling violence, or changing the course of elections in countries around the world, even in Europe.

A recent report commissioned by the S&D Group clearly shows that coordinated disinformation networks flooded X before the EU elections in France, in Germany, in Italy. The scale of disinformation networks shows they could ГўВҖВ“ and did ГўВҖВ“ take over an entire debate, changing its narrative completely by flooding X with posts, reposts, comments and likes.

Social media companies need to be held more accountable for spreading disinformation. The Digital Services Act represents the EU's first step in protecting ourselves against the spread of misinformation and preserving our democracies from such influence.

However, the effectiveness of the DSA hinges on robust enforcement and a firm commitment from the new Commission. We need assurance that the multi-million euro fines under the DSA will be used to rein in social media companies that break the law and exploit our democracies.

Last but not least, it's crucial to acknowledge that we cannot combat the issue in isolation. The S&D Group strongly advocates for the EU to strengthen the global roles of the DSA and heed the UN Secretary-General's call for global measures to safeguard our democracies from the digital chaos that social media platforms have unleashed.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Virginie Joron, au nom du groupe PfE. ГўВҖВ“ Monsieur le PrГғВ©sident, Madame la Commissaire, chers collГғВЁgues, Digital Service Act ou plutГғВҙt Digital Surveillance Act. Pendant que votre ami MarioГӮВ Draghi, l'homme qui a aidГғВ© la Goldman Sachs et la GrГғВЁce en dissimulant les dГғВ©ficits, dresse un ГғВ©tat des lieux dГғВ©sastreux de l'Union europГғВ©enne en matiГғВЁre de technologie et d'innovation, la France menotte en plein ГғВ©tГғВ© le directeur de Telegram et la Commission fait la chasse ГғВ  Twitter, ou X, qui propose des interviews avec DonaldГӮВ Trump. MГғВӘme le directeur de ProtonГӮВ Mail parle de suicide ГғВ©conomique. Le commissaireГӮВ Breton, prolixe de sa chaise longue pour envoyer des missives en plein ГғВ©tГғВ© ГғВ  ElonГӮВ Musk, est un commissaire dГғВ©missionnaire depuis hier ГғВ  Bruxelles et ne pourra finalement plus s'expliquer auprГғВЁs des dГғВ©putГғВ©s.

Oui, un sale ГғВ©tГғВ© pour la libertГғВ© d'expression et l'innovation sous prГғВ©texte, je cite, de protГғВ©ger les citoyens europГғВ©ens. Les protГғВ©ger de quoi, finalement? De la libertГғВ© de penser, de penser diffГғВ©remment? On n'a jamais entendu autant le mot ГӮВ«dГғВ©sinformationГӮВ» qu'aujourd'hui. Plus le camp du bien perd des voix, plus il hurle ГғВ  lutter contre la dГғВ©sinformation. Le Parlement nous enjoint mГғВӘme de vous demander un contrГғВҙle plus strict de Telegram. On l'a vu pendant la pГғВ©riode COVID, avec cette censure folle et cette propagande vaccinolГғВўtre, remise en question il y a quelques jours par le directeur de Meta qui a ГғВ©tГғВ© obligГғВ© de suivre les instructions des gouvernements. Vous ГғВӘtes finalement les pantins d'un systГғВЁme ГғВ  l'agonie. L'Union que vous voulez, mГғВӘme avec un plan ГғВ  800ГӮВ milliardsГӮВ d'euros, n'ira pas loin, mais c'est peut-ГғВӘtre lГғВ  l'arnaque.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Piotr MГғВјller, w imieniu grupy ECR. ГўВҖВ“ Panie PrzewodniczГ„В…cy! Szanowni PaГ…В„stwo! SГ…ВӮowo ГўВҖВһcenzuraГўВҖВқ budzi najgorsze skojarzenia. Skojarzenia z systemami, ktГғВіre nie majГ„В… nic wspГғВіlnego z demokracjГ„В…. Skojarzenia z systemami, ktГғВіre w Europie Wschodniej, w szczegГғВіlnoГ…Вӣci w Europie Г…Вҡrodkowo-Wschodniej, zrobiГ…ВӮy naprawdГ„Вҷ wiele zГ…ВӮego.

Filarem demokracji musi byГ„ВҮ wolnoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ sГ…ВӮowa. WolnoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ sГ…ВӮowa w XXI wieku oznacza rГғВіwnieГ…Вј wolnoГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ sГ…ВӮowa w internecie. Dlatego musimy z uwagГ„В… przyglГ„В…daГ„ВҮ siГ„Вҷ kaГ…Вјdemu dziaГ…ВӮaniu, ktГғВіre jest podejmowane przez KomisjГ„Вҷ EuropejskГ„В… oraz przez platformy spoГ…ВӮecznoГ…Вӣciowe w ramach pakietu DSA.

MiaГ…ВӮ on w zamyГ…Вӣle chroniГ„ВҮ spoГ…ВӮeczeГ…В„stwo demokratyczne przed rГғВіГ…Вјnego rodzaju prГғВіbami wpГ…ВӮywГғВіw, ktГғВіre mogГ…ВӮyby siГ„Вҷ pojawiГ„ВҮ. Ale mam wraГ…Вјenie, Г…Вјe choГ„ВҮ komisarz Breton, odpowiedzialny za wdroГ…Вјenie tego pakietu, juГ…Вј nie jest w Komisji Europejskiej, to problem, ktГғВіry siГ„Вҷ pojawiГ…ВӮ, problem cenzury prewencyjnej, ktГғВіra moГ…Вјe byГ„ВҮ wprowadzona tym pakietem, niestety jest bardzo aktualny.

UrzГ„Вҷdnicy w Unii Europejskiej mГғВіwiГ„В… o walce z dezinformacjГ„В…. Taki jest oficjalny powГғВіd, dla ktГғВіrego ten pakiet dziaГ…ВӮa. Ale czy dzisiaj nie powinniГ…Вӣmy tak naprawdГ„Вҷ mГғВіwiГ„ВҮ o tym, Г…Вјe to jest element wprowadzenia cenzury prewencyjnej? Г…В»e jest takie ryzyko, ktГғВіre siГ„Вҷ pojawi?

I dzisiaj pytanie: kto ma to oceniaГ„ВҮ? Czy na przykГ…ВӮad krytykowanie pakietu migracyjnego to jest walka z dezinformacjГ„В…? Czy to jest walka z mowГ„В… nienawiГ…Вӣci? Czy jednak moГ…Вјliwa debata publiczna w sytuacji, w szczegГғВіlnoГ…Вӣci, gdy Niemcy dzisiaj zamykajГ„В… swoje granice?

Szanowni PaГ…В„stwo, nie po to czytaliГ…Вӣmy Orwella, Г…Вјeby teraz obserwowaГ„ВҮ powstanie europejskiego Ministerstwa Prawdy. Na to zgody byГ„ВҮ nie moГ…Вјe.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Svenja Hahn, im Namen der Renew-Fraktion. ГўВҖВ“ Herr PrГғВӨsident! Danke, Kommissarin Vestager, fГғВјr Ihre Arbeit und die klare Haltung hier, denn Meinungsfreiheit ist eine der wichtigsten Errungenschaften unserer Demokratie. Gerade diese Gedankenfreiheit unterscheidet uns ja im Wesenskern von Autokratien. Deshalb: Lassen Sie sich nicht in die Irre fГғВјhren von den rechtspopulistischen Kollegen hier: Der DSA bekГғВӨmpft eben illegale Inhalte und keine Meinung; der DSA ist ein Instrument, um geltendes Recht aus der Offline-Welt auch online durchzusetzen.

Wir dГғВјrfen uns aber auch nicht der Illusion hingeben, dass der DSA alleine das Problem von Hass, von Agitation und vor allen Dingen Desinformation im Internet lГғВ¶sen wГғВјrde, eben weil der grundlegende Konflikt unserer Zeit Autokratie versus Demokratie bleibt. Und allen voran sind es eben autokratische LГғВӨnder wie Russland, wie China, die unsere KГғВ¶pfe verwirren wollen, unsere Herzen verunsichern wollen und unsere Demokratie, unsere Gesellschaft vergiften wollen. Deshalb nehmen wir mit dem DSA auch Social-Media-Plattformen in die VerantwortungГӮВ ГўВҖВ“ als wesentliche Plattformen unserer Gesellschaft nehmen wir sie in diese Verantwortung. Sie mГғВјssen gegen Desinformation vorgehen und geltendes Recht durchsetzen, ohne Wenn und Aber, und daran werden wir sie auch messen und zur Verantwortung ziehen.

Aber vielmehr bleibt es eine gesamtgesellschaftliche Aufgabe, gegen diese autokratische Einflussnahme vorzugehen. Wir mГғВјssen unsere Demokratie verteidigen, und dazu sind nun mal die SchlГғВјssel Bildung, AufklГғВӨrung und Medienkompetenz, denn wir mГғВјssen die Kraft der AufklГғВӨrung und die StГғВӨrke des Rechts diesem zerstГғВ¶rerischen Gift der Desinformation entgegensetzen, um unsere Demokratie gemeinsam zu verteidigen.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Alexandra Geese, im Namen der Verts/ALE-Fraktion. ГўВҖВ“ Herr PrГғВӨsident, Frau Kommissarin, sehr verehrte Kolleginnen und Kollegen! Gestern hat Meta endlich Putins Propagandakanal RT verboten, der in Europa aufgrund der Kriegspropaganda schon lange sanktioniert ist. Es hat also lange gedauert, bis Meta bereit war, endlich auf einen kleinen Teil seines Profits zu verzichten, den es mit dieser staatlich organisierten russischen PropagandaГўВҖВ‘ und Desinformationsmaschine verdient.

Das nennt ГғВјbrigens die rechte Seite dieses Hauses Meinungsfreiheit. Ja, wir haben das erfahren diese Woche: Die russische Agentur SDA wollte, dass die AfD in Deutschland ГғВјber 20ГӮВ % bekommt, deswegen interveniert sie bei uns in unserer Demokratie. Das nennen Sie Meinungsfreiheit? Fragen Sie doch mal die Opposition in Russland, was sie von Putins Meinungsfreiheit hГғВӨlt.

Aber warum ist diese Desinformation denn eigentlich so machtvoll? Das gab es schon zu Zeiten der Sowjetunion, das ist jetzt ГғВјberhaupt kein neues Konzept. Aber sie ist jetzt so machtvoll, weil die Plattformen in der gleichen Mannschaft spielenГӮВ ГўВҖВ“ sei es TikTok, sei es Google mit YouTube, sei es Meta: Mit ihren Algorithmen sorgen sie dafГғВјr, dass extremistische Botschaften, dass alles, was auf Angst und Wut setzt, viel mehr Reichweite bekommt als all das, was demokratische Politikerinnen und Politiker mit sachlichen Inhalten, mit positiven Emotionen erreichen kГғВ¶nnen.

Das ist jetzt unsere Aufgabe in Europa mit dem Digital Services Act. Es ist gut, dass wir Plattformen zur Rechenschaft ziehen, die unsere Kinder gefГғВӨhrden, die MГғВӨdchen in die Magersucht fГғВјhren. Es ist gut, dass wir einen Blick auf EГўВҖВ‘Commerce und diese Plattformen haben. Aber fГғВјr echte Meinungsfreiheit brauchen wir doch mehr. Die heutige Funktionsweise von sozialen Medien gefГғВӨhrdet die Demokratie selbst in ihrer Essenz. Wenn Plattformen extremistischen Botschaften systematisch FlГғВјgel verleihen, wenn sie LГғВјgen an viel mehr Menschen ausspielen als Fakten, dann wird Demokratie unmГғВ¶glich.

FГғВјr eine wahre Demokratie brauchen wir Algorithmen, die allen Meinungen den gleichen Raum geben, denn BГғВјrgerinnen und BГғВјrger sollen selbst entscheiden, was in ihrer Timeline zu sehen ist. Das wollen wir nicht skrupellosen MilliardГғВӨren mit fragwГғВјrdigen, undurchsichtigen GeschГғВӨftsmodellen ГғВјberlassen. Das ist Meinungsfreiheit, und dafГғВјr kГғВӨmpfen wir.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Estrella GalГғВЎn, en nombre del Grupo The Left. ГўВҖВ“ SeГғВұor presidente, seГғВұora comisaria, el pasado mes de julio la ComisiГғВіn Europea denunciГғВі el incumplimiento del Reglamento de Servicios Digitales por parte de la plataforma X. El seГғВұor Elon Musk respondiГғВі insultando y denigrando a la ComisiГғВіn.

SeГғВұora comisaria, ГӮВҝhasta cuГғВЎndo vamos a seguir usando una plataforma que no cumple la normativa europea? Estamos viendo cГғВіmo las redes sociales se han convertido en una suerte de ГӮВ«salvaje OesteГӮВ» donde todo vale. Bajo esa falsa defensa de la libertad de expresiГғВіn, en estas plataformas se permite vomitar odio, bulos, desinformaciГғВіn... impunemente. ГӮВҝDe verdad vamos a seguir consintiendo todo esto?

La promociГғВіn de la xenofobia, el machismo, la incitaciГғВіn al odio... estГғВЎ afectando gravemente a nuestra cohesiГғВіn social y tambiГғВ©n a la salud mental de muchos de nuestros jГғВіvenes, que son los mГғВЎs vulnerables. Al igual que hay consenso para acabar con el racismo y con la homofobia en nuestros centros de trabajo, en las escuelas, en nuestros barrios..., me gustarГғВӯa pensar que existe una mayorГғВӯa democrГғВЎtica en esta CГғВЎmara que defiende unas redes sociales libres de odio y de discriminaciГғВіn.

Es el momento de frenar esta deriva, seГғВұora comisaria. La ComisiГғВіn debe tomar medidas para asegurar que las plataformas digitales cumplan la ley. Urge reforzar la soberanГғВӯa digital europea. Necesitamos plataformas con funcionamiento democrГғВЎtico y transparente que dejen de estar al servicio de intereses privados y de la ideologГғВӯa de sus propietarios.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Sarah Knafo, au nom du groupe ESN. ГўВҖВ“ Monsieur le PrГғВ©sident, chers collГғВЁgues, pour avoir ГғВ©crit L'Archipel du Goulag, SoljГғВ©nitsyne a dГғВ» quitter son pays et s'exiler aux ГғВүtats-Unis. Pour avoir contestГғВ© la colonisation britannique, Gandhi a ГғВ©tГғВ© condamnГғВ© ГғВ  sixГӮВ ans de prison. Aujourd'hui, ce n'est pas ГғВ  Moscou que le fondateur de Telegram, PavelГӮВ Durov, a ГғВ©tГғВ© arrГғВӘtГғВ©, mais chez nous, dans la France d'EmmanuelГӮВ Macron. Ce n'est pas ГғВ  Cuba qu'ElonГӮВ Musk est empГғВӘchГғВ© de faire de Twitter un espace de libertГғВ©, mais chez nous, ГғВ  Bruxelles, dans l'Europe d'UrsulaГӮВ vonГӮВ derГӮВ Leyen. Chez nous, la civilisation qui devrait protГғВ©ger la libertГғВ© d'expression, mieux: qui l'a inventГғВ©e, que les EuropГғВ©ens sont muselГғВ©s, intimidГғВ©s, punis. Chez nous que la droite est rГғВ©duite au silence, censurГғВ©e sur les rГғВ©seaux sociaux, harcelГғВ©e par la justice, les associations et mГғВӘme les banques.

C'est dans mon pays, la France, que la chaГғВ®ne de tГғВ©lГғВ©vision C8 vient de se voir interdire d'ГғВ©mettre dans un silence quasi gГғВ©nГғВ©ral. C'est dans mon pays que de jeunes influenceurs se font bannir par Instagram, sans aucune explication. C'est dans mon pays, le pays des droits de l'homme, que le service public de l'audiovisuel, financГғВ© par nos impГғВҙts, dГғВ©cide de qui parle, de quoi on parle et de comment on en parle.

Pourtant, je vous le dis, on ne fait pas disparaГғВ®tre les opinions parce qu'on fait disparaГғВ®tre leur expression. Plus vous nous attaquerez et plus nous serons nombreux. Vous pouvez nous censurer, mais vous ne pouvez pas censurer le rГғВ©el. Ce qu'on ne peut pas voir ГғВ  la tГғВ©lГғВ©vision par votre faute, nous le voyons dans nos rues tous les jours. Vous n'empГғВӘcherez pas les EuropГғВ©ens de penser, vous n'empГғВӘcherez pas les EuropГғВ©ens de vivre, vous n'empГғВӘcherez pas les EuropГғВ©ens de vous dire: ГӮВ«Nous ne sommes pas des dГғВ©linquants, mais des dissidents.ГӮВ» Nous prГғВ©fГғВ©rerons toujours Tocqueville ГғВ  ThierryГӮВ Breton, ElonГӮВ Musk a UrsulaГӮВ vonГӮВ derГӮВ Leyen, la libertГғВ© ГғВ  la censure.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Pablo Arias EcheverrГғВӯa (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ SeГғВұor presidente, seГғВұora vicepresidenta ejecutiva de la ComisiГғВіn, el Reglamento de Servicios Digitales, mГғВЎs conocido como ГӮВ«DSAГӮВ», tiene como objetivo poner lГғВӯmites en el ГғВЎmbito digital: el riesgo de que la desinformaciГғВіn campe a sus anchas en internet y debilite nuestras democracias es una realidad, por eso se aprobaron el DSA y el Reglamento Europeo sobre la Libertad de los Medios de ComunicaciГғВіn, para preservar el derecho de todos a una informaciГғВіn veraz, para proteger la libertad de prensa, y no para promover la censura, y para que se respete la libertad editorial y la independencia de los medios pГғВәblicos.

Como saben, estas normas no dan en absoluto cobertura jurГғВӯdica a ninguna injerencia gubernamental, nacen precisamente para protegernos a todos frente a los que buscan polarizarnos, enfrentarnos y manipularnos. Por eso quiero hoy alertar a la ComisiГғВіn: el Plan de AcciГғВіn por la Democracia que hoy aprueba el Gobierno de EspaГғВұa es claramente contrario a la norma europea y su objeto es presionar a periodistas y medios de comunicaciГғВіn que estГғВЎn informando de las investigaciones judiciales y los casos de corrupciГғВіn en los que estГғВЎn involucrados miembros del Gobierno y su entorno mГғВЎs cercano. Sin duda, es un bulo gubernamental que este plan estГғВ© amparado en estos Reglamentos.

En consecuencia, pido a la ComisiГғВіn que garantice la correcta aplicaciГғВіn del DSA y el Reglamento Europeo sobre la Libertad de los Medios de ComunicaciГғВіn en toda la UniГғВіn Europea, que ponga especial atenciГғВіn para que los Estados miembros no utilicen y tergiversen estos Reglamentos para controlar los medios y que no decidan quГғВ© es veraz y quГғВ© es un bulo a su antojo con el fin de distraer y manipular sobre temas que estГғВЎn subГӮВ iudice. Como legisladores, nosotros ya hemos hecho nuestra tarea: dejen a los medios y periodistas hacer su trabajo y a la Justicia el suyo.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Ana Catarina Mendes (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ Senhor Presidente, Senhora ComissГғВЎria, Caros Colegas, julgo que nenhum de nГғВіs ignora que hГғВЎ um antes e um depois das novas tecnologias. HГғВЎ um antes e um depois das plataformas digitais e sabemos como a distorГғВ§ГғВЈo da utilizaГғВ§ГғВЈo das plataformas digitais pГғВөe em causa as nossas democracias.

Por esta razГғВЈo, ao longo dos tempos, as regras que definem os limites dessa comunicaГғВ§ГғВЈo tГғВӘm sido alteradas para acolher essas mesmas diferenГғВ§as. A ГғВәnica coisa que se tem de manter igual e inabalГғВЎvel ГғВ© mesmo a defesa radical da nossa liberdade, da privacidade e da democracia.

Os gigantes digitais e os utilizadores nГғВЈo estГғВЈo, nem nunca estiveram, em pГғВ© de igualdade. Foi, por isso, muito importante o Regulamento dos ServiГғВ§os Digitais, mas tambГғВ©m o Regulamento da InteligГғВӘncia Artificial, feito pela primeira vez e aprovado em dezembro de 2023. Este ГғВәltimo visa garantir a proteГғВ§ГғВЈo dos cidadГғВЈos mas, tambГғВ©m, a responsabilizaГғВ§ГғВЈo das plataformas pelos conteГғВәdos falsos, que muitas vezes ajudam a disseminar.

As notГғВӯcias falsas, a manipulaГғВ§ГғВЈo de imagens e de vГғВӯdeos e a propaganda falaciosa implicam um dano irrecuperГғВЎvel para as nossas democracias. Isso estГғВЎ bem visГғВӯvel no exacerbar de tensГғВөes, na visibilidade que os algoritmos dГғВЈo aos discursos de ГғВіdio e xenГғВіfobos e no questionamento da prГғВіpria legitimidade democrГғВЎtica das nossas instituiГғВ§ГғВөes.

Sabemos bem que para defender a democracia nГғВЈo podemos beliscar os nossos direitos, liberdades e garantias. Liberdade, sim, mas responsabilidade tambГғВ©m. No espaГғВ§o online, como no espaГғВ§o offline, a UniГғВЈo Europeia terГғВЎ mesmo de continuar a procurar um caminho que garanta o respeito pela privacidade que nos fortalece a todos e pela liberdade que nos define.

Por conseguinte, a UniГғВЈo Europeia tem de estar na linha da frente deste equilГғВӯbrio, entre a modernidade da inteligГғВӘncia artificial e das plataformas tecnolГғВіgicas e o respeito pelos direitos, pelas liberdades e garantias. Porque nГғВЈo se trata apenas de defender as plataformas, trata-se de defender a nossa democracia e a nossa liberdade.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ ErnГ…В‘ Schaller-Baross (PfE). ГўВҖВ“ ElnГғВ¶k ГғВҡr! Az EurГғВіpai UniГғВі digitГғВЎlis szolgГғВЎltatГғВЎsokrГғВіl szГғВіlГғВі jogszabГғВЎlya elviekben az internet ГғВЎtlГғВЎthatГғВіsГғВЎgГғВЎt hivatott szolgГғВЎlni. Azt szabГғВЎlyozza, hogy az illegГғВЎlis ГғВ©s kГғВЎros tartalmakat mikГғВ©nt kell kezelni a weboldalakon. Azonban azt, hogy mi a kГғВЎros ГғВ©s veszГғВ©lyes, ki dГғВ¶nti el? ГғВүs ez egy nagyon fontos kГғВ©rdГғВ©s. MikГғВ©ppen az elsГ…В‘ elemzГғВ©sek ГғВ©s a gyakorlati tapasztalatok is mutatjГғВЎk, ez a jogszabГғВЎly sajnos nem nГғВ©lkГғВјlГғВ¶zi a hibГғВЎkat. TГғВ¶bbek kГғВ¶zГғВ¶tt a vГғВ©grehajtГғВЎsi eljГғВЎrГғВЎsaiba integrГғВЎltГғВЎk a szakmainak aposztrofГғВЎlt, azonban politikai ГғВ©rdekcsoportok ГғВЎltal mozgatott NGO szfГғВ©rГғВЎt is, mГғВЎr megint.

ГғВҡgy vГғВ©lem, hogy ennek komoly kГғВ¶vetkezmГғВ©nyei lehetnek, hiszen nem hivatalos ГғВЎllami szervek vagy bГғВӯrГғВіsГғВЎgok dГғВ¶nthetik el, hogy egy adott tartalom vajon gyГ…ВұlГғВ¶letkeltГ…В‘ tartalomnak, vagy ГғВ©ppen ГғВЎlhГғВӯrnek minГ…В‘sГғВјl-e ma EurГғВіpГғВЎban, hanem egy magГғВЎn ГғВ©rdekcsoportok ГғВЎltal mozgatott NGO-kbГғВіl ГғВЎllГғВі nemzetkГғВ¶zi hГғВЎlГғВіzat. A digitГғВЎlis szolgГғВЎltatГғВЎsokrГғВіl szГғВіlГғВі uniГғВіs jogszabГғВЎly tehГғВЎt szГғВЎmos kГғВ©rdГғВ©st, aggodalmat vet fel arra vonatkozГғВіan, hogy a jogszabГғВЎly a jГғВ¶vГ…В‘ben mennyire lesz kГғВ©pes biztosГғВӯtani a szГғВіlГғВЎsszabadsГғВЎg tГғВ©nyleges ГғВ©rvГғВ©nyesГғВјlГғВ©sГғВ©t a kontinensГғВјnkГғВ¶n. Ezek jogos aggodalmak, kГғВ©rem Biztos Asszonyt, hogy foglalkozzanak a kГғВ©rdГғВ©ssel.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Denis Nesci (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Signor Presidente, signora Commissaria, onorevoli colleghi, l'entrata in vigore del DSA ГғВЁ stata salutata come il raggiungimento di un elevato livello di tutela per gli utenti e i consumatori della rete, per le PMI e per le startГўВҖВ‘up da potenziali abusi delle Big Tech.

I primi passi, invece, sono andati nella direzione di un'arbitraria maggiore restrizione della libertГғВ  di espressione e di controllo del dibattito pubblico.

Sarebbe stato interessante, questa mattina, confrontarsi direttamente con l'ormai ex commissario per il mercato interno Breton, che lo scorso agosto ha pubblicato su X una lettera, dalla quale la stessa von der Leyen aveva preso le distanze, che invitava la piattaforma a non diffondere fake news e a moderare i contenuti in vista del dialogo tra Elon Musk e Donald Trump.

Ora, quello che tutti i consumatori e gli utenti si chiedono ГғВЁ: la prossima Commissione vorrГғВ  sviluppare il DSA come strumento di tutela dagli abusi o come strumento di abuso? Noi ovviamente ci auguriamo che scelga la prima strada.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Billy Kelleher (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ Mr President, what is being broadcast and disseminated on X and other social media platforms is sowing seeds of disharmony in our Union and, sadly, facilitating violence on our streets. Last month, violence erupted on the streets of Belfast in Ireland. It was encouraged and spurred on by the comments of the owner of X, Elon Musk. His comments were about civil war and, I believe, a deliberate attempt to ratchet up the rhetoric and antagonise people.

As a liberal, I will defend a person's right to freedom of speech and expression, and their fundamental rights. However, as a democrat, I cannot support the right of a person to incite hate or violence and undermine our democratic systems with misinformation and disinformation for nefarious motivation.

This is the challenge we as parliamentarians face ГўВҖВ“ to balance these two often competing objectives. We are not the United States. There are no First Amendment rights. There are no universal rights to freedom of speech. We need to be very careful in the weeks and months ahead that nefarious actors do not use social media platforms under the guise of free speech to undermine our democratic systems and cause violence and havoc on our streets.

Finally, I want to wish Michael McGrath, my colleague from Ireland, the very best in his new appointment to the Commission, where he will be in charge of the European Democracy Shield, which is now more and more important than ever.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ PreГ…Вҹedinte. ГўВҖВ“ StimaГҲВӣi colegi, am primit mai multe cereri de ГўВҖВһcatch-the-eyeГўВҖВқ, suntem destul de presaГҲВӣi cu timpul, aГҲВҷa cГ„Вғ voi ГғВ®nchide procedura ГўВҖВһcatch-the-eyeГўВҖВқ. Mai avem o orГ„Вғ de dezbatere ГҲВҷi vom vedea, ГғВ®n funcГҲВӣie de timpul rГ„Вғmas, cГғВўte intervenГҲВӣii vor fi posibile. Voi lua cГғВўt mai multe.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ MarkГғВ©ta GregorovГғВЎ (Verts/ALE). ГўВҖВ“ Mr President, dear colleagues, every European with an internet connection is exposed to the unregulated, commercial, surveillance-based social media. These trillion-dollar companies destroy our attention span, our democratic institutions and trust, and our mental health for a little profit.

The DSA ГўВҖВ“ as ambitious as it was in the beginning ГўВҖВ“ has not shown its enforceable teeth yet. Our current legal framework must ultimately lead towards algorithmic transparency so that everyone can regain agency to what they are recommended online. Information technology is too important to be controlled exclusively by the rich and the intelligence agencies.

The DSA and our framework of rules must set a path for a surveillance-free, private and secure way to take part in the online sphere. That is the goal ГўВҖВ“ not unilateral decisions about individual imprisonments and attempts to surveil anyone and everyone, which would be directed to the Hungarian Presidency if they were here.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Fidias Panayiotou (NI). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ President, perhaps I'm one of the most qualified members of the European Parliament to talk about social media platforms as I myself am a social media influencer by profession.

I believe that the Digital Services Act is a positive step forwards, but I want to focus more on an important aspect of it. I strongly believe the way to fight hate speech and disinformation is definitely not censorship. Instead, I will propose that we encourage the platforms to create organic fact-checking systems to inform their users about the validity of the information they receive. A good example of this is Twitter's Community Node, which allows its users to highlight information when they believe that it is factually incorrect.

Now, in an era of artificial intelligence, more than ever, we need to focus on what is actually true ГўВҖВ“ not by censoring but by letting people know the facts and freely deciding.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Arba Kokalari (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Herr talman och kommissionГғВӨr Vestager! Vi har fГғВҘtt pГғВҘ plats en historisk lag som sГғВӨtter tydliga krav och spelregler fГғВ¶r sociala mediajГғВӨttar fГғВ¶r att stoppa kriminalitet online och vГғВӨrna friheten pГғВҘ nГғВӨtet fГғВ¶r vanliga mГғВӨnniskor.

FГғВ¶r samtidigt som EU:s nya digitallag, DSA, har trГғВӨtt i kraft ser vi hur gГғВӨngkriminella i Sverige rekryterar ГғВ¶ppet pГғВҘ sociala medier. PГғВҘ TikTok, pГғВҘ Snapchat, pГғВҘ Telegram letar man upp minderГғВҘriga fГғВ¶r morduppdrag. Vi har svenska barnsoldater som hyrs in via annonser pГғВҘ nГғВӨtet fГғВ¶r att begГғВҘ brott i Danmark. GГғВӨngkriminaliteten har inga grГғВӨnser. Den rГғВ¶r sig ГғВ¶ver landsgrГғВӨnserna och den rГғВ¶r sig ГғВ¶ppet online.

Det som hГғВӨnder online just nu ГғВӨr en del av det gГғВӨngkrig vi ser pГғВҘ vГғВҘra gator med stora konsekvenser fГғВ¶r mГғВӨnniskors trygghet. Jag, som en av de ansvariga fГғВ¶r den hГғВӨr lagen, kommer att driva pГғВҘ den nya EU-kommissionen att tvinga de hГғВӨr techjГғВӨttarna att fГғВ¶lja de lagar vi faktiskt har i EU. FГғВ¶r nu ГғВӨr det slut pГғВҘ ursГғВӨkter.

Nu ГғВӨr det upp till bevis fГғВ¶r techjГғВӨttarna att leverera fГғВ¶r att sГғВӨtta stopp fГғВ¶r kriminaliteten online och sГғВӨkerstГғВӨlla att de sociala medierna och vГғВҘrt digitala liv blir en trygg miljГғВ¶ fГғВ¶r oss alla.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Christel Schaldemose (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ President, even though we pay no entry fee to use social media, they come at a cost. And that cost is becoming too high for our society, our democracy and our well-being.

From all over the world, we hear calls for a safer and a fairer social media. Citizens call for social media to be free from disinformation, manipulative content and foreign interference. Parents call for social media to be safe for their children to use without seeing harmful content. And users call for control over the own data.

In the S&D Group, we do hear those calls and we answer those calls. Under the S&D leadership, with the DSA, we won the first fight between lawmakers and social media, and we ended the Wild West online.

For the first time, social media platforms in Europe are now liable for the algorithms. They must not become a megaphone for illegal content, for disinformation or harm public health. But, in order to make sure that this also is the real life out there, we call upon the Commission to really take on the role as the sheriff of this new online world.

We really need to make sure that we use the tools we granted the Commission by the DSA. We need to make sure that we have a strong implementation and a strong enforcement. We need to make sure that our kids are safe. We need to make sure that our democracy is not destroyed.

I do think that we need to see the Commission speed up the implementation and enforcement. And if you need more resources, we have to look at that. I also think that it is important to say that if the DSA is not enough to make sure that we have a safe social media world, then we also need to be open to do more, for instance, to look at better rules around age verification.

S&D, we hear the calls, we will keep on fighting to make sure that we can be safe online as we are offline.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Sebastian Kruis (PfE). ГўВҖВ“ Voorzitter, Elon Musk heeft op zijn socialmediaplatform, X, een interview afgenomen met president Trump. Frans Eurocommunist Breton zag in de aankondiging van vorige maand aanleiding om in de pen te klimmen en deГӮВ heer Musk een brief te sturen, waarin hij dreigde allerlei maatregelen te nemen als het interview niet aan het gewenste linkse wereldbeeld zou voldoen. Op dat moment was nog niets uitgezonden of online geplaatst.

Er is niets verkeerds aan om een platform te geven aan een presidentskandidaat, van welke politieke kleur dan ook. Zo gaat links echter te werk: vrijheid van meningsuiting totdat men het er niet meer mee eens is. Dan word je verdacht gemaakt, gediskwalificeerd en weggezet door Brusselse eurocraten ГўВҖВ“ of erger nog, vermoord door islamitische terroristen. De leider van de grootste partij in Nederland, GeertГӮВ Wilders, wordt al twintig jaar 24 uur per dag zwaar beveiligd tegen islamitische terroristen die hem vanwege zijn mening willen vermoorden. De vrijheid van meningsuiting is de enige vrijheid die hij nog heeft.

Het kan niet zo zijn dat de Europese Commissie aan de kant staat van degenen die de vrijheid van meningsuiting de nek om willen draaien. Ze zou juist aan de kant moeten staan van degenen die deze vrijheid verdedigen.

Aan welke kant staat u, mevrouw Vestager?

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ PreГ…Вҹedinte. ГўВҖВ“ Domnule Sieper, avem un cartonaГҲВҷ albastru, ГғВ®nsГ„Вғ sunteГҲВӣi ГғВ®nscris ГҲВҷi la ГўВҖВһcatch-the-eyeГўВҖВқ. Este ori asta, ori ГўВҖВһcatch-the-eyeГўВҖВқ, nu amГғВўndouГ„Вғ. OK, continuГ„Вғm lista de discuГҲВӣii, domnul ZГ…ВӮotowski Kosma.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Kosma ZГ…ВӮotowski (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Panie PrzewodniczГ„В…cy! Pani Komisarz! Media spoГ…ВӮecznoГ…Вӣciowe to wspГғВіГ…ВӮczesna globalna agora, miejsce handlu, wymiany poglГ„В…dГғВіw, aktywnoГ…Вӣci politycznej, ale takГ…Вјe doskonaГ…ВӮa przestrzeГ…В„ do siania dezinformacji, czyli prowadzenia wojny hybrydowej. RegulujГ„В…c ten obszar Internetu, chcieliГ…Вӣmy zapewniГ„ВҮ lepszГ„В… ochronГ„Вҷ praw uГ…ВјytkownikГғВіw oraz ograniczyГ„ВҮ samowolГ„Вҷ platform, ktГғВіre podejmowaГ…ВӮy decyzje w oparciu o niejasne wewnГ„Вҷtrzne regulaminy, usuwaГ…ВӮy treГ…Вӣci i blokowaГ…ВӮy konta bez uzasadnienia.

Nie moГ…Вјemy jednak zgodziГ„ВҮ siГ„Вҷ na to, Г…Вјe przyjГ„Вҷte w dobrej wierze przepisy sГ„В… wykorzystywane jako broГ…В„ w walce politycznej. TakГ…Вјe wykorzystywanie unijnych regulacji jako pretekstu do ingerencji w proces wyborczy nie moГ…Вјe siГ„Вҷ nigdy wiГ„Вҷcej powtГғВіrzyГ„ВҮ. Europa nie moГ…Вјe iГ…ВӣГ„ВҮ drogГ„В… paГ…В„stw niedemokratycznych i dyktatur, gdzie dostГ„Вҷp do sieci jest ograniczany, treГ…Вӣci cenzurowane, a prawo zamiast chroniГ„ВҮ obywateli, broni jedynie interesГғВіw wГ…ВӮadzy.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Sandro Gozi (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ Monsieur le PrГғВ©sident, chГғВЁre Madame la Commissaire, chers collГғВЁgues, je voudrais attirer votre attention sur la plateformeГӮВ X, anciennement Twitter. PremiГғВЁrement, en raison des rГғВ©ductions drastiques de ses ГғВ©quipes, X n'est plus en mesure de se conformer au rГғВЁglement sur les services numГғВ©riques et de modГғВ©rer efficacement les crises comme les ГғВ©vГғВ©nements ГғВ  CapitolГӮВ Hill ou les rГғВ©centes ГғВ©meutes au Royaume-Uni. Au lieu de les contenir, X a plutГғВҙt jouГғВ© le rГғВҙle d'accГғВ©lГғВ©rateur.

DeuxiГғВЁmement, des recherches montrent que l'algorithme deГӮВ X pousse des contenus politiquement proches des opinions de son propriГғВ©taire qui n'hГғВ©site plus ГғВ  afficher ses sympathies. Les utilisateurs sont exposГғВ©s ГғВ  des contenus polarisants souvent orientГғВ©s et violents. Il s'agit d'un choix ГғВ©ditorial clair. DГғВЁs lors, X n'est plus une simple plateforme neutre, mais un vГғВ©ritable produit ГғВ©ditorial. Cela implique de nouvelles responsabilitГғВ©s, notamment lГғВ©gales, et Musk ne peut pas prГғВ©tendre ГғВ  une irresponsabilitГғВ© totale. Ces questions sont cruciales pour le dГғВ©bat dГғВ©mocratique et la libertГғВ© d'information.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Kim Van Sparrentak (Verts/ALE). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ President, dear Commissioner, big social media platforms have become our main space for public debates. And because we did nothing for a very long time, the algorithms of a few powerful, money-hungry corporations are now the referees of this debate. And their only goal is to keep us online as long as possible.

But last year the DSA entered into force and we hoped we would see a big change: that content deemed too queer wouldn't be taken down without notice; that harmful disinformation wouldn't be spread all over the place and people would no longer be dragged into extreme content.

But this is what makes these companies the most money, so we hardly see any change. We clearly need to strengthen the DSA, starting with the code of practice on disinformation. It needs to be more concrete and enforceable.

And let's finally tackle the recommender systems that are based on clicks and interaction, because they suck people into swamps of radical content, disinformation and misogyny.

Parliament has been clear: the next priority for the new Commission has to present new rules on addictive design. Let's do what we can to safeguard our children, our people, our societies and our democracies.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Tomislav Sokol (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ PoГ…ВЎtovani predsjedavajuГ„ВҮi, povjerenice, kolegice i kolege, stvaranje jedinstvenog digitalnog trГ…ВҫiГ…ВЎta, a naroГ„ВҚito onog koje jamГ„ВҚi sigurnost potroГ…ВЎaГ„ВҚa na internetu, nije lak zadatak.

Zato donoГ…ВЎenjem DSA-a nismo donijeli samo pravila o uklanjanju nelegalnog sadrГ…Вҫaja s interneta, nego smo otiГ…ВЎli korak dalje. Da bismo zaГ…ВЎtitili one najranjivije meГ„В‘u nama, djecu i maloljetnike, zabranili smo ciljana oglaГ…ВЎavanja prema njima. Nadalje, aktom o digitalnim uslugama obvezali smo internetske platforme da detaljno provjere trgovce Г„ВҚije proizvode nude na svojim stranicama.

Uz to, vaГ…Вҫno je istaknuti da smo DSA-om dobili mehanizme kojima se moГ…Вҫemo boriti protiv Г…ВЎirenja laГ…Вҫnih sadrГ…Вҫaja na internetu. Dezinformacije mogu biti izuzetno opasne i koristiti se od stranih sila za Г…ВЎirenje njihovog utjecaja u Europi, i to vidimo, naГ…Вҫalost, svaki dan. MeГ„В‘utim, ovdje moramo biti vrlo oprezni. Borba protiv laГ…Вҫnih vijesti ne smije se pretvoriti u ograniГ„ВҚavanje slobode govora i obraГ„ВҚun s ideoloГ…ВЎkim neistomiГ…ВЎljenicima. Niti jedna politiГ„ВҚka opcija, pa niti ona lijeva, nema monopol na istinu. DSA se zato ne smije koristiti za cenzuru onih koji misle drugaГ„ВҚije i zadatak je nas u ovoj, u primjeni DSA-a naГ„ВҮi pravi balans izmeГ„В‘u jednog i drugog.

Zato, da bismo izbjegli neГ…Вҫeljene nuspojave novog zakona, moramo raditi na njegovoj ispravnoj provedbi. Korak u pravom smjeru je zato formiranje tima za DSA, s predstavnicima u svakoj drГ…Вҫavi Г„ВҚlanici.

Kolegice i kolege, nakon Г…ВЎto je DSA stupio na snagu, kljuГ„ВҚno je da sada osiguramo njegovu ispravnu primjenu i time zajamГ„ВҚimo sigurnost korisnika na internetu.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Alvise PГғВ©rez (NI). ГўВҖВ“ SeГғВұor presidente, me hago una pregunta: ГӮВҝquГғВ© ocurrirГғВӯa con este sistema de vigilancia y censura si la desinformaciГғВіn viniera en el futuro de la propia ComisiГғВіn Europea, como ya ocurre hoy dГғВӯa con grandes medios supuestamente oficiales? ГӮВҝDГғВіnde han detenido al fundador de Telegram por proteger la independencia de su propio negocio, de su propia red social? No ha sido en Rusia, seГғВұorГғВӯas, ha sido en Francia. ГӮВҝQuiГғВ©n ha amenazado al seГғВұor Elon Musk, dueГғВұo de X? No ha sido Putin, no ha sido el presidente de China, ha sido la ComisiГғВіn Europea.

El Reglamento de Servicios Digitales pretende decidir quГғВ© es real y quГғВ© es un bulo; no pretende luchar contra la desinformaciГғВіn y el odio, tan solo darle a la ComisiГғВіn Europea el poder de presionar a periodistas para poder censurar perfiles y censurar redes sociales sin sentencia judicial alguna.ГӮВ DeГӮВ facto, y cuesta decirlo, se trata de una ГӮВ«UniГғВіn SoviГғВ©tica digitalГӮВ» contraria a los valores fundacionales europeos que tanto queremos respetar aquГғВӯ.

Necesitamos, es cierto, dar instrumentos a los europeos para discernir las falacias de lo que son los bulos, necesitamos que la realidad, que es interpretativa, se adapte a la legislaciГғВіn, pero, seГғВұorГғВӯas, con notas de verificaciГғВіn colaborativas, sГғВӯ, voluntarias, no que un burГғВіcrata europeo pueda eliminar tu perfil o negocio digital porque considere, subjetivamente, que mientes. ГӮВҝO hablamos del tabГғВә de lo que ocurriГғВі aquГғВӯ, con informes cientГғВӯficos oficiales y censurados, bajo laГўВҖВҰ

(el presidente retira la palabra al orador)

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Laura BallarГғВӯn Cereza (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ SeГғВұor presidente, seГғВұorГғВӯas, ГӮВҝes libertad de expresiГғВіn incitar a linchamientos de inmigrantes tras la acusaciГғВіn falsa de asesinato de un niГғВұo, como pasГғВі este verano por parte de una seГғВұorГғВӯa que acaba de intervenir? ГӮВҝO acaso es libertad de expresiГғВіn alimentar falsas teorГғВӯas de fraude electoral o tesis antivacunas, o decir que las mujeres de presidentes del Gobierno en realidad son hombres trans?

No disfracemos de libertad de expresiГғВіn y de verdad lo que en realidad es apologГғВӯa del totalitarismo: la extrema derecha ha encontrado en las redes sociales el vehГғВӯculo perfecto para esparcir bulos, de forma masiva, con un triple objetivo. En primer lugar, acabar con nuestra democracia desde dentro llenando los espacios pГғВәblicos en lГғВӯnea de rabia y de mentiras para favorecer el voto ultra; en segundo lugar, incentivar el odio contra los inmigrantes vinculando criminalidad con lugar de origen, y en tercer lugar, ejercer la violencia sistemГғВЎtica contra las mujeres con deepfakes y alentando el acoso de las mujeres en lГғВӯnea para acallarnos.

Las redes sociales, gracias a los algoritmos, es decir, de forma premeditada, se han convertido en el hogar de los sembradores de racismo, de machismo y de negacionismo, pero los europeos hemos dicho basta, y pedimos al resto del mundo, tal como hizo Brasil, que nos acompaГғВұen en este camino.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Laura BallarГғВӯn Cereza (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ Elon Musk, your platform is a cancer to our democracies. But we Europeans, we said 'enough'. Meta, TikTok, this is also about you. We will continue to investigate and punish every illegality you permit and, of course, you commit. We already set up a vaccine ГўВҖВ“ a shield to protect our democracy from the disinformation pandemic: the Digital Services Act. Because there is no freedom in fake news. There is no freedom in hate and violence. In Europe, there is no freedom without rules.

But we won't stop here. We ask the international organisations to promote global standards, to hold you accountable everywhere and to stop this hate spiral. We remain vigilant. The law of the jungle online is finally over.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ PreГ…Вҹedinte. ГўВҖВ“ Domnule PГғВ©rez Alvise, nu pot sГ„Вғ vГ„Вғ dau timpul pentru cГ„Вғ aГҲВӣi vorbit ГҲВҷi cu 30 de secunde peste ГҲВҷi aГҲВӣi avut ГҲВҷi timp de vorbire. Trebuie sГ„Вғ fim egalitari ГғВ®n ceea ce priveГҲВҷte timpul de vorbire. Domnul Vandendriessche.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Tom Vandendriessche (PfE). ГўВҖВ“ Voorzitter, hetgeen waarvoor ik twee jaar geleden waarschuwde, is werkelijkheid geworden: de Europese Unie bedreigt de vrijheid van meningsuiting op sociale media en ondermijnt daarmee het fundament van onze democratie. DeГӮВ digitaledienstenverordening werd gepresenteerd als bescherming en zogenaamde veiligheid. De daadwerkelijke agenda blijkt echter censuur en controle te zijn.

De beleidsmakers van de Europese Unie willen bepalen wat de waarheid is en wat burgers nog mogen zeggen en te horen krijgen. Wie kritiek heeft op hun geforceerde massamigratie, criminaliseren ze als haatzaaier. Wie hun klimaatreligie niet gelooft, zetten ze weg als klimaatnegationist. Met de digitaledienstenverordening trachten ze de oppositie tegen hun waanzinnige beleid monddood te maken. Machthebbers worden nu eenmaal niet graag tegengesproken en willen altijd aan de macht blijven.

In een democratie moeten alle stemmen kunnen worden geuit en gehoord, omdat niemand de waarheid in pacht heeft en burgers vrij zijn. Welke democraat is immers bang voor andere meningen?

Het Vlaams Belang is dan ook van oordeel dat de vrijheid van meningsuiting zo ruim mogelijk moet zijn en dat zaken die offline legaal zijn, dat online ook moeten zijn.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Tobiasz BocheГ…В„ski (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ President, freedom of speech is a cornerstone of Western civilisation. Our ancestors fought for it against oligarchs, tyrants and other enemies of freedom.

Today we see that this freedom is again under siege. But enemies have new names: political correctness, hate speech and government control. There is no freedom where bureaucrats can decide how debate looks like.

We have to prepare legislation to protect our freedom because it's now endangered by the European Commission's arbitrary power. We don't want to live in the world depicted by George Orwell in his famous book 1984.ГӮВ Unfortunately, there are no legal restraints to European Commission's arbitrary power.

One of the greatest means of protection against arbitrary power is freedom of speech. To fight for it our moral and political obligation. The enemies of freedom are always the same.

(The President cut off the speaker)

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Veronika CifrovГғВЎ OstrihoГ…ВҲovГғВЎ (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ VГғВЎГ…ВҫenГғВҪ pГғВЎn predsedajГғВәci, je rok 2024 a na sociГғВЎlnych sieГ…ВҘach je 59 % vГ…ВЎetkГғВҪch EurГғВіpanov a EurГғВіpaniek.

Neexistuje, aby o tom, Г„ВҚo tam konzumujeme, rozhodovali mimo EurГғВіpskej ГғВәnie a bez akГғВҪchkoГ„Вҫvek nГғВЎsledkov. Neexistuje, aby boli Г…Вҫeny dennodenne na internete urГғВЎГ…ВҫanГғВ© za svoju prГғВЎcu. Neexistuje, aby svetu online vlГғВЎdli zavГғВЎdzajГғВәce obchodnГғВ© praktiky. Aby sa faloГ…ВЎnГғВ© sprГғВЎvy Г…ВЎГғВӯrili ako oheГ…ВҲ na ГғВәkor faktov.

Let's not forget that social media is, first and foremost, a business. It's great that we have a space to connect, create and enjoy. And owing to the EU and the DSA, we now have a tool to make this business the way we all want it, to make it fair. The decisions of a single person should not have undue influence, and the power of algorithms cannot be placed above facts.

I stand here today to assure you that when it comes to what happens online, we will use the same tactics that the social media companies often use on our citizens ГўВҖВ“ strict ones. But unlike theirs, ours will be fair.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Regina Doherty (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ Mr President, Commissioner, only 2ГӮВ weeks ago, a survey of over 7ГӮВ 000 schoolchildren in Ireland showed that over a quarter of them had been impacted by harmful content online, including harassment, direct contact by strangers and exposure to unsolicited content. And as a mother to four young people, that fills me with real fear and dread.

And this is one of the reasons why the Digital Services Act was introduced ГўВҖВ“ to protect our youngest and our most vulnerable citizens. The laws aim to achieve an important but simple principle: what is illegal offline should be illegal online. And it also extends to misusing somebody's personal data, content promoting incitement or hatred or terrorism, or indeed undermining our democracy.

So in my view, the root of this must include tackling the algorithms that promote the content that we abhor and that we see daily. And while the Act has been in place now for a number of months, I think it's too early yet to judge its effectiveness.

But right now it's absolutely vital that we ensure all of our local individual enforcement authorities across every Member State, including ComisiГғВәn na MeГғВЎn in Ireland, are fully resourced both financially and with personnel to do the job that we want them to do. No more should the online space be a Wild West for safety and data rights.

However, there is a fine line. We have to be clear: the online and digital economy offers huge benefits and it is an indispensable part of our modern economy and society. And that is why, in seeking to uphold the law, we must not smother innovation, creativity or competitiveness. Europe must be a place where digital industries can grow, develop and compete.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Brando Benifei (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ Signor Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, il Digital Services Act responsabilizza, finalmente, e protegge i cittadini europei da disinformazione e fake news, ponendo dei limiti all'azione delle piattaforme.

La Commissione europea ha svolto un lavoro importante, ma c'ГғВЁ ancora molto da fare. PerГғВІ, del resto, se Trump non ГғВЁ contento, penso che siamo sulla strada giusta. E anche gli Stati membri, i garanti della privacy, vanno nella stessa direzione. Mi riferisco, per esempio, al divieto assoluto della pubblicitГғВ  targetizzata nei confronti dei minori.

Serve perГғВІ andare oltre. Ad esempio, grazie al regolamento europeo sull'intelligenza artificiale, abbiamo aggiunto tra i sistemi ad alto rischio, e quindi maggiormente regolati, quelli che operano nell'ambito dei processi democratici. Abbiamo introdotto poi l'obbligo di etichettare chiaramente un contenuto generato da intelligenza artificiale per contrastare l'abuso dei deep fake.

Proteggere quindi la nostra democrazia dalla disinformazione ГғВЁ proteggere il nostro futuro. Vale in Europa, ma vale anche a livello globale.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Jorge BuxadГғВ© Villalba (PfE). ГўВҖВ“ SeГғВұor presidente, en EspaГғВұa el Gobierno de SГғВЎnchez, invocando el Reglamento de Servicios Digitales, aprobarГғВЎ hoy su plan para amordazar los medios crГғВӯticos afirmando que en EspaГғВұa la democracia estГғВЎ asediada por campaГғВұas de desinformaciГғВіn, presiones a periodistas y corruptelas, pero los ГғВәnicos que estГғВЎn asediados por la corrupciГғВіn y ponen en peligro a la democracia son la esposa y el hermano de SГғВЎnchez, su partido y su Gobierno, y los ГғВәnicos que sufren la presiГғВіn y la amenaza son los jueces y los espaГғВұoles de a pie.

Lo dije en la pasada legislatura: bajo la expresiГғВіn ГӮВ«discursos de odioГӮВ» se esconde la mayor operaciГғВіn de censura en la historia moderna. Cuando un tipo como SГғВЎnchez dice proteger la democracia poniendo bozales virtuales a los ciudadanos libres, estamos ante el ГғВәltimo paso ante la autocracia, una vez rendidas todas las instituciones de control por los vergonzosos pactos con el Partido Popular. Detenciones de ciudadanos britГғВЎnicos por tuitear sobre la invasiГғВіn migratoria que sufre Europa; la amenaza de un comisario a Elon Musk por entrevistar a Donald Trump; la ocultaciГғВіn inicial de los dosГӮВ intentos de asesinato del candidato republicano a la presidencia de los Estados Unidos; las ГғВіrdenes ilegales del juez De Moraes y Lula en Brasil para que X cancelara cuentas e incluso su prohibiciГғВіnГўВҖВҰ A propГғВіsito, el Amazonas ya no les preocupa, ГӮВҝno?

Ustedes no tienen vergГғВјenza: he oГғВӯdo aquГғВӯ decir a una diputada socialista que Twitter es un cГғВЎncer, cuando todo el mundo en Europa sabe que el cГғВЎncer es el socialismo. Cada dГғВӯa somos mГғВЎs los que vemos que Orwell escribiГғВі suГӮВ 1984 pensando en Bruselas y en el Colegio de Comisarios reunido con los megamillonarios para conspirar contra la libertad de opiniГғВіn, pero la bandera de la libertad de opiniГғВіn estГғВЎ alzada y, con orgullo, la llevamos los patriotas.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Laurence Trochu (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Monsieur le PrГғВ©sident, Madame la Commissaire, mes chers collГғВЁgues, le chemin de l'enfer est pavГғВ© de bonnes intentions, nous enseigne avec sagesse saintГӮВ Bernard deГӮВ Clairvaux, figure du monachisme, ГғВ  qui l'Europe doit tant. C'est en effet pour rГғВ©pondre ГғВ  des inquiГғВ©tudes lГғВ©gitimes qu'est souhaitГғВ© le renforcement du rГғВЁglement sur les services numГғВ©riques, le DSA: lutte contre la criminalitГғВ©, diffusion du terrorisme ou encore dГғВ©sinformation.

Cependant, sous couvert d'un bien commun largement dГғВ©voyГғВ©, le DSA favorise surtout la censure politique. Cet ГғВ©tГғВ©, en France, le groupe Meta a arbitrairement fermГғВ© les comptes des responsables de NГғВ©mГғВ©sis ou ceux de mГғВ©dias franГғВ§ais comme Occidentis, Une Bonne Droite ou encore celui de FrontiГғВЁres, temporairement suspendus sans raison objective. C'est en s'abritant derriГғВЁre le DSA que ces entreprises privГғВ©es transforment l'ГғВүtat de droit en ministГғВЁre orwellien de la vГғВ©ritГғВ©. Et comme souvent, la dГғВ©fense de la dГғВ©mocratie sert de prГғВ©texte ГғВ  une censure toujours plus arrogante, toujours plus prГғВ©sente, toujours plus arbitraire. Alors, face ГғВ  ces dГғВ©rives, soyez assurГғВ©s de nous trouver sur votre route pour dГғВ©fendre le trГғВ©sor de la libertГғВ© d'expression.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ StГғВ©phanie Yon-Courtin (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ Monsieur le PrГғВ©sident, Madame la Commissaire, chers collГғВЁgues, il y a une semaine, ElonГӮВ Musk, le milliardaire amГғВ©ricain, propriГғВ©taire deГӮВ X, appelait l'Europe ГғВ  se dГғВ©barrasser, je cite: ГӮВ«de rГғВЁgles inutilesГӮВ». Il parlait nГғВ©cessairement du rГғВЁglement sur les services numГғВ©riques, le DSA, qui lui semble si compliquГғВ© ГғВ  respecter. Parce que oui, MonsieurГӮВ Musk, le DSA, c'est comme le nuage de Tchernobyl: il ne s'arrГғВӘte pas aux frontiГғВЁres de l'Europe. L'obligation de lutter contre la pollution de contenus haineux n'a pas de frontiГғВЁres.

Un an aprГғВЁs l'application du DSA qui doit rendre illГғВ©gal en ligne ce qui l'est dГғВ©jГғВ  hors ligne, il est inacceptable de voir des plateformes utilisГғВ©es chaque jour par des millions de citoyens prospГғВ©rer, amplifier du contenu qui attise la haine, la manipulation et la radicalisation. C'est vrai pour le conflit au Moyen-Orient, les ГғВ©lections amГғВ©ricaines ou les manifestations de cet ГғВ©tГғВ© au Royaume-Uni. Face ГғВ  une alliance baroque de libertaires amГғВ©ricains alliГғВ©s ГғВ  des patriotes qui n'en ont que le nom, l'Europe doit rГғВ©sister pour mettre en Г…В“uvre cette rГғВ©gulation ГӮВ«dangereuseГӮВ» de l'espace numГғВ©rique en ligne.

Et ГғВ  tous ceux qui doutent, ceux qui crient au complot, je leur demande: interrogez-vous. Souhaiteriez-vous que vos enfants puissent voir ce genre de contenus sur des panneaux publicitaires dans les rues en allant ГғВ  l'ГғВ©cole?

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Karlo Ressler (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ PoГ…ВЎtovani predsjedavajuГ„ВҮi, poГ…ВЎtovana povjerenice, kolegice i kolege, novi digitalni alati iz temelja su promijenili naГ…ВЎu svakodnevicu.

Dok online platforme donose iznimne prilike za unaprjeГ„В‘enje naГ…ВЎeg Г…Вҫivota, gospodarstva, pa i demokracije, one takoГ„В‘er donose i nove opasnosti. Akt o digitalnim uslugama jedan je od najznaГ„ВҚajnijih pokuГ…ВЎaja uvoГ„В‘enja reda i modernizacije europske politike u digitalnom svijetu. MreГ…Вҫni prostor time nastojimo uГ„ВҚiniti sigurnijim za korisnike a platforme koje posluju na zajedniГ„ВҚkom trГ…ВҫiГ…ВЎtu dobile su veГ„ВҮu pravnu sigurnost, kao i potrebnu odgovornost. Sada moramo osigurati kvalitetnu primjenu novih pravila, u partnerstvu sa svim kljuГ„ВҚnim dionicima. Duboki procesi druГ…ВЎtvene i digitalne preobrazbe nadilaze europske granice. Europa novim pravilima pokazuje da moГ…Вҫe preuzeti vodeГ„ВҮu ulogu u izgradnji druГ…ВЎtva u kojemu je dobrobit Г„ВҚovjeka u srediГ…ВЎtu. Ne smijemo i ne moГ…Вҫemo birati izmeГ„В‘u temeljnih prava graГ„В‘ana, slobode govora, slobode izraГ…Вҫavanja, prava na pristup informacijama i unaprjeГ„В‘enja digitalnog gospodarstva veГ„ВҮ moГ…Вҫemo i moramo postiГ„ВҮi sve te vrijedne ciljeve.

Kolegice i kolege, zbog toga mislim da nema nikakve dileme da je danas u Europi moguГ„ВҮe, usprkos potpunoj digitalnoj i tehnoloГ…ВЎkoj revoluciji, teГ…Вҫiti i dalje postiГ„ВҮi ono Г…ВЎto teГ…Вҫimo i sa DSA-om, joГ…ВЎ demokratskije, joГ…ВЎ pluralnije druГ…ВЎtvo koje Г„ВҮe biti prilagoГ„В‘eno novim izazovima vremena.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Tiemo WГғВ¶lken (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ Herr PrГғВӨsident, sehr geehrte Frau Kommissarin, liebe Kolleginnen und Kollegen! Im letzten Mandat haben wir mit dem Gesetz ГғВјber digitale Dienste, mit dem neuen digitalen Grundgesetz fГғВјr die EuropГғВӨische Union, GroГғВҹes erreicht: Wir stellen sicher, dass die Redefreiheit auch online gilt. Aber wir stellen auch sicher, dass Hass, Hetze, MordaufrufeГӮВ ГўВҖВ“ wie Sie gerade von rechts als freie MeinungsГғВӨuГғВҹerung kundgetan habenГӮВ ГўВҖВ“ bestraft werden, aber nicht durch irgendwelche Onlinedienste, sondern durch Gerichte. Das ist unsere Interpretation von Rechtsstaat und von Grundrechten im digitalen Raum, und genau das stellt der Digital Services Act sicher. Das ist ein groГғВҹer Erfolg.

Was es allerdings braucht, ist eine Durchsetzung mit AugenmaГғВҹ. Was es nicht mehr geben darf, ist, dass ein ausscheidender Kommissar im digitalen KrГғВӨftemessen mit Elon Musk Briefe hinГўВҖВ‘ und herschickt und willkГғВјrliche Fristen setztГӮВ ГўВҖВ“ das steht nicht im Gesetz. Es braucht jetzt eine konsequente Durchsetzung, damit sich die groГғВҹen digitalen Konzerne an diese neuen Regeln, die die Demokratie, die die Grundrechte im Internet schГғВјtzen, halten. Die neue Kommission muss das besser machen als Herr Breton bisher; ich habe darauf groГғВҹes Vertrauen.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Roman Haider (PfE). ГўВҖВ“ Herr PrГғВӨsident! StГғВӨrkung der Rolle des Digital Services Act und Schutz von Demokratie und Freiheit im Onlinebereich: Allein der Titel der heutigen Debatte ist der blanke Hohn. Es ist purer Zynismus, ein Zensurgesetz wie den Digital Services Act in einem Atemzug mit dem Schutz von Freiheit und Demokratie zu nennen. Bei diesem Gesetz haben ganz offenbar China, Nordkorea und der Iran Pate gestanden. Damit werden nicht Demokratie und Freiheit im Onlinebereich geschГғВјtzt; damit werden Demokratie und Freiheit im Onlinebereich zerstГғВ¶rt. Das ist eines der freiheitsfeindlichsten und autoritГғВӨrsten Gesetze in der Geschichte der EU, und mit vГғВ¶llig vagen und undefinierten TatbestГғВӨnden wie Hassrede und Desinformation ist dieses Gesetz auch ein Schlag ins Gesicht des Rechtsstaates. WГғВјrde es die Kommission wirklich ernst meinen mit Freiheit und Demokratie, dann mГғВјssten Sie sofort auf die Abschaffung desГӮВ Digital Services Act drГғВӨngen, aber in Wahrheit haben Sie panische Angst vor echter Meinungsfreiheit. Darum haben Sie dieses Gesetz ГғВјberhaupt erst geschaffen, weil Ihnen echte Meinungsfreiheit ein Dorn im Auge ist.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Stefano Cavedagna (ECR). ГўВҖВ“ Signor Presidente, onorevoli colleghi, il regolamento sui servizi digitali, anche conosciuto come Digital Services Act, aveva lo scopo di limitare gli abusi delle grandi compagnie ai danni dei consumatori, ai danni dei piГғВ№ deboli e ai danni degli utenti delle piattaforme del web.

Ma troppo spesso, purtroppo, abbiamo notato come, con la scusa di combattere la disinformazione, la diffusione di odio e la diffusione delle fake news, in realtГғВ  veniva utilizzato questo scopo per zittire, letteralmente per tappare la bocca, come una clava politica, un bavaglio, tutti coloro che esprimevano idee che, secondo chi governava, non erano opportune.

Ecco, allora noi non possiamo non notare quello che ГғВЁ accaduto con la lettera che il commissario Breton ГўВҖВ“ che, dico subito, non ci mancherГғВ  ГўВҖВ“ ha inviato qualche settimana fa a Elon Musk, alla piattaforma X, per limitare la possibilitГғВ  di parlare del candidato alla presidenza Donald Trump, maГӮВ questo vale per tante altre realtГғВ . Combatteremo per la libertГғВ  di espressione e lo faremo sempre, anche in questa sede.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Cynthia NГғВӯ MhurchГғВә (Renew). ГўВҖВ“ Mr President, Madam Commissioner Vestager, fellow MEPs, let's get real here in the real world outside of the Brussels bubble. The Digital Services Act versus tech giants is akin to David versus Goliath. It's regulation versus profit-hungry rebels. The Goliath tech giants devour regulations and self-regulation and compliance for their breakfast. They thrive on enforcement and self-regulation because they know it's slow, cumbersome and full of red tape.

In the meantime, friends, the Goliath tech giants have made millions. They have robbed our children of their childhood. They have swindled our old-age pensioners out of their savings for their holidays. And they have organised our citizens to hate, to maim and to kill. That means, quite simply, lives are lost.

I say enough is enough. You and me and us as MEPs, we need to legislate for robust laws and fast laws. That means interim and interlocutory suspensions and injunctions. We need to be rapid and, especially, we need criminal sanctions for those directors of the tech giants. That will temper the tech giants. That will teach them manners. I say ...

(The President cut off the speaker)

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Aura Salla (PPE). ГўВҖВ“ MrГӮВ President, as far as we can see, a lot of ongoing work to enforce the DSA is progressing well and shows a serious commitment to protecting and empowering users online, by requiring platforms to assess, mitigate and act against their systemic risks and to provide the right content moderation tools to do so, as well as clear information to users on possible misbehaviour.

This shows that the DSA can work well, but that is only the case when things are done correctly. This is not a tool for preventing something that might be said. Nothing should endanger freedom of speech.

Politicising the enforcement of the DSA is an incredibly dangerous thing to do. The DSA is designed to uphold the rights of millions of Europeans by addressing systemic risks. It is not a tool for censorship, and abusing it in this manner will defeat the purpose of the law. Instead, the Commission needs to keep working to fine-tune enforcement so it works as uniformly and efficiently as possible in all Member States. This has to be evidence-based and process-focused.

In this House, we are closely following the impact of the law and whether we need to review some of its elements in the future.

ГӮВ 
ГӮВ ГӮВ 
ГӮВ 

ГӮВ ГӮВ Francisco Assis (S&D). ГўВҖВ“ Senhor Presidente, Senhora ComissГғВЎria, a regulaГғВ§ГғВЈo das redes sociais constitui hoje uma necessidade absoluta para a preservaГғВ§ГғВЈo das nossas democracias.

Redes sociais desreguladas pГғВөem em causa os alicerces do Estado de direito democrГғВЎtico. Isso ГғВ© hoje uma evidГғВӘncia absoluta praticamente em todo o mundo.

A Europa tem estado na vanguarda da luta contra essa anarquia que alguns querem que se instale nas redes sociais. NГғВЈo ГғВ© por acaso que o querem, porque tambГғВ©m nГғВЈo ГғВ© por acaso que vemos, muitas vezes, os defensores dos autocratas a usarem e a invocarem cinicamente o princГғВӯpio da liberdade de expressГғВЈo para porem em causa qualquer tentativa de regulaГғВ§ГғВЈo das redes sociais.

Gostaria de, aqui, enquanto deputado europeu e a partir do Parlamento Europeu, saudar um grande Estado democrГғВЎtico, o Brasil, pela forma como lidou com o ataque inadmissГғВӯvel ГғВ s regras de um Estado de direito democrГғВЎtico. Estou a referir-me ao contencioso recente entre o Supremo Tribunal Federal do Brasil e Elon Musk.
